subject: Can you believe he’s bragging about this?!

Imagine orchestrating an insurrection, having your phone confiscated by the FBI, dodging multiple subpoenas, and then... bragging about it in a letter sent to thousands of your constituents.
So let me spell it out for you: **Not only did Congressman Perry help incite violence on January 6th, but he's proud of it and using his seditious actions to fundraise for his campaign.** I don't know about you, but I think that is disturbing.
We're so much better than this, which is exactly why I'm running to unseat Scott Perry in Congress. When I'm elected, I can promise you that I'll never stage an overthrow of our government, vote to throw out your ballots, or disrespect the basic tenets of our democracy. In fact, I'll be laser-focused on protecting reproductive freedom, fully funding our public schools, and bipartisan initiatives to strengthen our economy and lower inflation.
[**So, are you sick of Perry's antics and ready to send someone who will fight for Central Pennsylvanians? Chip in $10 or $25 now to help me fire Scott Perry once and for all:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77092578/449340995/-1786018290?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_011224_1_1_PerryLetter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ5NDcxM2MtMzliMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DIEnBGoMeis7bMy47TCcHSIQ_j-kE6z0RKgAAiv6ORQ=)

Fellow American, The 2024 election starts, in earnest, tomorrow. Every year, around election day, I’m reminded of how blessed I am to be an American. Not because of the political mudslinging... **[But because our right to govern for the people and by the people is what sets the American Experiment apart from any other throughout the history of mankind.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ab75d04f8264fd1aeba9c94c188a2dc&_e=8WirtJcvx-hpM9H_hWRifiesJEUvdhW6fsLCb4e5uVErsnnhRaQdYQ5RQvcdkCED2WRQzIl8Xv27P2oy7qa5E1jsar29W0G3NOiiRWKCG4i6Kz8ROO_ezA3Zq5fW2NhqjGLJOsqwOyJID5nn6hPUy8OCCpounbE2EYYLnhS4SEWphyazBePgkwdu2ocO7cZadCG_6vzvJImiqYORsmOAg7PA7bTDUkTiQO4Kh6pR2MDvX3N52rcIp0xVJlNx9RpmYXufVrBeG0bd0pu-JnDET6ViJjhW_XTq6Jwyy6bUjV7jhDtaiimZT-MN4MPtSEVM55-6Cgz57WzcUeqTSZYZoVSaphFWoRd0mOzMeS0RGxKMvCVcQem_PT51opS38VUDUz_nl002D99YpRiYJf2Ud8uTn8xRp_4lV1dI8k2_HRzM82CKpDIS_ghEYrhYo9u1)** And 2024 is set to be the most important election in our nation’s history, kicking off with the Iowa caucuses tomorrow. Fellow American, I believe that President Donald J. Trump has what it takes to lead us to victory. Since the day he came down the escalator, no one in America has been more attacked than President Trump. But the attacks have only made him tougher, smarter, and more prepared to beat the corrupt, radical left at their own game. President Trump is ready to give his all to SAVE the American Experiment. **[**I have to know Fellow American, are you supporting President Trump in the Republican primary?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ab75d04f8264fd1aeba9c94c188a2dc&_e=8WirtJcvx-hpM9H_hWRifiesJEUvdhW6fsLCb4e5uVErsnnhRaQdYQ5RQvcdkCED2WRQzIl8Xv27P2oy7qa5E1jsar29W0G3NOiiRWKCG4i6Kz8ROO_ezA3Zq5fW2NhqjGLJOsqwOyJID5nn6hPUy8OCCpounbE2EYYLnhS4SEWphyazBePgkwdu2ocO7cZadCG_6vzvJImiqYORsmOAg7PA7bTDUkTiQO4Kh6pR2MDvX3N52rcIp0xVJlNx9RpmYXufVrBeG0bd0pu-JnDET6ViJjhW_XTq6Jwyy6bUjV4GEcmoqNDNpvU-qm5bbewq4VO59lbl86WoNak5XZefid2XWAxR3dphq6Fx8PVeeaadXbbmmNkRLHyvKLHjpTs8WSBWiyR-CJgVC086-DXnw50iULeNBOjkN7VEYRrfO1CPY4ZPM9ZVHAP7FFeW--FK)**

clean_body: The beginning of the 2024 election.| | | Fellow American, The 2024 election starts, in earnest, tomorrow. Every year, around election day, I’m reminded of how blessed I am to be an American. Not because of the political mudslinging... And 2024 is set to be the most important election in our nation’s history, kicking off with the Iowa caucuses tomorrow. Fellow American, I believe that President Donald J. Trump has what it takes to lead us to victory. Since the day he came down the escalator, no one in America has been more attacked than President Trump. But the attacks have only made him tougher, smarter, and more prepared to beat the corrupt, radical left at their own game. President Trump is ready to give his all to SAVE the American Experiment. Thank you for your continued support, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: Why I'm a Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

When I speak to voters, especially young adults, one of the most common questions I get asked is this:

**_“Senator, why should I be a Republican?”_**

The answer is clear: Republicans are fighting for your constitutional rights and the opportunity to succeed through hard work. And Democrats are fighting for a woke, socialist state, more focused on culture wars than advancing the next generation of Americans.

_Just look at the differences between what Democrats and Republicans do when they’re in power._

**When Republicans are in charge, **they work to secure our border and empower law enforcement with the tools they need to fight crime. They cut taxes, support small businesses, and stand strong against America’s enemies. We create communities that reward hard work and allow people to succeed.

**When Democrats are in power,** they target our children with their woke agenda. They applaud criminals while they burn down our homes and businesses. They open our borders to thugs and cartel members who hate America, and when their policies leave your city in shambles, they say it’s your fault. They can’t define what a woman is and think it’s fair for biological men to play in women’s sports.

**I’m proud to be conservative, Peter.**

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

[**By rushing just $15, you can help us WIN in 2024 and turn our failing country under the Democrats around.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=83b27316f9bf49d8813446f8f6618165&_e=CH0-XKN8fNxL5BuH1vrkj1eFUvblWo0GOr0LdBrn3P6AMUUGUgLpwj360tRAUBeVPIGY8THqHDoUtBGk8konbh5jR0vIiXZpamKLH5oTnVWc3EAHUJguyu0muh7iVUMH-apzZLFXxuhhzieqfTlolFLmUfZVqZEFY04XfZizEskF9vNYFL6cSUg4ezz9CEkWRJ9FMB_v3LpV9XiDdRIlHZ5Hp5_qLnhHE0VVSgmojoxdUnecGnpjyuBJNr0f93hOEV5XLaAFuSSVL7Eb0xdD3J7kXgKvGzCECI0Oe53VhqQ8K6zuGnZrSJ6si7O5mNGrxXGL__39O141zM9yzhAwtrFFxXIA6cR1kdAty3R6zNdfEXQNssz9Tq_d32iykucY)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77093037/449354002/18334046?refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240114_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmZjg4MzQ2LTNkYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YQ8yqucTcUDkYvpZ21U_rbN_Bez05nyJGN2ziL1H5qE=)
Peter,
I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just _had_ to share it with you.
Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77093038/449354003/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240114_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmZjg4MzQ2LTNkYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YQ8yqucTcUDkYvpZ21U_rbN_Bez05nyJGN2ziL1H5qE=)
I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.
Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause.
[_**Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask — will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between Upset the Setup my campaign? If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.
We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.
This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)
While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day.
**In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.**
These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.
And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours.
That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah: = I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith. Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = I want to take you back to 1973. We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school. This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.) While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office. And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours. That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. name: Biden-Harris Dems
subject: Before the start of the Iowa Caucus tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We could have our official GOP opponent in no time, so it’s critical that we show the strength of this campaign as early as possible. | | |
---
$25 **That is the contribution Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are asking you to make before the start of the Iowa Caucus tomorrow.** $25 for every time you've been grateful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the 2020 election. $25 to make sure we defeat the MAGA Republican nominee this year, no matter who it is. $25 because while we are facing many millions in attack ads, it's your individual donations that allow us to fight back. It may not seem like $25 can make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one will be, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few folks have already chipped in their $25. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. **What do you say, Peter?** [**Will you contribute just $25 before the start of tomorrow’s Iowa Caucus? body:
Peter, This morning, I was a guest on Meet the Press to discuss the Republican presidential primary field ahead of tomorrow’s Iowa caucuses. Let me reiterate what I told Kristen Welker: These MAGA Republican candidates are not serious people.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77093189/449359863/709794820?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODMwMDY1ZS0zZmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LrdMJgH-eUjCoyih2pL246cwLZuZCl0pK9u4HpLEHns=)

Peter,
This morning, I was a guest on _Meet the Press_ to discuss the Republican presidential primary field ahead of tomorrow’s Iowa caucuses. Let me reiterate what I told Kristen Welker: These MAGA Republican candidates are not serious people.
While President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris are delivering real results for real people, these GOP candidates (and their MAGA Republican counterparts in Congress) are only interested in trying to out-MAGA each other in any way they can.
There’s no question about it: Our nation – and our entire world – is at a crossroads. But instead of working with us in good faith to solve problems, Republicans at all levels of government are focused on banning books, attacking the LGBTQ+ community, and championing atrocious abortion bans,
**Peter, our nation cannot afford another four years of Donald Trump or any other MAGA Republican in the White House. But make no mistake: This is going to be an incredibly close race.**
I will continue doing everything I can to help Democrats hold the line up and down the ballot, keep Minnesota blue, and re-elect President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris this November, but the work cannot continue without your support.
**[With our first monthly fundraising deadline of this critical election year approaching in two weeks, I’m counting on you to ensure we have the resources to get the job done. If you can, please send a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77093190/449359864/709794820?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODMwMDY1ZS0zZmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LrdMJgH-eUjCoyih2pL246cwLZuZCl0pK9u4HpLEHns=)**

Hello,
Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Colorado's 3rd congressional district and to replace Lauren Boebert in Congress.
I am once again running to replace Boebert. In 2022, the race between us went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.
It was the closest race in the entire country.
I know we can win this time, but I am counting on your support from the start to be able to build a campaign strong enough to win.

NEW EPISODE!!
[| The Erosion of Liberty and Justice for All with David AzerradThe Kathy Barnette Show47:22
---|---](https://substack.com/redirect/27cde31c-29de-4010-8287-ebe86f9f4714?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Friends,
This week, I had the luxury of being joined by one of the most like-minded people I have had the chance to get in contact with. David Azerrad is an Assistant Professor and Research Fellow at Hillsdale College's Van Andel Graduate School of Government in Washington, D.C. His research and writing focuses on classical liberalism, conservative political thought, and identity politics.
After hearing about David and seeing some of his speeches, I actually decided to head in the recording... without preparing it! It seemed like an excellent opportunity to have an organic conversation about topics he and I both are interested in.
"The Boomers tend to be more optimistic; they have nostalgia for Reagan, and they think that if we elect another Reagan and cut taxes, we can save America"
\- David Azerrad
We talked extensively about the Founding Fathers, their culture, and what is missing in America today... and also the reasons to be cautiously optimistic about We The People.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/abb93046-51a6-4b7f-93ee-4f00e49ff4eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
One of the reasons that we are in the position we find ourselves in today, regarding the attacks on our liberties, is, as David pointed out, that we have for too long been more attached to our comfort rather than our liberties.
Young men, especially, have been turning more conservative in recent years, and they seem to be more "radical." Well, guess what? *AMERICAN IDEALS ARE RADICAL*
Unrestricted speech, a government OF the people, FOR the people, BY the people... Those are for the faint-hearted... It's about time men get back to their natural role of leaders and stand up for our liberties and everything else our beautiful America is about.
Please let me know what you thought of the episode in the comments!
Blessings...

body:
Did you see John’s email from yesterday? Lauren Boebert is running for all the wrong reasons. John is running to fight for our community.
__ | | | Friends, Did you see John’s email from yesterday? **[If not, read it below and rush in a donation to help him win this race today.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e6b1415252e4d118233e59859fb7cf3&_e=vRfCX9ygWBs7LaSFESqgbDYzZ0N08IPamiES8LXVRDZZ-NLuIywKySps8UWcbFA3ePOIE890VbWHmsNQJLA91M1VQ90_P16DU-AEiYUZljSgnuyw-dB5321ZpvKf_xI3Au-6gDNOA0mEgwgwb2bYINMvTQoehiMEUCnzZFlaqwplZm2-9Q41XATpVWyNgXlf8JuB7ssvgCegQNbaoxyaBhqcCTVfb39PbyQrL-gYhtlzRTlcCbVX4vFcxRMNNSQ0RZGQG7wEgnzXEtKyEQYVM98hWvTtj7zRBeNNjuAIVPXXgT1QSFG18xz1rCp_OCBUglZFv-ys4Op-_d2CZC63NeesewhjgUBZZeOSjrTUHaLS-lq8xiBdFxxbogFndlS6_WzVPqWG4jeKZ7TG4lwITspk0AUDH2F5Tyy_DQR2blU%3D)** Lauren Boebert is running for all the wrong reasons. John is running to fight for our community. **[Help us defeat Boebert by chipping in today.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e6b1415252e4d118233e59859fb7cf3&_e=vRfCX9ygWBs7LaSFESqgbDYzZ0N08IPamiES8LXVRDZZ-NLuIywKySps8UWcbFA3ePOIE890VbWHmsNQJLA91M1VQ90_P16DU-AEiYUZljSgnuyw-dB5321ZpvKf_xI3Au-6gDNOA0mEgwgwb2bYINMvTQoehiMEUCnzZFlaqwplZm2-9Q41XATpVWyNgXlf8JuB7ssvgCegQNbaoxyaBhqcCTVfb39PbyQrL-gYhtlzRTlcCbVX4vFcxRMNNSQ093kg5v7X3cZrO2V0AIUn_3LmC5ixG4QvUgcftbyv8ceosmjf3WUwErhoXsqKlpD8J4DLOPtdy8CHLdPEPxqh5YcgKziGHKKqiM2UN1czu4p8Oz44zaqDd8EWDkvLk71Nq9peTg7RlUnxc6E0Lmgo52H1KjoQx3_p0wDDV1BfM84%3D)** Thanks, Team Padora On Sat, Jan 13, 2024 at 2:35 PM John Padora <info@padoraforcongress.com> wrote: [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e6b1415252e4d118233e59859fb7cf3&_e=vRfCX9ygWBs7LaSFESqgbDYzZ0N08IPamiES8LXVRDZZ-NLuIywKySps8UWcbFA3ePOIE890VbWHmsNQJLA91M1VQ90_P16DU-AEiYUZljSgnuyw-dB5321ZpvKf_xI3Au-6gDNOA0mEgwgwb2bYINMvTQoehiMEUCnzZFlaqwplZm2-9Q41XATpVWyNgXlf8JuB7ssvgCegQNbaoxyaBhqcCTVfb39PbyQrL-gYhtlzRTlcCbVX4vFcxRMNNSQ01dbcjfLRu0bmJ5QladNpTDx9VNtF7G7UCIU-iYlfyvJA6r_YlwU-EsJvcb1VlVOd5hetGPL6x3QuJgRZsIzDrbvOL-2YQL4AIBx6YTClaDWxmvAfRUnPnqdDOo9brLkKRAQcUuRUs12aW-lcsi1AWf445lc57Gb8jrxyVWf32XY%3D) Friends, There has been a lot of noise around our race since Lauren Boebert jumped in. Although it’s important to remember that we have to do everything we can to ensure Boebert does not win this race to represent CD-4, it’s also important for me to remind you all who I am and why I’m even running for Congress in the first place. **I’m John, and I’m a father, husband, engineer, environmental scientist, and addiction/recovery advocate. ** [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e6b1415252e4d118233e59859fb7cf3&_e=vRfCX9ygWBs7LaSFESqgbDYzZ0N08IPamiES8LXVRDZZ-NLuIywKySps8UWcbFA3ePOIE890VbWHmsNQJLA91M1VQ90_P16DU-AEiYUZljSgnuyw-dB5321ZpvKf_xI3Au-6gDNOA0mEgwgwb2bYINMvTQoehiMEUCnzZFlaqwplZm2-9Q41XATpVWyNgXlf8JuB7ssvgCegQNbaoxyaBhqcCTVfb39PbyQrL-gYhtlzRTlcCbVX4vFcxRMNNSQ06qNGt5m3bA8rg9_TiA6JzwNVNf6mvzGlnjAbhPS76pAeULsfmhWCa7UIIxyelOynS8_m9oHw63HOUkcgg2Ip6yM9SrOp7gwdWMM1lKedlotWh2Zz7umMdcrfDA3KKFbX3DH_4EODNgetHN6muzgEnwehNNAJwZfiLgYX4sXLd6o%3D) I’m running because I love this community, and I know we deserve more from our representatives in Congress. Our seniors deserve to grow old with dignity, our young people should be able to buy a home and build a family, and our kids deserve a future full of opportunities. And they should all be able to do so in Colorado’s 4th District. Washington is broken, and we all feel the impact of this dysfunction. We need better leadership, free from division and inaction. Our representatives should be working to deliver results, not to make headlines and line their pockets with dollars from special interest groups. I know we can win this race, and defeat the type of extremism that Lauren Boebert represents. _**But I can’t do it alone. **_ [**That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll chip in $10 to my campaign today.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e6b1415252e4d118233e59859fb7cf3&_e=vRfCX9ygWBs7LaSFESqgbDYzZ0N08IPamiES8LXVRDZZ-NLuIywKySps8UWcbFA3ePOIE890VbWHmsNQJLA91M1VQ90_P16DU-AEiYUZljSgnuyw-dB5321ZpvKf_xI3Au-6gDNOA0mEgwgwb2bYINMvTQoehiMEUCnzZFlaqwplZm2-9Q41XATpVWyNgXlf8JuB7ssvgCegQNbaoxyaBhqcCTVfb39PbyQrL-gYhtlzRTlcCbVX4vFcxRMNNSQ0VQR_ZGQEzdoWIkYEe8JVxauNzNS-orsn62b7F9_hBcMVNCOp2wdzA_lwh0Ettwiai46LMu_7ZsXcxqC_1_Nt47WoiyeZdABeXWmPOh6_5yZxxRdr_GUQg1s98SleTDByJFBFsRFxjJvqTXTKNDeuzRhitAOgqBNh0GssRUxfKKw%3D) While $10 may not seem like much, every little bit goes a long way in a grassroots campaign like ours. Even since Boebert announced she was moving districts, we’ve been able to raise over $50k with the average donation at just $30.32. It’s remarkable what can be done when everyone chips in what they can. **[So, if you can, consider chipping into my campaign today to keep extremists like Lauren Boebert OUT of our district. ](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2e6b1415252e4d118233e59859fb7cf3&_e=vRfCX9ygWBs7LaSFESqgbDYzZ0N08IPamiES8LXVRDZZ-NLuIywKySps8UWcbFA3ePOIE890VbWHmsNQJLA91M1VQ90_P16DU-AEiYUZljSgnuyw-dB5321ZpvKf_xI3Au-6gDNOA0mEgwgwb2bYINMvTQoehiMEUCnzZFlaqwplZm2-9Q41XATpVWyNgXlf8JuB7ssvgCegQNbaoxyaBhqcCTVfb39PbyQrL-gYhtlzRTlcCbVX4vFcxRMNNSQ0oEiNIr3ZqXgLs_15tHtAPow_N2doup-qONJC0ynm5BnL2gPUBBlipZWgmU28UWEwVohyhATvOXzokIIn3sW3ftn6Ns0un4iCMha6GQuJQ_JvcjyOhJASrZAwn0wVzEAXWGBDdKVLZmQWRvixTIJQRr7bgv7NLvdLxACbHYuFq-0%3D)** I hope to make you proud. John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CO-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. clean_body: Did you see John’s email from yesterday? Lauren Boebert is running for all the wrong reasons. John is running to fight for our community. | | | Friends, Did you see John’s email from yesterday? Lauren Boebert is running for all the wrong reasons. John is running to fight for our community. Thanks, Team Padora On Sat, Jan 13, 2024 at 2:35 PM John Padora <info@padoraforcongress.com> wrote: Friends, There has been a lot of noise around our race since Lauren Boebert jumped in. Although it’s important to remember that we have to do everything we can to ensure Boebert does not win this race to represent CD-4, it’s also important for me to remind you all who I am and why I’m even running for Congress in the first place. I’m John, and I’m a father, husband, engineer, environmental scientist, and addiction/recovery advocate. I’m running because I love this community, and I know we deserve more from our representatives in Congress. Our seniors deserve to grow old with dignity, our young people should be able to buy a home and build a family, and our kids deserve a future full of opportunities. And they should all be able to do so in Colorado’s 4th District. Washington is broken, and we all feel the impact of this dysfunction. We need better leadership, free from division and inaction. Our representatives should be working to deliver results, not to make headlines and line their pockets with dollars from special interest groups. I know we can win this race, and defeat the type of extremism that Lauren Boebert represents. But I can’t do it alone. While $10 may not seem like much, every little bit goes a long way in a grassroots campaign like ours. Even since Boebert announced she was moving districts, we’ve been able to raise over $50k with the average donation at just $30.32. It’s remarkable what can be done when everyone chips in what they can. I hope to make you proud. John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CO-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Adam Schiff
subject: On MSNBC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The stakes of these upcoming elections, starting with the Iowa Caucus tomorrow, are sky-high.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5068%2E5257348%2EV0_m1a)
Derek — I was on _MSNBC_ earlier today with Jen Psaki, where I discussed Trump’s recent claims of “presidential immunity.”
Before I share the quick details, can you pitch in to my campaign? My first mid-month fundraising deadline of the year expires at 11:59 PM tomorrow: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2024_abs_em?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240114_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5068%2E5257348%2EV0_m1a)**
As president, Donald Trump used and abused his powers for his own gain — and that’s exactly what he would do if he made it back into the White House.
Look, he already claimed he would be “a dictator on day one.”
He believes there are _no limits_ to what he can do under the Constitution.
Inciting violence against his rivals. Undermining election results he disagrees with. Dismantling our rule of law.
Donald Trump is a profound danger to our country. **I’ve said it for years.**
Meanwhile, Trump’s rivals in the presidential primary refuse to take him on. They’re more focused on their own political futures — four years from now — than confronting the dangerous demagogue who is beating them in the polls.
**The stakes of these upcoming elections, starting with the Iowa Caucus tomorrow, are sky-high, Derek. And we need to be sure we have someone in the Senate with the experience and leadership necessary to defend our democracy.**
That’s why I’m running for Senate — to keep up this fight and hold Trump to account. **Please chip in to my campaign today:[secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2024_abs_em?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240114_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5068%2E5257348%2EV0_m1a)**
Thank you,
Adam

Hey, Peter – it's Patty Murray. I know you're probably having a busy Sunday, so I'll make this quick.
My team is working to raise $50,000 before my mid-month deadline tomorrow at midnight, but my team just told me we're falling short. **This is our first fundraising deadline of the year** , and that's why I'm reaching out to ask my top supporters (including you!) to make a donation now.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I admired Ady with my whole heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Ady and his family sacrificed so much to fight for a better health care system and a better world.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)
---
Today I joined the friends, family, and loved ones of Ady Barkan for a special memorial to celebrate his remarkable life that ended too soon after a battle with ALS. Ady was a hero who made this world a better place. I admired him with my whole heart. He was family. I first met Ady in 2013. I was a baby senator, and Ady was organizing an effort aimed at a wild and crazy place: the Federal Reserve. When most people hear about monetary policy and the Fed’s dual mandate for price stability and full employment, you can actually see them counting off the seconds until they can change the subject. But not Ady. He recognized that the Fed’s monetary policies touched the lives of real people every day — and he believed he could help influence those policies to tilt them a little less toward billionaire investors and a little more toward the financial security of American families. So he organized. He built a coalition of workers, activists, economists, and lawmakers like me to challenge the Fed’s perpetual tilt to prioritize Wall Street over workers. In 2014, he built a movement he called FedUp — and America’s understanding of the Fed would never be the same. His work made a difference. The FedUp campaign is just one example of how Ady worked. About four months after the birth of his son Carl, Ady learned he had ALS. At that point, even an all-in activist like Ady could have chosen to focus only on himself. But instead, he dived even deeper — this time into the fight for health care. When Trump and Republicans decided to repeal the Affordable Care Act, they looked unstoppable. Millions of people — particularly those with pre-existing conditions — were about to lose coverage and, for some, lose the lifelines that were keeping them alive. So, Ady did what Ady always did: he organized and he fought back. He confronted powerful people. He toured the country to mobilize grassroots supporters for the cause. He found Senator Jeff Flake on a plane and asked him to “be a hero” and to protect the Affordable Care Act. He stepped up at the first Congressional hearing, passionately defending Medicare for All. He wrote op-eds. He launched an organization — Be a Hero — to support politicians who would expand health care access. He led one protest — and then he led another and another. And when we finally beat back the attack on the ACA by a single vote, Ady didn’t quit. He swung into action to demand MORE access to health care. He campaigned actively in the 2020 election, pressed candidates to support greater access to health care, hosted interviews, and spoke at the Democratic National Convention. He reminded America of what is possible. Up until the very end, Ady — and his family — sacrificed so much to fight for a better health care system and a better world. And they did so with grace, courage, and heart. [**If you’re able to make a donation to support the Ady Barkan Fund for Health Justice, it would go a long way to help continue Ady’s legacy of dogged advocacy and ensure that Be a Hero can continue fighting for health care as a human right.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1142?t=8&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1142?t=20&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1142?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1142?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1142?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1142?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1142?t=18&express_lane=true&akid=1897%2E4032634%2ET31U8c)
---

---
Thank you, Ady. Thank you for your vision. For your leadership. For your steely determination. Your time here on earth was short, but you made every minute count — and for that, each one of us will be forever grateful. -Elizabeth
| | | |
---

Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Crystal & Jason via ActionNetwork.org
subject: Join us as we talk about our Indigenous Communities on this day of Racial Healing Jan 16, 2024
body:
The National Day of Racial Healing is a time to contemplate our shared values and create the blueprint together for #HowWeHeal from the effects of racism. Launched in 2017, it is an opportunity to unite ALL people in their common humanity and inspire coll | | | **Dear Friends, Supporters and Allies,** Many of you have been on this journey with us to fight against environmental harm across North Carolina, Virginia, and West Virginia. We want to take it further and help people understand the underlying issues affecting our Southeast United States' indigenous communities.
Join Jason and me for CONVERSATIONS AROUND RACIAL EQUITY and the system of racism, which commonly omits the attempted genocide, continued struggle, and present-day culture and communities of Indigenous Peoples and Tribal Nations. **_Click on the video to see our invitation!_** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrQp6RWh1jCpli130ZwmXaf3a5bmu55BLdI6Qg2C0PVERjx6mw0er8P_lHu2vTo8Fv8_SZUyjEvGNAt_ZeBc97Naxycr67bHuUODnxNdzaJT9-GSAGPqYVsaB36Il1E5seOHpCMZZk7joRpFCSbDm1Qy8mk-WT3Bh1bmVPCOauhvwiiZjFLnfOCfDwd4jF4RljJKT0oQaw8-NC9OHc_7Qb2AALYMsL4jRYgI3ZuP9rIhOTa9Q5G6lqRyErfZHep8lGv7JcObDN0S4wNo8hF8mq5bc41XjoHisDpOo66TAdsrytcHzN0VBnNgi6aHI1SPSe5Tq1orLVIklF3wjNW_VFbZPlx8mMFKJbq9rt2UNGRucmhWkSi1VwetYifjb83Uff8dIGlD6ogZeWHr4xmYJ6DqEVww6XHgPYWZ_9FfDEu16ZGpDy5RghEJHsoJAfmHbrg/430/z87fmd-SS1SvHFWQIWEfIQ/h0/08xwro43vZwRUKxKd_2qjRQ-V7nUvHqswOFlhAl8hgE)
7 Directions of Service is committed to advancing racial equity at the local level and equipping local leaders to change policies, practices, and procedures that promote healing and repair harm caused in their cities, towns, and villages.
**Sign up here:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRNYw5iXWCqDyl_0znqKMfuujnBhA-uduC1SR50UwpDMqGEkkEMbyBwuMx-mWGKmEx34pp5HJ3NPVYJ6fvBnBck1Nzxj6wvV1nkhmWQjQstBJG6XhB0IUc_omCcbYOlHZ1EpFMp6GyE45eLu2ILW7N6Qx-saNmqPFKiGPNyiNb1-XrUrfzdnz98DRCce_VZaCS9aeqzFqlfwhuCOmzCt2csy5e_kJSZt9_VPRpzGsrel0dmpo1DjhrpEkmyhxLZirn_TtKRSefY3-0Ay_Q8ZYRykeG_DrITcQO4e7scfVeDulFaL_L4vUQ1CSe9o8OGn21rGzE45LyHzwmXWTFPREK1YWUi0LDalaA_Nuzo-Eqt6VZiy_zpG27FlDRsn6eyHkSumgc8tTxCMyqLmify6V0FORE7D3jKeyEXn39JG8fmWs2ryp6iOv27XqhCXhizGyLA/430/z87fmd-SS1SvHFWQIWEfIQ/h1/xK0MXwo1Zh1BX9h_SjYOlUWQcBYIFMbFoR-iQO-VoiI) We cannot achieve racial healing if we do not account for the history of violence and oppression toward Indigenous Peoples. The following section is intended to provide context for the terms used throughout this guide and support the reader in engaging with Indigenous communities with dignity and respect. Sincerely, Crystal and Jason **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7TKvk3e5Qshi__SR-U6EQIkhf-sIMB46Zm7ZgQxtpZRpu-HnH7GuDcrNSbrPOOfsK9kagHryznzS6K-RDNk5HE7SR7d9Kdsj6Sf7MwLOogLxdrp6kBpLpity-RvcTD2Vde-pTbva4_n3F25rZkuVWJaV9zQitJB_JlKgj984XAGCtEwKX_GLM8ZznxIs_sVOWseoKMzbq_d4uBunGnYkv1SH_XWTnjyU-4hK19kGYEGorQ0jkI9u9cZSlMJyKR_fRgkNI8GOeDgsMNr6nYKKhphtT-P83mLfUNbQYCeh-7PjV2-QjCbAqKdxVErKIo7FC4pzxq7Sx8axotxv9AoHMnzjcUkJVf3lEkWtHrpLg6V-sAxfuPBhg9JNNbcOyG1OefOXPDz3kBg_mTdu5tkJjnZwb0DYuthEJhIGM0Z4gIJ4ZtaaO4DpYb4w2DdUMoeTho/430/z87fmd-SS1SvHFWQIWEfIQ/h2/HwDHUdu4wLXAnunoS0Dw442Y-eVvE9vgSPHV-mI1BSY)

clean_body: The National Day of Racial Healing is a time to contemplate our shared values and create the blueprint together for #HowWeHeal from the effects of racism. Launched in 2017, it is an opportunity to unite ALL people in their common humanity and inspire coll | | | Dear Friends, Supporters and Allies, Many of you have been on this journey with us to fight against environmental harm across North Carolina, Virginia, and West Virginia. We want to take it further and help people understand the underlying issues affecting our Southeast United States' indigenous communities. Join Jason and me for CONVERSATIONS AROUND RACIAL EQUITY and the system of racism, which commonly omits the attempted genocide, continued struggle, and present-day culture and communities of Indigenous Peoples and Tribal Nations. Click on the video to see our invitation! 7 Directions of Service is committed to advancing racial equity at the local level and equipping local leaders to change policies, practices, and procedures that promote healing and repair harm caused in their cities, towns, and villages. Sign up here: We cannot achieve racial healing if we do not account for the history of violence and oppression toward Indigenous Peoples. The following section is intended to provide context for the terms used throughout this guide and support the reader in engaging with Indigenous communities with dignity and respect. Sincerely, Crystal and Jason | | | | Sent via Action Network, a free online toolset anyone can use to organize. and get started building an email list and creating online actions today. ---|--- Action Network is an open platform that empowers individuals and groups to organize for progressive causes. | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. TrumpRe: 2023 -- a dark year for America
---
Dear Patriot,

---
With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in **just DAYS** , I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year – _one of the darkest years in American history_.
---
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much _[_GREAT AGAIN!_](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0fd6f07a898948aa83dde9667ddab08b&_e=0szDV4ts1SogVYQ_3evzbxtNSd3gEjMJrOAMgcvVH5tSCJjQQ4J-GcFOXClak-HusPM8Sec60HO4eJGbUPsCYifIuNwdoUlZJNeI4vMas3hWsU9NtuvDWuuanb1qSs_n1czUeS1pRyM1AUQL1MSnD2YYMh4E-lYH6ZnGeIA8qEdlS2ZHNgV83b-8yVIyqgTHSv3eQplimMdnYHPP7dh-i646VHVTN-vWFXMJCiOxTGBBkeLq4TtnJ4scqfarEYv5qwR2LgIjCgBlOFGQ6Ee0PRIbJPQyjiFQLQGG9V0ZY261pQXgUuV8My4TtP6V1NuhCGctiD2mWwojMB0MxuOuOVNdBTCexxqlVEUb8QCgysCtRIEgh38fgYFx6FK2UDDE_E4HCYgvLM1j3t7W1EQaZsdNU7INxpxzodbBGcYvNQbkToYZh41_WvxbZT-ArSW4CMH2CbYO-STqs63kuFy_AHKvtTiW32ozHwk3g1zctF15PCbk4_5PV2f05nmaXjrQkLx9xBqDoRnPAEBjS-FCMhWBYzar0fI6KVBtM2TSsuv41mpdx3GaJvy5SmUYM7CcLomCDZf3Y1z5TNIM5Mv4_nWOtSGwfG0gulIaffNw1nI%3D)_
---
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, _that_ is the ultimate crime.
---
**In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the _leading_ 2024 presidential candidate (_yours truly_) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the _“corporate death penalty”_ against me and my family. **
---
It might be hard to believe given what you’ve witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...
---
_...Even the media said nice things about me!_
---
But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
---
I chose _**YOU**_**** –[ the _PEOPLE!_](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0fd6f07a898948aa83dde9667ddab08b&_e=0szDV4ts1SogVYQ_3evzbxtNSd3gEjMJrOAMgcvVH5tSCJjQQ4J-GcFOXClak-HusPM8Sec60HO4eJGbUPsCYifIuNwdoUlZJNeI4vMas3hWsU9NtuvDWuuanb1qSs_n1czUeS1pRyM1AUQL1MSnD2YYMh4E-lYH6ZnGeIA8qEdlS2ZHNgV83b-8yVIyqgTHSv3eQplimMdnYHPP7dh-i646VHVTN-vWFXMJCiOxTGBBkeLq4TtnJ4scqfarEYv5qwR2LgIjCgBlOFGQ6Ee0PRIbJPQyjiFQLQGG9V0ZY261pQXgUuV8My4TtP6V1NuhCGctiD2mWwojMB0MxuOuOVNdBTCexxqlVEUb8QCgysCtRIEgh38fgYFx6FK2UDDE_E4HCYgvLM1j3t7W1EQaZsdNU7INxpxzodbBGcYvNQbkToYZh41_WvxbZT-ArSW4CMH2CbYO-STqs63kuFy_AJ0HsZGDqYt1Mtvo0Gw9lGmZm3zGNzEdN-pGFUIXTk5uj_BhUTv6fj9CZ7Xl0M91MCqgBsOjL-m6PEJSFtQeRDlUneI-lh7TP_uDuYAPQ-Mc4aenLWum1epkj_U-QugRhmTBEzt8AYB7ltLYdE68BSw%3D)__
---
I chose to put _AMERICA_ FIRST.
---
| [JOIN US! 🇺🇸 >>](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0fd6f07a898948aa83dde9667ddab08b&_e=0szDV4ts1SogVYQ_3evzbxtNSd3gEjMJrOAMgcvVH5tSCJjQQ4J-GcFOXClak-HusPM8Sec60HO4eJGbUPsCYifIuNwdoUlZJNeI4vMas3hWsU9NtuvDWuuanb1qSs_n1czUeS1pRyM1AUQL1MSnD2YYMh4E-lYH6ZnGeIA8qEdlS2ZHNgV83b-8yVIyqgTHSv3eQplimMdnYHPP7dh-i646VHVTN-vWFXMJCiOxTGBBkeLq4TtnJ4scqfarEYv5qwR2LgIjCgBlOFGQ6Ee0PRIbJPQyjiFQLQGG9V0ZY261pQXgUuV8My4TtP6V1NuhCGctiD2mWwojMB0MxuOuOVNdBTCexxqlVEUb8QCgysCtRIEgh38fgYFx6FK2UDDE_E4HCYgvLM1j3t7W1EQaZsdNU7INxpxzodbBGcYvNQbkToYZh41_WvxbZT-ArSW4CMH2CbYO-STqs63kuFy_AH-PmJk2iSrJAzvWUwe82NyKUmztK8DVqwJboCjspPaXTB96dsVO9gHLcfe6azqaB30rTAvWQ3QUU_s0ggoGT6-4OGVcqNmX21Wo8q3NtukesA34Mzq-Kmwo31-RNM82qDzRKjG2BxGGxs4vXZ8kUlE%3D)
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
---
And if I could go back and do it all over again, _I wouldn’t have it any other way!_
---
**Remember, they’re not really coming after me, Patriot, they’re coming after** _**YOU**_**. I’m just standing in their way – ****_and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way._**
---
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of _**LEGAL**_****_**WARFARE**_ imaginable to try and stop us.
---
**But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to their tyranny!**
---
_And I know that patriots like YOU won’t either..._
---

body:
In a twist that’s shaking Illinois politics, a group of local voters has launched a jaw-dropping challenge. It's a full-blown constitutional showdown!

Illinois Voters Launch Unprecedented Attack on Biden’s Presidential Run (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/illinois-voters-launch-unprecedented-attack-on-bidens-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c5b2061270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

By Illinois Review

In a significant move that may impact the 2024 presidential primary in Illinois, Beth Findley Smith, an Illinois voter and LaSalle County’s District 4 board member, has spearheaded a legal challenge to remove President Joe Biden from the state ballot. This objection, rooted deeply in the adherence to state-specific legal requirements, highlights a meticulous approach to election law and underscores the importance of every detail in the electoral process.
CLICK TO READ THE FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/illinois-voters-launch-unprecedented-attack-on-bidens-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c5b2061270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Exclusive Statement from the Challenger:

"In the heartland of democracy, every detail matters. My objection to Joseph R. Biden, Jr.’s candidacy in the Illinois primary election is rooted in a commitment to the integrity of our electoral process. A Statement of Candidacy, a fundamental document in his Nomination Papers, should bear the stamp of our local trust – notarized by a Notary Public commissioned by the State of Illinois. We must ensure that every candidate upholds the standards set by our great state. Let this objection stand as a testament to our unwavering dedication to the principles that safeguard the essence of fair and transparent elections in Illinois.”

Beth Findley Smith

It's a full-blown constitutional showdown! view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By Illinois Voters Launch Unprecedented Attack on Biden’s Presidential Run () By Illinois Review In a significant move that may impact the 2024 presidential primary in Illinois, Beth Findley Smith, an Illinois voter and LaSalle County’s District 4 board member, has spearheaded a legal challenge to remove President Joe Biden from the state ballot. This objection, rooted deeply in the adherence to state-specific legal requirements, highlights a meticulous approach to election law and underscores the importance of every detail in the electoral process. CLICK TO READ THE FULL ARTICLE () Exclusive Statement from the Challenger: "In the heartland of democracy, every detail matters. My objection to Joseph R. Biden, Jr.’s candidacy in the Illinois primary election is rooted in a commitment to the integrity of our electoral process. A Statement of Candidacy, a fundamental document in his Nomination Papers, should bear the stamp of our local trust – notarized by a Notary Public commissioned by the State of Illinois. We must ensure that every candidate upholds the standards set by our great state. Let this objection stand as a testament to our unwavering dedication to the principles that safeguard the essence of fair and transparent elections in Illinois.” Beth Findley Smith CLICK TO READ THE FULL ARTICLE () Copyright © 2023 IR Media Corp., all rights reserved. # **[80 Christians die after being displaced by violence in Manipur](http://trk.libertyledger.-zyPcXSCA)**
---
Tens of thousands of Christians from the Kuki-Zo tribal community in India’s northeastern state of Manipur continue to be displaced, more than eight months after the onset of ongoing violence. name: South Bay CRA
subject: South Bay CRA Meeting Jan 22nd
body:
Jan 22nd Meeting News Friends, As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attenti
| |
---
|
---
# Jan 22nd Meeting
---
---
|
---
# News
Friends,
As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attention and active participation. The forthcoming weeks mark the commencement of a journey that will shape the course of our community's future.
In just a matter of weeks, ballots will be distributed, empowering each of us to exercise our fundamental democratic right. To enhance your decision-making process, we invite you to a critical event on the 22nd of this month, where local and state-wide candidates will gather to share their visions, values, and commitments.
This is not just an event; it is an opportunity for you to engage directly with those who aspire to lead and represent us. Your presence at this candidate event is paramount. Don't miss this chance to become an informed and active participant in the democratic process that defines our shared future.
Let us unite in the pursuit of a community strengthened by the collective voice of its constituents. Your attendance on the 22nd will play a crucial role in shaping the narrative of the upcoming election.
We look forward to your participation and the vibrant exchange of ideas that will undoubtedly ensue.
Sincerely,
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
In addition please see the press release statement from my husband Derrick Gates below.
## These Candidates and More
---
|
---
## We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
---
## A message from Derrick Gates
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State Party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[Click for officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/4872?id=61277.107.1.ede01d94b3a0b83307d186e26df42a9c)

|

## Jan 22nd
---
|
---
I trust this message finds you well. I am excited to announce my participation, alongside numerous local and state candidates, in an upcoming event at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd.
As we stand on the brink of the 2024 election, the urgency of the times cannot be overstated. In just a matter of weeks, the primary election ballots will be distributed, marking the commencement of a crucial chapter in our democratic journey.
This event serves as a unique opportunity for you to engage directly with the candidates who seek to represent you at various levels of government. Your presence is not merely requested; it is imperative. Don't miss this chance to witness firsthand the perspectives and visions that will shape our community's trajectory.
Join us at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd as we collectively embark on a journey towards a future defined by informed and active civic participation. Together, let us contribute to the vitality of our democratic process.
I am looking forward to your attendance at this significant event.
We are currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
The door opens at 6:30 pm Meeting starts at 6:45

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Winners!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Fund
body:
Dear Patriot,
I can't tell you how grateful I am for all the support we received as we closed the year and hit our fundraising goal.
My campaign has also notified the winners of the range day and the AKG Warfighter - they have my personal thanks.
All of you have put this campaign in a great position to defeat my opponent, Republican Tony Gonzales, in the Republican Primary here in Texas in the March 5th primary.
However, we still have to raise $300,000 before February 15 to be able to fund our campaign in one of the largest districts in the country. So please help us reach that goal by donating at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/HS4x3qLoRuFPpg2aiELfOg/5dThBXWNbfuoucOgR7Qfvg).
**And in order to show my gratitude, I 'll be offering another one of my favorite personal firearms as an extra incentive: a beautiful AKG Built Tantal AK-47 in 5.45 (see the photo below). Every $5 you donate will earn you one entry to win; $20 gets you 4 entries, $100 gets you 20 entries, etc. **
By helping our campaign, you'll be taking an active role in replacing a Republican who too often votes like a Democrat and replacing him with a Constitutional Conservative.
Hard to believe, by my "Republican" opponent Tony Gonzales:
* Voted for Biden's vaccine tracking bill to create a federal database of who has and hasn't taken the COVID vaccine.

* Voted for Biden's gun control bill that funds red-flag laws and denies gun rights to veterans who've put their lives on the line defending our freedoms.

* Fought common-sense Republican legislation to secure the border and restore President Trump's "remain in Mexico" policy.

* Joined Nancy Pelosi and every Democrat in Congress to vote for the January 6th Commission-- and now Democrats are using the lies dug up by the Capitol Hill hearings to unconstitutionally kick Trump off the ballot around the country.

Together, we can change this.
Please, chip in what you can at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/HS4x3qLoRuFPpg2aiELfOg/5dThBXWNbfuoucOgR7Qfvg) to help me retire Tony Gonzales.
Thank you,

Brandon Herrera
PS: Every $5 you donate gets you one chance to win my AKG Built Tantal AK-47. Please contribute today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/HS4x3qLoRuFPpg2aiELfOg/5dThBXWNbfuoucOgR7Qfvg).

PPS: You can also sign up to volunteer - especially if you live in the district: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Volunteer](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/Lkzo5892yEoAPVUOByTfr5aw/5dThBXWNbfuoucOgR7Qfvg).

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Fund.
---

[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/5dThBXWNbfuoucOgR7Qfvg)

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Mark Has Strong Community Ties!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
He Knows The People of the First Congressional District of Nevada!
| | | |
---
# Strong Community Ties
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
Members of the House of Representatives represent THE PEOPLE of their respective districts. Therefore, they must have deep ties to the people of their district to know how to represent them best.
Currently, four Republican candidates are running for Nevada's First Congressional District. If you want to know who politicians will be loyal to, FOLLOW THE MONEY. Over 95% of contributions to my Primary campaign come from Nevadans. One of my competitors, who moved here from California and still operates steak restaurants there, received most of his contributions from people in California. Compare each candidate's ties to the community. Here are mine:
---
| | Local small business owner
---
| | Located in Henderson, we helped individuals, families, and small business owners set and reach financial goals. Serving widows, blue-collar workers, school teachers, hotel service workers, and anyone else who needed financial planning. For more than two decades, I got to know thousands of Nevadans on a very personal level.
---
| | Treasurer for the Salvation Army
---
| | Helped with the finances of the local branch of the Salvation Army, serving poor and needy families in the Community.
---
| | Assistant Professor at UNLV
---
| | Taught senior-level finance courses to students in the Hospitality College. Also taught leadership and military science to ROTC cadets.
---
| | Director of Supply Chain Management at Nevada Power
---
| | Led a department of more than 100 people, including purchasing, contracting, warehouse, and small business development. Won national recognition for our efforts to support local small businesses.
---
| | Member of Chambers of Commerce
---
| | Participated in the Las Vegas, Henderson, and Latin Chambers of Commerce, working with other small business owners to strengthen our local economy.
---
| | Youth sports coach
---
| | Coached Little League, soccer, and basketball through Henderson Recreation.
---
| | Scout Master
---
| | Taught boys and young men to become good citizens in the family, community, and nation.
---
| | Vice Chair, Senior Citizen Commission
---
| | Provided a voice for senior citizens living in Henderson. The Commission met regularly with city leaders and officials to help them understand the needs and desires of our senior community.
---
| | Church leader
---
| | Served as a youth pastor, Sunday School teacher, and Bishop for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints.
---
| | Board member of Opportunity Village
---
| | Provided vocational training and employment opportunities for mentally challenged adults and children.
---
| | Substitute teacher
---
| | As a licensed teacher, taught elementary and high school students in CCSD and charter schools.
---
| | Vice Chair, Vietnamese American Association
---
| | Worked with the Vietnamese and other Asian communities in Southern Nevada to bring awareness of their rich cultural heritage and contributions to our communities.
---
| | Member of veteran organizations
---
| | Meet with fellow military Veterans in local chapters of The Veterans of Foreign Wars (VFW), the American Legion, and the Military Officers Association of America.
---
| Compare my community ties with any other candidate in the race. I know the people of my district because I have worked, worshipped, lived, played, and served with them for over 32 years. I am loyal to you because you are my family, friends, and neighbors.
Mark Robertson
---
| *******

Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: We are a faith-based, Christ-centered organization that believes in our Constitution and family values, so our driving force is our faith and service to God. What is your driving force in regards to how you intend to serve in the capacity for which you are seeking election? -J.S. A. My driving force in running for Congress is a deep desire to serve and represent the people of Nevada's First Congressional District. The President represents the entire country, and U.S. Senators represent their States. It is the House of Representatives that represents the people. I want to do all I can to make a smaller government work for the people in my community. I want to free people from overburdening regulations. That being said, God is first in my life. I follow the admonition of Jesus Christ when he said: "Seek ye first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things shall be added unto you." (Matt. 6:33) I have "put my hand to the plow and will not look back." (Luke 9:62)
Q. What is your position on "School Choice"? -K.H. A. Parents should have the right to choose which education option is best for their children, and education dollars should follow the child. There is nothing in the U.S. Constitution that says that the Federal government should have any role in schools. Education decisions should be made as close to the child as possible (preferably by the parents), not by bureaucrats in Washington, D.C. I will support eliminating the U.S. Department of Education and block granting the $86 billion they spend each year back to the States in the form of vouchers that parents can use to choose the best school for their children.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---
| | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GFjyDyVMjFeesnMwN_xFYlFrX8r3vh3WvYrg30WgavOuj7io1KdhfI_EVhjtRYlWJs5GKjljK1_w1NH8fla_h3xWrEBIc5MKkA8uB7rUnERYrQpdMcghiocUiaJQ6NP5oTUzP1viZNlGqBszIJsR8SN-er5Kforg&c=LN1rG4kyu-bgyInMrUadfzGZK8K0VBxlRfMw8rnzjlq2ia3b3Wro_A==&ch=7V3bD6xCru0b5UHN_dzZUvLBYQ9PeyFGF757Vsejuap31BCcyauMBQ==)
---
| | [Click here to schedule a phone call with Mark](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GFjyDyVMjFeesnMwN_xFYlFrX8r3vh3WvYrg30WgavOuj7io1KdhfGzhw7Q4hCsNYeGejgM-RdIz3c4p5FherB7QfXik-_d4RUQ6ciiWsxdWL4Td7YJn6wQE7W9BOQ9cM93wiAEiobDA8qlpqxW1NKIB4_pFz1fLWQBgacIokf3DsvC1gCJ4E6t7DGgOeZ4G9V3AUGGlFLw=&c=LN1rG4kyu-bgyInMrUadfzGZK8K0VBxlRfMw8rnzjlq2ia3b3Wro_A==&ch=7V3bD6xCru0b5UHN_dzZUvLBYQ9PeyFGF757Vsejuap31BCcyauMBQ==)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: Héébe and hohóu (hello & thank you in Arapaho)
body:
Supporters of Jesse James Mullen for Secretary of State receive a special message from the creator of "Never Whistle at Night" | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/hbe-and-hohu-hellothank-youin-arapaho?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=6b5b0c66c7&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James Mullen.
I’m following up on our first book club release, “Never Whistle at Night,” compiled by editor Shane Hawk.
I talked to Shane earlier today, and he wants to share a message with you:
**Héébe and hohóu** (hello & thank you in Arapaho) for reading our stories in Never Whistle at Night. We really hope you enjoyed them despite the dark subject matter and emotions throughout. The anthology was introduced by Stephen Graham Jones who, despite growing up in West Texas, has his people's stamp in the heart of Northern Montana—the Blackfeet Nation. We are now living in a time where mainstream America is interested in Indigenous stories told by Indigenous peoples. Historically, we've had others speak over us or for us, but now our voices have honest ears listening. Heetce'noohobe3enee.-Shane Hawk

Thank you, Shane, for the kind words.
Shane and I discussed the importance of protecting Montana’s voice. Voting is one of the easiest ways to ensure your voice is heard. Please reach out to like-minded Montanans and encourage them to visit [jessejamesmullen.com](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=a15e44e38f&e=805e709ff8) and register to vote!
Don’t forget that MAGA Secretary of State Christi Jacobsen has a big head start, with an almost five-to-one fundraising lead as an incumbent candidate with party support.
We don’t have a primary opponent, but the Montana Democratic Party won’t support us financially until June. That gives the far-right a massive head start.
We’re running a small, smart campaign with on-the-ground support. We’re getting more earned media and ranking higher in searches, and we’re doing it on a shoestring budget.
[Imagine what we can do if we have even half of her resources.](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=5a49e6108a&e=805e709ff8)
[Will you help me catch her by chipping in a few bucks now?](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=474f39e40b&e=805e709ff8)
If you can, please contact your county Democratic Committee and MTDems to encourage them to support their candidates before the GOP lead gets even bigger!
– Jesse James Mullen
| [DONATE HERE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=2388cc72e7&e=805e709ff8)
---
|
---
# Endorsed By
| | | [](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c64f01ef3f&e=805e709ff8)
---
_Copyright (C) 2024 Mullen for Secretary of State. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Mullen for Secretary of State PO Box 811 Deer Lodge, MT 59722-0811 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e5274d80e6&e=805e709ff8&c=49012b9564) or [unsubscribe](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e5274d80e6&e=805e709ff8&c=49012b9564)
|
---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: What a ride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The road to the Iowa Caucuses has been long and winding, but together, we've made it. I have a note to share ahead of this evening.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---
Hey Friend, Today is the day of the Iowa Caucuses--the most important day our campaign has faced yet. With just hours to go before the first votes start to take place,**I wanted to send over my recollection of the days that got us here.** Thinking back, I wouldn't be where I am today if it weren't for the incredible outpouring of support that the launch of our campaign was met with.
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---

When we first started, the American people made it clear that they were ready for a change and willing to fight for one. We've been underestimated initially, but we haven't let our voices be silenced.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---
Since our earliest days, we haven't slowed down, and we haven't let up. We have been determined to outcampaign every candidate at every turn and reach as many Americans as possible. That's why we made it to every single one of Iowa's 99 counties ahead of **today.**
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---

We haven't just reached people in person. We've taken our message to every news outlet from Fox, to CNN, to MSNBC, to countless others by participating in interviews, roundtable discussions, debates, town halls, etc... We haven't left one stone unturned.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---

Along the way, we've earned some major endorsements, such as Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds', Congressman Chip Roy's, Congressman Thomas Massie's, and the list goes on with state, local, and evangelical leaders up and down the country.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---
Friend, no one expected us to have the momentum that we do, and none of it would have been possible without you. You are the reason we are going to shock the nation with our support at the caucuses today. **We don't have much time before voting begins for the first time in the 2024 presidential cycle, and this is the moment for all of our hard work to pay off.** _With your support, our momentum can be stronger than ever as Iowans head to their caucuses. They need to see that they won't be fighting alone, and I need your help with that._ Everything has led up to THIS MOMENT. So friend, I am asking you to step up one last time before caucusing begins. **[Can you send in just $10, $15, or $25 in the next 9 hours?](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)** This is our time for choosing. Tonight, our Great American Comeback can begin to take shape, but it all depends on how much we're willing to fight for it.

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=db0a1cf140df4c0d8fe11533506aa1c8c626bc0994005c1b0c97755fe4d42e387920ac0d4c2d81df368a08b9a87e254cd967b1b1c9150899)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

| | | | | Peter, I won’t beat around the bush. [Can you pitch in three bucks to fuel my people-powered reelection campaign? Your gift will be split between Blue Amp Action and my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T901f3275-4c48-4b43-bf0b-3fe40d06b7dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE $3 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e5cca33-4884-4c12-a0f2-e0d5e084d383/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This might surprise you, but $3 goes a long way toward winning this race. That’s because we’re powered by folks just like you and I’m damn proud of that. I don’t answer to super PACs or special interests. We’ve got what it takes to defeat Mitch McConnell and his cronies, but the truth is that they’re already pouring truckloads of money to defeat me. They’re trying to turn me into something I’m not, because they can’t beat who I am. I’m a farmer. I’m a senator. And I’m a Montanan til I die. I’ve never let my time in Washington change me. I’m not about to start now. [If every person reading this email chipped in $3 today, we would get ahead on our fundraising goals for the month and kick off the election year swinging. So I need to ask you: Will you support our grassroots-funded campaign and split a donation today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68b0898d-9ee2-4e3e-b47d-ff1440e3b510/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tead25ed9-6213-4c34-a742-a185de26fc30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Over 1[,000 flights were canceled](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAUhJ8Gd8eCE2ynoUhx3eUW2-x2FjGHmA0_ERCjffuVU285-jSj0fd5Xa7aeRfv_3UgVW1a9FrdTosAMQDKRXZGWSKkU0dKTHw44TQOU7cpa4WlUQi0xnI05xW5lOMw6RtJTcJ2TiFHyYUYBB_kMPZ41rdR39AQoZm4YJKTcTXl_ju5WDey_iftlPs1hc6rrdZnYacLw5nh3FrrQ4kHYzhThFdhONesd_IM50jtyEcdBOccXgWsd_etFlh1XMmTgTcN_gGN6EHRgHkR1ASFdsoEzcVKGUpNORxjOsPlIsJX_vfRZWWezXnvyjgxye9BO__-Wf-09hsAAP__OGtv8g) and 4,000 flights delayed over the weekend as subfreezing cold, winter storms, and strong winds battered much of the country, leaving millions under a winter weather advisory.

# MONDAY, JANUARY 15, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 2009, U.S. Airways pilot Chesley Sullenberger pulled off "The Miracle on the Hudson," safely putting his plane down in the Hudson River after a bird strike took out both engines. ([Hear Cockpit Recording](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7tuhDAQheGnsTuQPfjCFi7S0G3alMiXMUxkMAJno7x9ROqUR_p0pP_jOT89FdqXd7-ha7nOPjZ64Sw7qTtQs-LJZUTAgaOTVugBrNGWry5KE9Fr9QjejJAfWQajsk8gxphDsJwcCFBCSi2FVtr0MPpgfICECMkKyZTARK2e_Welva2Yy0994dnHuvHi1taOiw1vDCYG00XbUW5B-3IDBlNbsdvo9LFgV_funutXuurOYOKnS8c3lUKXsUyJZfNU_o7bv5m_AQAA__8TZVTl)) It was a frigid weekend, and temps are about to drop down into "_why do I live in this state, again?_ " territory--at least where The Editor resides. Do we have any Flyover readers who live in a tropical paradise and are trying not to laugh as you read about our frozen escapades?
