NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __ __

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Remembering Dr. King’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Dr. King Jr. and so many other civil rights leaders are why we have our voting rights today.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77103616/449390222/950179054?refcode=EM_C_240115MLK_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjkzMjU1Ny1hY2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ALaYmMUYts8kLqeKNsdLURcyLvgiTrxYAs-W3Vhwlyw=) Peter,

Reverend Martin Luther King Jr. was nothing short of a trailblazer for civil rights and justice for Black Americans. He and so many other civil rights leaders are why we have our voting rights today.

Now, those voting rights that civil rights leaders fought so hard for are under attack. **We must do everything to protect them** – especially as we enter this make-or-break election year. We must remain diligent to ensure that everyone has access to the ballot box.

So, as we commemorate Martin Luther King Jr. and the accomplishments of the Civil Rights Movement, let’s look forward to how we’ll protect our fundamental right to vote today and continue to bend the arc toward justice!

In solidarity,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: The legacy of Martin Luther King, Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
As we observe Martin Luther King Jr. Day, let’s take a moment to reflect on the enduring legacy of a remarkable leader who dedicated his life to the pursuit of justice, equality, and the dream of a better America.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77104574/449392904/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzY3MWU2ZC1hZWIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9i9KcYvj1m7meN_QVAV8O34nh6Gw6QOzmy2eUjluwy8=&emci=228e2523-8bb1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=0c671e6d-aeb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

As we observe Martin Luther King Jr. Day, I hope you take a moment to reflect on the enduring legacy of a remarkable leader.

Dr. King’s vision for a more inclusive and equitable society laid the foundation for progress in civil rights. Today, the work toward racial and economic justice is an ongoing journey that requires our collective action and commitment.

On this day, let’s recommit ourselves to the principles of justice, unity, and compassion. **Let’s honor Dr. King’s memory by actively participating in the ongoing fight for a world where everyone is treated with dignity and respect, regardless of their background.**

In our community and beyond, we can make a difference by standing up against injustice, promoting inclusivity, and working toward economic opportunities for all. Dr. King’s dream of a “beloved community” is something we can build together, step by step, day by day.

As we pay tribute to the extraordinary legacy of Martin Luther King, Jr., let’s also look ahead with hope and determination. **By joining forces, we can continue the journey toward a more just and equitable society.**

Wishing you a reflective and meaningful Martin Luther King Jr. Day,

Matt Cartwright

clean_body: As we observe Martin Luther King Jr. Day, let’s take a moment to reflect on the enduring legacy of a remarkable leader who dedicated his life to the pursuit of justice, equality, and the dream of a better America. | Peter, As we observe Martin Luther King Jr. Day, I hope you take a moment to reflect on the enduring legacy of a remarkable leader. Dr. King’s vision for a more inclusive and equitable society laid the foundation for progress in civil rights. Today, the work toward racial and economic justice is an ongoing journey that requires our collective action and commitment. On this day, let’s recommit ourselves to the principles of justice, unity, and compassion. Let’s honor Dr. King’s memory by actively participating in the ongoing fight for a world where everyone is treated with dignity and respect, regardless of their background. In our community and beyond, we can make a difference by standing up against injustice, promoting inclusivity, and working toward economic opportunities for all. Dr. King’s dream of a “beloved community” is something we can build together, step by step, day by day. As we pay tribute to the extraordinary legacy of Martin Luther King, Jr., let’s also look ahead with hope and determination. By joining forces, we can continue the journey toward a more just and equitable society. Wishing you a reflective and meaningful Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Matt Cartwright | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

subject: Becoming a Founding Donor

body:
This is what a true grassroots movement looks like — fighting for truth, justice, and our democracy.
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7627cd24-4613-4c04-8360-b141a63422a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter — We are officially in the election year, and it’s been just under a year since we launched this campaign for U.S. Senate. We’ve been steadfast in our commitment to fight for America’s democracy and build a better economy for everyone. But here’s the truth: none of this would have been possible without the help of this grassroots team. From holding Trump accountable through impeachment to my service on the January 6 Select Committee, you have consistently stood by my side. Your unwavering support, resilience in fighting back, commitment to speaking truth to power, and tireless dedication to our shared mission to ensure our government upholds the promise of this country have been pivotal. While we made significant strides this past year, the true challenge lies ahead. With two critical elections this year, your support is more important than ever. [So Peter, please continue to stay by me in our fight by contributing a split donation of $25 between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to become a 2024 Founding Donor today. Your support is essential in shaping a better future for our nation.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T978da9a7-05bc-4b12-91a1-7b1534f82afe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | The truth is that the fate of our democracy is in your hands. With Republican celebrity candidate Steve Garvey rising in the polls and Donald Trump leading in the presidential election polls, it’s clear that this election year is going to be a difficult one. But with the support of this team, I know we can rise to the occasion and meet the challenges that lie ahead. [If you can once again help this movement to uphold our democratic values, split a $25 donation today between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to become a 2024 Founding Donor to start the new year strong.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80b13681-893f-4fbb-bcf1-e4da288bb7d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9387ff1-ce1b-4582-911e-8ff2248e246e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Dr. King's commitment to nonviolent activism remains an enduring source of inspiration, guiding us in our ongoing pursuit of equality and social change.

| On this important day, we honor the extraordinary legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., celebrating his tireless advocacy for equality, justice, and civil rights. Dr. King's commitment to nonviolent activism remains an enduring source of inspiration, guiding us in our ongoing pursuit of equality and social change. As we observe Martin Luther King Jr. Day, let's reflect on his achievements and recommit to upholding his ideals. Let's engage in acts of service, fostering unity and understanding in our communities. May we be inspired to action, carrying forward Dr. King's vision of a society built on equality, justice, and love. Wishing you a meaningful Martin Luther King Jr. Day filled with reflection and renewed dedication to creating a better world. Warm regards,
Hillary
---

name: All On The Line
subject: Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Today, we remember him and his life’s work to secure equality for all
|
---

Friend,
Today, we remember Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. and his life's work: to secure equality for Black Americans in the face of relentless violence and discrimination.
And every day, we honor his legacy by recommitting to the fight for a more perfect democracy.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77104673/449393232/151085842?utm_source=2024015_AOTL_MLKDay_RedLite&refcode=2024015_AOTL_MLKDay_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NmUxYjczLWFlYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eAQCdiONinphLS05_yAlPV-SYhk2Ew-l32vlVWhC38c=&emci=ad85903d-90b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e46e1b73-aeb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=8431045)
---
All On The Line was founded to restore fairness to our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. We champion maps that ensure marginalized communities, especially communities of color that have historically been shut out of the democratic process, have a fair chance at choosing who they want to represent them in Congress and their statehouses.
**We’ll never stop fighting — because we know Dr. King’s vision of a more just and equitable union is possible.**
Just last year, the fair maps movement secured two historic victories at the U.S. Supreme Court: upholding our democratic system of checks and balances in _Moore v. Harper_ and preserving Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act in _Allen v. Milligan_.
Dr. King showed us that the contribution of a single person can make a positive difference to inspire and transform an entire nation. And team, we’re even stronger when we work together.
With critical elections happening across the country this fall, we have our work cut out for us — but we know that with you by our side, we can and will bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice.
Thank you for helping to strengthen democracy, today and every day.
\-- All On The Line

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

clean_body: Today, we remember him and his life’s work to secure equality for all | Friend, Today, we remember Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. and his life's work: to secure equality for Black Americans in the face of relentless violence and discrimination. And every day, we honor his legacy by recommitting to the fight for a more perfect democracy. All On The Line was founded to restore fairness to our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. We champion maps that ensure marginalized communities, especially communities of color that have historically been shut out of the democratic process, have a fair chance at choosing who they want to represent them in Congress and their statehouses. We’ll never stop fighting — because we know Dr. King’s vision of a more just and equitable union is possible. Just last year, the fair maps movement secured two historic victories at the U.S. Supreme Court: upholding our democratic system of checks and balances in Moore v. Harper and preserving Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act in Allen v. Milligan. Dr. King showed us that the contribution of a single person can make a positive difference to inspire and transform an entire nation. And team, we’re even stronger when we work together. With critical elections happening across the country this fall, we have our work cut out for us — but we know that with you by our side, we can and will bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice. Thank you for helping to strengthen democracy, today and every day. \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: Reminder to Come See Your Next Congresswoman!
body:
Upcoming Tour: Coming to a location near you! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bc53fc099b65/reminder-to-come-see-your-next-congresswoman-12673170?e=c982eb7ad4)
---

Peter

I'm extending a personal invitation to join me on my upcoming 2-week speaking tour across our great district, starting tomorrow Monday, Jan. 15th.

[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=5064e935f3&e=c982eb7ad4)
| [RSVP HERE]()
---

As I travel from San Antonio to El Paso, I'll be stopping at 11 locations along the way to share my vision for the future of Texas. I look forward to seeing you there, and am eager to hear your thoughts and insights on the issues that matter most to our community.
In this crucial race, our future hangs in the balance, and it's time for a change. Leaders like Tony Gonzales have lost sight of our values, prioritizing personal gain over the prosperity of our people. I am committed to being the leader who stands for what is right and restores our district to the prosperity we once knew.

Peter, will you answer the call, and stand with me at an event near you? Your support is vital as we work together to shape a better future for Texas.

| [RSVP HERE](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=13db764545&e=c982eb7ad4)

body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77104858/449393896/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240115_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMjhjN2IzLWFlYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H5FGDlu0w0IWBqG49JOxN-qQ-1MAhxB5WdpkejcbkNw=)
Peter,
A supporter at a Trump rally in Iowa asked him:
_**“I’m telling you. No man can endure what you’ve endured. Do you realize that God is behind you?”**_
[_**Before I show you Trump’s answer, can you help us respond with a $3 contribution split between Upset the Setup and my campaign? It will come as no surprise that he attacked me once again — he knows how effective I have been in holding him to account and doesn’t want me elected to the Senate — and he is doing all he can to stop me.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77104859/449393897/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240115_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMjhjN2IzLWFlYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H5FGDlu0w0IWBqG49JOxN-qQ-1MAhxB5WdpkejcbkNw=)
Here’s what Trump said:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77104860/449393925/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240115_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMjhjN2IzLWFlYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H5FGDlu0w0IWBqG49JOxN-qQ-1MAhxB5WdpkejcbkNw=)
_**“Now think of how bad these people were. A guy like Adam shifty Schiff, who is a real bad guy. I call him Pencil Neck because he has the smallest neck I’ve ever seen. He’s not gonna be playing for your local teams — Iowa, Iowa State, they’re not gonna be recruiting him to play football.”**_
Whether Trump is making petty personal insults or calling for my imprisonment, we can never let his demagogic attacks go unanswered.
Trump is attacking me because he knows I am effective, and because he fears what I can do as a Senator to stand up to the MAGA bullies.
Scared, because when I stood up to him, I secured the first bipartisan vote in history to impeach a sitting president.
Scared, because he knows I hold those who abuse their power accountable — whether it’s him, big corporations, or any other special interests that are rigging the rules and making life harder for working families. This pencil neck won’t break.
He’s scared of the grassroots coalition we’re building. A coalition that’s fighting for affordable housing. To save the planet. To build an economy that works for everyone.
A coalition that’s going to come together and win.
[_**Peter, please chip in $3 split between Upset the Setup and my campaign to help us respond to Trump’s attack before midnight tonight!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77104861/449393926/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240115_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMjhjN2IzLWFlYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H5FGDlu0w0IWBqG49JOxN-qQ-1MAhxB5WdpkejcbkNw=)

clean_body: = Peter, A supporter at a Trump rally in Iowa asked him: “I’m telling you. No man can endure what you’ve endured. Do you realize that God is behind you?” = Here’s what Trump said: = “Now think of how bad these people were. A guy like Adam shifty Schiff, who is a real bad guy. I call him Pencil Neck because he has the smallest neck I’ve ever seen. He’s not gonna be playing for your local teams — Iowa, Iowa State, they’re not gonna be recruiting him to play football.” Whether Trump is making petty personal insults or calling for my imprisonment, we can never let his demagogic attacks go unanswered. Trump is attacking me because he knows I am effective, and because he fears what I can do as a Senator to stand up to the MAGA bullies. Scared, because when I stood up to him, I secured the first bipartisan vote in history to impeach a sitting president. Scared, because he knows I hold those who abuse their power accountable — whether it’s him, big corporations, or any other special interests that are rigging the rules and making life harder for working families. This pencil neck won’t break. He’s scared of the grassroots coalition we’re building. A coalition that’s fighting for affordable housing. To save the planet. To build an economy that works for everyone. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Re: What a ride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
"The day of the Iowa Caucuses is here... It's been a long road to this moment, and I couldn't be more grateful that you've been on this journey with me." - Ron DeSantis
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---
Friend, Time is ticking away before the Iowa Caucuses begin and we need you more than ever. Ron DeSantis reached out this morning to share what's been so special about this campaign leading up to this moment. **[When you're done reading, will you consider leaving any generous donation that you can before this critical night kicks off?](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)** **_We want to show our supporters in Iowa that we can earn $50,000 by the end of the night to back them up as they head to the caucuses._** How we fight today will make a direct impact on where we go from here. **Ron DeSantis needs you right now.** \- Team DeSantis \--------Forwarded Message--------
From: [Ron DeSantis](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e392268f0c8077ea310415d3975a7764cc4fb111f45bf7cadd4521e274cce4c03b61da406119c53a473408ac8186db64754 "Ron DeSantis")
Subject: What a ride
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---
Hey Friend, Today is the day of the Iowa Caucuses--the most important day our campaign has faced yet. With just hours to go before the first votes start to take place,**I wanted to send over my recollection of the days that got us here.** Thinking back, I wouldn't be where I am today if it weren't for the incredible outpouring of support that the launch of our campaign was met with.
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---

When we first started, the American people made it clear that they were ready for a change and willing to fight for one. We've been underestimated initially, but we haven't let our voices be silenced.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---
Since our earliest days, we haven't slowed down, and we haven't let up. We have been determined to outcampaign every candidate at every turn and reach as many Americans as possible. That's why we made it to every single one of Iowa's 99 counties ahead of **today.**
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---

We haven't just reached people in person. We've taken our message to every news outlet from Fox, to CNN, to MSNBC, to countless others by participating in interviews, roundtable discussions, debates, town halls, etc. We haven't left one stone unturned.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---

Along the way, we've earned some major endorsements, such as Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds', Congressman Chip Roy's, Congressman Thomas Massie's, and the list goes on with state, local, and evangelical leaders up and down the country.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---
Friend, no one expected us to have the momentum that we do, and none of it would have been possible without you. You are the reason we are going to shock the nation with our support at the caucuses today. **We don't have much time before voting begins for the first time in the 2024 presidential cycle, and this is the moment for all of our hard work to pay off.** _With your support, our momentum can be stronger than ever as Iowans head to their caucuses. They need to see that they won't be fighting alone, and I need your help with that._ Everything has led up to THIS MOMENT. So friend, I am asking you to step up one last time before caucusing begins. **[Can you send in just $10, $15, or $25 in the next 9 hours?](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)** This is our time for choosing. Tonight, our Great American Comeback can begin to take shape, but it all depends on how much we're willing to fight for it.
---
| | [Send In Your Support Here](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---
**_Thank you for all you've done to get our team this far. I know I can count on you to help us go into this critical evening stronger than ever._** God bless,
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e399fc023134cd87bd76a68d68c1bdf698a6a918ea78fba13798c04439035755cbf21024d46f2e72be57d821d6940b826c3 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e396b13e0ea8899830865e83d94726bfc5cd34ca3ed9717b8a6d6a8b740b3dc766131e036df5c9af45fa26ed5eab5eac07c)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3a2c872c58906e3910808d75489600d640d1cce93b6e7e9346aab93fa159ed4c5b82405165d857c046910e356b377ca5681a488a86a5e2bd)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: John James
subject: THIS IS A NEW LOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
I’m disappointed but FAR from surprised.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkc8ag8kq2el6o1luhckucl79ntd60upmath98j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cpgmaoj1cdh2bs)
---
Democrats stooped to a new low... Friend, did you see that one of the corrupt liberal career politicians running for my seat DARKENED MY SKIN COLOR in a request for campaign donations? Democrats are coming at me in droves—and one of them, an indicted former judge (where do they find these characters?!), darkened my skin color in a pathetic attempt to fund his campaign. I’m disappointed but FAR from surprised. But what can you expect from another one of these hypocritical white liberals who is literally trying to defeat the only Black congressman from the State of Michigan? He just can’t stand the fact that I’m a Republican! body:
This is our 1776 moment.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=31e6acf761664a8ea816f7c111a16c46&_t=DtNRZodQuNm0idt5L9iaH0oH3u65YfEbc64-Sabhnw5RFeuaSreXw6xQu8R6Do05D2G5AS6jnhhC1bBP150yhHTwbfKMPE4p8RacGX_pnas%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=31e6acf761664a8ea816f7c111a16c46&_t=DtNRZodQuNm0idt5L9iaH0oH3u65YfEbc64-Sabhnw5RFeuaSreXw6xQu8R6Do05D2G5AS6jnhhC1bBP150yhHTwbfKMPE4p8RacGX_pnas%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=31e6acf761664a8ea816f7c111a16c46&_e=lkyht-ITcUCm_r6o-zhy3VM5riKsPwektyUp97032xOKFdJmRR7lN8PRiYnADLrnA9N89zfhcLFXbPw_8fWgRJWrM5e5vorpNKtPQVzZ-baI0w778oiXsjItNyuSJYJV9Be-K2pl4WkGdUmRSbcXb41q5KCDAQO5Jk-6kBWZ09cDBuBuQuF8rysx0udJsnAzsLePZ1OHIv47CgAHOiZdlr8vkED7T8czWy_wEjB-4R5IxAvQ15cMESkn0xDuV7QUOeTZiTpPE_-VhzFdRoS9FM4N54trrhOnWXhGQktB7VU1eONVy-dUidHlCzaJpFParnB310861b7J4oF0vT9KJrDBFI-DTKR4_c2mOhEd1GPCG57B-h4-h7i-G67QlC5-KZyJPrLo2bIHM4BUDdIrMg%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

**This is our 1776 moment.**

We are going to unify this country, from the overwhelming majority of us who love this country to the fringe minority who is hellbent on putting America last, by being uncompromising on who we are as Americans. **No state left behind. No city left behind. No American left behind.**

Free speech and open debate can no longer be a radical idea. Our national identity and pride are not too far gone. Our future generations need to see that their leaders are not partisan hacks but believers in the foundations of this country and what makes America the example of freedom worldwide.

Today, with you on my side, the Establishment can’t stop us. Today, faith, patriotism, and hard-work won’t be kept in the chokehold of the secular religions of race, sex, and climatism.

The Declaration of Independence of today is our declaration of independence from Communist China. If Thomas Jefferson were alive today, that is the Declaration of Independence he would sign. That is the Declaration of Independence I will sign if I am elected as your next president.

Today is the day we declare there are three branches of government, not four. Their rampant administrative bureaucracy is a formula for corruption.

[**Fellow American, today is the day our revolution will march on and show the Establishment we won’t bow to their culture of fear. Please consider a contribution today and shock the system with me!**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=31e6acf761664a8ea816f7c111a16c46&_e=lkyht-ITcUCm_r6o-zhy3VM5riKsPwektyUp97032xOKFdJmRR7lN8PRiYnADLrnA9N89zfhcLFXbPw_8fWgRJWrM5e5vorpNKtPQVzZ-baI0w778oiXsjItNyuSJYJV9Be-K2pl4WkGdUmRSbcXb41q5KCDAQO5Jk-6kBWZ09cDBuBuQuF8rysx0udJsnAzsLePZ1OHIv47CgAHOiZdlr8vkED7T8czWy_wEjB-4R5IxAvQ15cMESkn0xDuV7QUVD4nRHWMAwO-_ZtCsn-5CqtNtk-abEL3D4rD6e2_JGpKla70GBfbxvlIpEyiKGOdft6A8p9nfORdTGonzgTGfLI9H33fZU0hBef0ONKNdkCKo2FauekjVlySDl-SiYoIVRdk-Cxu07hQ-sPvSQlgsA%3D%3D)

For the revival of the American Dream,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** | Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This is our 1776 moment. | | Fellow American, This is our 1776 moment. We are going to unify this country, from the overwhelming majority of us who love this country to the fringe minority who is hellbent on putting America last, by being uncompromising on who we are as Americans. No state left behind. No city left behind. No American left behind. Free speech and open debate can no longer be a radical idea. Our national identity and pride are not too far gone. Our future generations need to see that their leaders are not partisan hacks but believers in the foundations of this country and what makes America the example of freedom worldwide. Today, with you on my side, the Establishment can’t stop us. Today, faith, patriotism, and hard-work won’t be kept in the chokehold of the secular religions of race, sex, and climatism. The Declaration of Independence of today is our declaration of independence from Communist China. If Thomas Jefferson were alive today, that is the Declaration of Independence he would sign. That is the Declaration of Independence I will sign if I am elected as your next president. Today is the day we declare there are three branches of government, not four. Their rampant administrative bureaucracy is a formula for corruption. For the revival of the American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: | Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. body:
They want to shut it down in the blink of an eye
| | [ ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c5b71946748e4dd0b75ecbcb01fb7633&_e=2oHlAc4Yfw-WacKt9R08ziweVkBaiOjuVG1O_WNEFi7De-gmIN1BsSsG2VEuju2GzEMFpeCyHesh9lSsXEmTvK-9tt8L1yvtm2_MlPf9vXACGII4LKoprZalQfLZ5VA5USDw-CPHuIFmjawIO3jWR1fuWvRipXQJFuFARMvkRCFj2BgcMLHCcjNEoa4uFkkOk34WeL2208EOE-KcrO8joodPBBKCblDSjc7SPvt3uiUE3QdVVfT49oZKy42M-HPVNT62RGm-Sp8ct0_IM0c86X2CQjFk7osQ1YjhOHqNl6R4-F3VhvDaagcyeMZypU3d)
---
Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming.
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c5b71946748e4dd0b75ecbcb01fb7633&_e=2oHlAc4Yfw-WacKt9R08ziweVkBaiOjuVG1O_WNEFi7De-gmIN1BsSsG2VEuju2GzEMFpeCyHesh9lSsXEmTvK-9tt8L1yvtm2_MlPf9vXACGII4LKoprZalQfLZ5VA5USDw-CPHuIFmjawIO3jWR1fuWvRipXQJFuFARMvkRCEqA4JC3ooIh0GPQqmuR3rWk3ACFNTLJgnmLeAiag-0Q1j42EeOBeAYQt4yZR5XQ_ZLW-ADh6inzqHc_gH_k50ccgtCeV1UnMWpy5rCgyLrsEFTGIBiDzrQHhO7f5Lkh0VVhq1kB9MRSSkGdgGF-Lys)
---
My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c5b71946748e4dd0b75ecbcb01fb7633&_e=2oHlAc4Yfw-WacKt9R08ziweVkBaiOjuVG1O_WNEFi7De-gmIN1BsSsG2VEuju2GzEMFpeCyHesh9lSsXEmTvK-9tt8L1yvtm2_MlPf9vXACGII4LKoprZalQfLZ5VA5USDw-CPHuIFmjawIO3jWR1fuWvRipXQJFuFARMvkRCHplMPrGF3okfVAKCh-o6I3hS3TCI_gaH2ZvDagnYlEdnxKx8cq_l_zRdt_-gtypq2ha97uMckgEvWovqb73M6DfXjA9-VkYe9ukOGedQ4NbN0D3EIZJi63hJSJdGBQmHziMzQBM0cvkFeRGxYAOrNf)
---
That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c5b71946748e4dd0b75ecbcb01fb7633&_e=2oHlAc4Yfw-WacKt9R08ziweVkBaiOjuVG1O_WNEFi7De-gmIN1BsSsG2VEuju2GzEMFpeCyHesh9lSsXEmTvK-9tt8L1yvtm2_MlPf9vXACGII4LKoprZalQfLZ5VA5USDw-CPHuIFmjawIO3jWR1fuWvRipXQJFuFARMvkRCHjnxj76dRRvIuYXQ5VJquv3dRL3oeNrVttgzhWtVZR93XjO6c7E1n19JMU_w_3GSgFE5G-R9tSVUE59MBcwErz2Gou4vZbp2z5y5u1UayjlFvlbZq2GjRJl1pIAgVZ90A2IrIYfSvuuygUngutHdI2)

subject: URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!
body:
URGENT! Ohio Liberator List! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8627c92b69&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
Happy New Year!

I’m sorry we haven’t communicated in quite a while. It’s been a busy few months for “self-governance” in Ohio. Issue 1 in August, another Issue 1 in November, and now a primary election just around the corner, which is the reason for this communication.

Many volunteers across Ohio are working to fix what we believe is wrong with the way we’re governed at the local, state, and national levels. But it all starts locally, because as the saying goes, “All politics is local.”

We have an opportunity with Ohio’s March 19th primary election to wrest control of both Ohio’s House of Representatives & the Ohio Republican Party from insider, corrupt, career politicians. But it won’t be easy, and we need your help. Please consider doing everything you can to lend a hand.

---
| | |
**THE OHIO “LIBERATOR LIST”

[www.liberatorlist.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6d1ac7fc97&e=5c740fa3e2)**

---
|
Myriad people involved in grassroots political activism across Ohio have built this list to make all Ohioans aware of candidates who aren't establishment & tend to be small-government, freedom-loving, America-loving, regular people. These candidate have stood up and are willing to contribute their time, talent, and/or treasure to run for office in hopes of fixing our badly broken communities, state & nation. They face an uphill battle against insider, establishment, money, a legacy corporate media that disrespects them, and the headwind of cancel culture degrading word-of-mouth support. You can see the list [HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a7a99d9654&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below. We pray this list will help in this battle against these obstacles. Please share it with everyone you can!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c417d94cb9&e=5c740fa3e2)

This list is not an endorsement of these candidates. We urge you to do your own homework & research these people. Where we can, we've linked to their web presence so you can click their names & start your exploration. Worst case, if you're pressed for time or can't drum up what's needed to do a deeper dive, we believe you can trust these candidates to do a good job of representing you. We believe they are the best candidates of those from whom you will be asked to choose on March 19, 2024, in Ohio's primary election.

---
| |
**HELP US PROMOTE THE "LIBERATOR LIST"**

---
|
If you like this idea please become part of our promotional army across Ohio to help us promote the "Liberator List". As we did with both Issue 1 ballot initiatives, we are promoting the “Liberator List” with magnetic car door signs, magnetic bumper stickers, and re-stickable bumper stickers.

The new twist here is we’ve made these generic so they can be used over and over for every election. The signs & stickers won’t change but the web page will! Invest in signs or stickers once & promote our movement many times!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4f630d998a&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Car Door Magnets (9" x 12")_

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1d13e22811&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Bumper Sticker (9" x 3") either magnetic or re-stickable_

Order yours by going **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=db6e35f966&e=5c740fa3e2)** or clicking on the images above. You will pay when you receive your order. There's no payment needed up-front.

Please don’t delay. Early voting starts February 21st!

Remember, we're just getting started. This effort will continue for every election!

Thank you!

---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=966bfc81b0&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2b945ac688&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=25aa41f85c&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita

clean_body: URGENT! Ohio Liberator List! | | | | Happy New Year! I’m sorry we haven’t communicated in quite a while. It’s been a busy few months for “self-governance” in Ohio. Issue 1 in August, another Issue 1 in November, and now a primary election just around the corner, which is the reason for this communication. Many volunteers across Ohio are working to fix what we believe is wrong with the way we’re governed at the local, state, and national levels. But it all starts locally, because as the saying goes, “All politics is local.” We have an opportunity with Ohio’s March 19th primary election to wrest control of both Ohio’s House of Representatives & the Ohio Republican Party from insider, corrupt, career politicians. But it won’t be easy, and we need your help. Please consider doing everything you can to lend a hand. | | | THE OHIO “LIBERATOR LIST” | Myriad people involved in grassroots political activism across Ohio have built this list to make all Ohioans aware of candidates who aren't establishment & tend to be small-government, freedom-loving, America-loving, regular people. These candidate have stood up and are willing to contribute their time, talent, and/or treasure to run for office in hopes of fixing our badly broken communities, state & nation. They face an uphill battle against insider, establishment, money, a legacy corporate media that disrespects them, and the headwind of cancel culture degrading word-of-mouth support. You can see the list or by clicking on the image below. We pray this list will help in this battle against these obstacles. Please share it with everyone you can! This list is not an endorsement of these candidates. We urge you to do your own homework & research these people. Where we can, we've linked to their web presence so you can click their names & start your exploration. Worst case, if you're pressed for time or can't drum up what's needed to do a deeper dive, we believe you can trust these candidates to do a good job of representing you. We believe they are the best candidates of those from whom you will be asked to choose on March 19, 2024, in Ohio's primary election. | | HELP US PROMOTE THE "LIBERATOR LIST" | If you like this idea please become part of our promotional army across Ohio to help us promote the "Liberator List". As we did with both Issue 1 ballot initiatives, we are promoting the “Liberator List” with magnetic car door signs, magnetic bumper stickers, and re-stickable bumper stickers. The new twist here is we’ve made these generic so they can be used over and over for every election. The signs & stickers won’t change but the web page will! Invest in signs or stickers once & promote our movement many times! Car Door Magnets (9" x 12") Bumper Sticker (9" x 3") either magnetic or re-stickable Order yours by going or clicking on the images above. You will pay when you receive your order. There's no payment needed up-front. Please don’t delay. Early voting starts February 21st! Remember, we're just getting started. This effort will continue for every election! Thank you! | | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Best regards, Mark Pukita A GFI Person mark@gfiohio.com 614-499-0599 (c) | | Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: MLK and the connection to your community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Dear Friend,
Today, we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., and the profound impact he and his vision had on our country. All around Michigan, it’s a day of reflection and recommitment to realizing America’s promise of a multi-racial, multi-ethnic democracy. And it’s also a day of service. I believe that service is the greatest love letter you can send your country – and no one exemplifies that more than Dr. King.
Most people don’t know that the March on Washington wasn’t actually the first time Dr. King gave his famous “I have a Dream” speech. He also gave that speech in Detroit in June 1963, when at least 125,000+ people marched along Woodward Avenue against segregation in the south and de-facto segregation in the north. It was hailed as a strong example of how protestors, government, and police could work together for a peaceful and powerful event.
Last summer, on the 60th anniversary of that march, the NAACP led the Freedom Walk along the same route, and thousands of us joined.
The March on Washington holds, with good reason, a significant place in the history books, but there were so many other important moments, like the Detroit Walk to Freedom, that served as proof of concept to help make the March on Washington the success that it was.
Detroit alone boasts 100 civil rights sites, with five sites on the National Register of Historic places, the **[Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2028?t=1&akid=1028%2E135344%2EKcDuJy)** , and an **[interactive Civil Rights sites bike tour](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2029?t=2&akid=1028%2E135344%2EKcDuJy).**
So today, in honor of Dr. King’s role, not just as a speaker but as an organizer, spend some time understanding the civil rights leaders from your own community who helped Dr. King’s movement. Google your community’s roles and leaders, make a plan to visit a local civil rights museum or monument, and generally take a moment to learn about the thousands of people and events that served as the scaffolding of the Civil Rights Movement – and who we may not have learned about in school.
Sincerely,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1028%2E135344%2EKcDuJy).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1028%2E135344%2EKcDuJy)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Reflecting on the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77108574/449406660/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFhM2FhMi1iMmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3DKXd4TJiB9JRDdBYDeCYrOvRc_DcS93dLtUVr4Hg8g=&emci=4a4c6d2b-94b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=dc1a3aa2-b2b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=11703046) Dear Peter,

Today, I hope you will join me in reflecting on the life and legacy of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

Dr. King devoted his life to the fight for a more equitable country – a country where everyone, regardless of race, religion, or background, could prosper and live free from discrimination. He accomplished so much in the pursuit of justice, equity, and opportunity—his legacy inspires the work we do every day to build a community more just for all of us.

**It is up to us to continue Dr. King’s fight for racial justice, economic advancement, voting rights, and equal opportunity for all, and I am honored to be in this fight with you, Peter.**

It is not lost on me that I stand on the shoulders of leaders like Dr. King, and I am proud to have taken the fight for justice and equality to the halls of Congress. As the first Black person ever elected to represent Ohio’s 13th Congressional District, I carry the names and legacies of those who came before me, and I work to open doors for those who will come after me.

Today, I hope you will join me in reaffirming our commitment to leading with love, serving our communities, fighting for justice, and creating a better nation for generations to come.

Yours In Service,

_Emilia_
---
| Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [EmiliaSykesForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77108575/449406662/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFhM2FhMi1iMmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3DKXd4TJiB9JRDdBYDeCYrOvRc_DcS93dLtUVr4Hg8g=&emci=4a4c6d2b-94b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=dc1a3aa2-b2b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=11703046)

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4dforuigkjb3hd9u37qbapu2kjb4raagt4om8j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cpgmaoj6cph2bs)
Dear Patriot,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96kv9i76f4nmmo9285oe2o79oh8r5u672n3kjio_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cpgmaoj6cph2bs) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmbif7e255sfknho7t7of47ff0ugpn109ajiq54o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cpgmaoj6cph2bs).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9666bj53b0r0u8d2vacuho6nc9ik3lhl717s5o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cpgmaoj6cph2bs)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zifhvc756rb24injp5enhg1jl6lsbkbbc6g4gs70_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cpgmaoj6cph2bs).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8rdgeh7c55k32aginm0f1f56k8a2p20p28g3ms8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cpgmaoj6cph2bs)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE
THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

---
| |

Fredericksburg, VA 22408

Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Hill Harper
subject: Honoring Dr. King’s legacy today and every day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Together we can continue to fight to carry on Dr. King’s legacy.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240115&t=1&akid=841%2E62735%2ENC4IA4)
Peter,
Today, as we honor the life and legacy of Dr. King, I can’t help but think of how his legacy, leadership, and sacrifice continues to motivate and guide me as I move through the world.
By running for U.S. Senate, I’m striving to fight for Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s ideals of social justice, economic equality, and a united community for Michigan.
His message during the iconic March on Washington continues to be a beacon for our campaign.
**Freedom shouldn’t be an aspiration but a reality for all.**
And that’s why we need our elected leaders to fight for the rights that MLK fought tirelessly to achieve. _I hope to one day be that representation for Michigan_.
**Together, let's carry the torch of Dr. King's legacy, making it a living, breathing reality in our policies and goals. Let's honor his memory by being the change we want to see.**
In solidarity,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240115&t=2&refcode2=841_62735_NC4IA4&akid=841%2E62735%2ENC4IA4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=841%2E62735%2ENC4IA4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=841%2E62735%2ENC4IA4)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Continuing the fight for justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Reaching out on Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Day

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77112405/449416073/-1268629450?refcode=em_msg_2024.01.15_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFhMjlkMy1iNmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OdPfiAucqvSWGcIZxVq39HWnZj9sHkWFw6Pe1k5RXc=&emci=b07eed76-b0b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d0aa29d3-b6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10283101)
---
Dear friend,

Today, we celebrate the life and work of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., and we recommit to fighting for the change and progress he dedicated his life to.

One of my favorite speeches Dr. King gave was to a group of high school students in Philadelphia. In his speech, the Reverend asked the students to think about their life’s blueprint, and he said:

_“Number one in your life’s blueprint should be a deep belief in your own dignity, your worth, and your own somebodiness. Always feel that you count. Always feel that you have worth, and always feel that your life has ultimate significance.”_

**As we see in Dr. King’s fight for equality, he truly lived every day believing not just in his own dignity, but in the dignity of his fellow Americans – regardless of race, class, or gender.** He believed in a future for our children where their worth would be recognized, their rights protected, and their freedom secured.

It is now up to us to continue the fight for a more just nation. And I’m honored to have you by my side in that fight.

Appreciate you,

_Greg_

name: Wes Moore
subject: Honoring Dr. King’s legacy
body:
Friend,

Out of all the wise words of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., one quote has stood out and guided my work throughout the years.

It reads:

“Philanthropy is commendable. But it must not cause the philanthropist to overlook the circumstances of economic injustice which make philanthropy necessary.”I keep this quote by my desk because Dr. King’s timeless words helped to serve as a lodestar to guide my focus as we continue the fight for what’s right.

Today is a reminder of the work that needs to be done to make good on Dr. King's dream by making it within reach for our families and communities, our most vulnerable and most neglected.

We must address the longstanding systems that hold people back and work together to create generational change to make sure every Marylander has the opportunity to succeed.

As we reflect on Dr. King’s legacy today, remember his message that doing what is commendable is not enough. Removing the barriers to justice is our life’s work. Not just today, but every day.

Elevate,

Wes Moore

---

name: Election Day Alert [via Team Haley]
subject: ARE YOU READY?
body:
IT’S CAUCUS DAY!

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680333%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2ff3rvLJDNsMBAqZLZls13w&sysid=1)
---

Friend, ARE YOU READY?

THIS IS IT.

THIS IS GO TIME.

At 7 PM TONIGHT, Iowans will get out to caucus for Nikki.

We have a **few hours** until the caucuses begin.

That means we have a **few hours** left to amplify Nikki’s message across Iowa.

We have a **few hours** left to change the minds of undecided voters.

We have a **few hours** left to get out the vote and take one step closer to victory.

**[Chip $5 or more NOW to support Nikki and let’s do this!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=idjMaaRq07twxLBvkxtuow&sysid=1 "Chip $5 or more NOW to
support Nikki and let’s do this! ")**
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680345%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4rg1dQ0gIsGk%2f09ANJdK2w&sysid=1)
---

We have been pouring our ALL into this movement over the last 11 months to get to this point.

**NOW IS THE MOMENT** we have worked so hard for.

But we **CANNOT** let the momentum slip with just hours to go until the first votes take place.

_That’s why we need**YOUR** help today. _

We need to finish Iowa **STRONG**. And then immediately after Iowa, we’ve got to keep pounding the pavement because New Hampshire’s primary is just **8 DAYS AWAY!**

**[Would you be willing to donate just $5 or more to fuel our campaign and amplify Nikki’s message during these final hours ahead of the first votes?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iqAljdTHF5PacuxOmdzQeA&sysid=1 "Would you be willing to
donate just $5 or more to fuel our campaign and amplify Nikki’s message during
these final hours ahead of the first votes?")**

Please join us now...before it is too late.

You can help determine the outcome of this race and our country’s future.

_**Let’s WIN this!**_

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680345%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4rg1dQ0gIsGk%2f09ANJdK2w&sysid=1)

\- Team Haley

---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680348%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MdXRJAtxvOmgs2WUcCjkSQ&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680349%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qvR1nTKTtIeKksi9HTT9lQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680340%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kRuUFSfVjNPEpPYr0X4%2b7A&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Celebrating the Memory of Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy MLK Day!

Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s dedication to equality and justice inspires our quest to build a more fair and prosperous society for all Americans today.

His legacy also underscores the profound impact that one person can make through determined action. Today, I hope we can each reflect on Dr. King’s life and take time to decide what positive change we each can bring to our own communities. We live in challenging times, and it's never been more important for each of us to take action to create the positive change that we seek.

Thank you again for your friendship. Best wishes for a terrific MLK Day.

Raja
Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Today, we're honoring the life, legacy, and work of Dr. King.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
We can challenge the status quo – to fight for equality and justice for all. To build an America that lives up to its promises & ideals.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77112777/449416817/-849459103?refcode=ea.c1aa29d3-b6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c1aa29d3-b6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWFhMjlkMy1iNmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJEgFUzKraDS4VEwrlqjmD3w6FPszWF0T3ll9QZ923M=&emci=ed2d8733-7ab1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c1aa29d3-b6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)
---
Today, we honor and reflect upon the life, legacy, and work of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. I'm thinking about the last speech Dr. King ever gave, "I've been to the Mountaintop," delivered to the striking sanitation workers in Memphis, Tennessee. It’s a prophetic speech, full of hope and clarity. His words resonate with me now more than ever.
> _Let us rise up tonight with a greater readiness. Let us stand with a greater determination. And let us move on in these powerful days, these days of challenge to make America what it ought to be. We have an opportunity to make America a better nation._
Today, over 55 years after Dr. King gave his last speech – we must do more than just quote his speech, we need to live it. We can challenge the status quo – to fight for equality and justice for all. To build an America that lives up to its promises & ideals. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Gloria [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77112779/449416818/-849459103?refcode=ea.c1aa29d3-b6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c1aa29d3-b6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWFhMjlkMy1iNmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OJEgFUzKraDS4VEwrlqjmD3w6FPszWF0T3ll9QZ923M=&emci=ed2d8733-7ab1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c1aa29d3-b6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)

clean_body: We can challenge the status quo – to fight for equality and justice for all. To build an America that lives up to its promises & ideals. | Today, we honor and reflect upon the life, legacy, and work of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. I'm thinking about the last speech Dr. King ever gave, "I've been to the Mountaintop," delivered to the striking sanitation workers in Memphis, Tennessee. It’s a prophetic speech, full of hope and clarity. His words resonate with me now more than ever. Let us rise up tonight with a greater readiness. Let us stand with a greater determination. And let us move on in these powerful days, these days of challenge to make America what it ought to be. We have an opportunity to make America a better nation. Today, over 55 years after Dr. King gave his last speech – we must do more than just quote his speech, we need to live it. We can challenge the status quo – to fight for equality and justice for all. To build an America that lives up to its promises & ideals. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Gloria | Follow along: | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205
