name: Mike Johnson [Speaker of the House]
subject: You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson.

_You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. _

So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing last week when he endorsed Trump too.

_**[He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38187%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kfLBk47wHrwwUI7vK9HQAg&sysid=1 "He and I agree: as strong
Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together.")**_

That’s because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden’s army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.

But wait, that’s not even the half of it. It gets worse:
** Problem #1: ** We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals.

** Problem #2: ** House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us.

** Problem #3: ** Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute...

_**[So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38188%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Wh1C4EiqPtI%2bIB6Du9Btg&sysid=1 "So as one of my first
moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve
Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of
the month.")**_

I know, I know - that’s a big goal. I get that. But that’s as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state.

If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We’d have no choice but to: **1) ** SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, **2) ** SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and **3) ** Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN.

Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. **That’s why I’m calling for reinforcements.**

_I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that’s preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. _

_**[I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38189%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fdgjT9Wqpevv3IbCQ8JGcQ&sysid=1 "I only ask everyone
reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.")**_

When the stakes are this high, that’s what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING?
---
**[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38180%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MkXdi2lTOXO2VjEoMkDchw&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38181%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I16llJSnWldbBqtuLz5Hng&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38182%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yean07m2VyKxEP0E3eXCiA&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks for everything you do.

In liberty,
Mike Johnson (Speaker of the House)

clean_body: So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson. You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing last week when he endorsed Trump too. "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together." That’s because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden’s army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat. But wait, that’s not even the half of it. It gets worse: Problem #1: We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals. Problem #2: House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us. Problem #3: Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump. I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute... "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." I know, I know - that’s a big goal. I get that. But that’s as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state. If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We’d have no choice but to: 1) SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, 2) SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and 3) Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN. Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. That’s why I’m calling for reinforcements. I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that’s preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford." When the stakes are this high, that’s what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING? name: Geoff & KathyJo
subject: Why this matters
body:
This is YOUR Republican Party at stake
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GrN8xiWYqq_8i1ZXN70_6GQZZS__slTPcFHJnaHLDdg0Y1Lin1NuBhJI5jaFX5EHwQXKtkvYDrXNsJ7ia2KRNHp2Rb_3lTrGNSznfSXjJi96tsjZXx4xSsnsWCyxnv9dqLI2kzNL-lzrjIaEWHYOI658Vmpa6gE76c8UR7b4_9Wa5yIZ8dFnFM27y712aGwjvEMtTicq8DFD0p9Ef0rFkQ==&c=J6AneiOk6DYNNUZPYN2k969dbo97kKajU7YG45Pfu9aWTqrJ2i55_Q==&ch=Gx8DrvRskDPTVY4xGSunaR3CYBCLc5cUR4LEO5MuIlkuOpsJSUYPtg==)
---
| January 15, 2024
Friend,
Today are the Iowa Caucuses, and Republican activists like you are deciding who will be their nominee for President.
On March 5th, you and other Republican voters will have the same opportunity to vote in the Presidential Primary, and there will be another race on the ballot as well: the Republican State Committee election.
The Republican State Committee is made up of 80 members, two from every state senate district, one man and one woman. We currently serve on the Republican State Committee, representing 7 cities and towns. These cities and towns are Avon, Brockton, East Bridgewater, Halifax, Hanson, Randolph, and Whitman.
As your conservative team on the Republican State Committee, we would be honored to earn your support for re-election. This race matters because we will continue to fight to make sure the Republican Party is YOUR party, and not the party of insiders and Republicans In Name Only!
But we cannot do this alone...
Our campaign is powered by the grassroots and activists like you, and never the establishment. The establishment recruited candidates against us, one of them is a convicted felon!
This race ultimately matters because this race is about you. If you want your voice heard, if you want to be represented in the Republican Party by a conservative team with a proven track record of supporting local activists and candidates, we are the right candidates for you and will be honored to earn your support.
Together, we will win this fight, and we will continue fighting for you.
As always, thank you for your support.
Geoff Diehl and KathyJo Boss
---
| | [Support our campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GrN8xiWYqq_8i1ZXN70_6GQZZS__slTPcFHJnaHLDdg0Y1Lin1NuBhJI5jaFX5EHwQXKtkvYDrXNsJ7ia2KRNHp2Rb_3lTrGNSznfSXjJi96tsjZXx4xSsnsWCyxnv9dqLI2kzNL-lzrjIaEWHYOI658Vmpa6gE76c8UR7b4_9Wa5yIZ8dFnFM27y712aGwjvEMtTicq8DFD0p9Ef0rFkQ==&c=J6AneiOk6DYNNUZPYN2k969dbo97kKajU7YG45Pfu9aWTqrJ2i55_Q==&ch=Gx8DrvRskDPTVY4xGSunaR3CYBCLc5cUR4LEO5MuIlkuOpsJSUYPtg==)
---
| PS
Would you be willing to make a donation to our State Committee campaigns? You can make a donation by clicking here: [https://secure.winred.com/diehl-boss-for-state-committee/donate-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GrN8xiWYqq_8i1ZXN70_6GQZZS__slTPcFHJnaHLDdg0Y1Lin1NuBhJI5jaFX5EHwQXKtkvYDrXNsJ7ia2KRNHp2Rb_3lTrGNSznfSXjJi96tsjZXx4xSsnsWCyxnv9dqLI2kzNL-lzrjIaEWHYOI658Vmpa6gE76c8UR7b4_9Wa5yIZ8dFnFM27y712aGwjvEMtTicq8DFD0p9Ef0rFkQ==&c=J6AneiOk6DYNNUZPYN2k969dbo97kKajU7YG45Pfu9aWTqrJ2i55_Q==&ch=Gx8DrvRskDPTVY4xGSunaR3CYBCLc5cUR4LEO5MuIlkuOpsJSUYPtg==)
State Committee campaigns are not governed by OCPF, and candidates can raise unlimited funds so anything you are willing to give would be greatly appreciated. Thank you again!

Experiencing "senior moments"?

Then you need to take this simple 1-word
dementia test.

According to the renowned journal, Neurology,
if you fail this test…

You have a 95% chance of suffering from

This 1-word dementia test is a MUST if you've

name: Madison Horn
subject: Let's Remember
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mlk-24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mlk-24]
As we commemorate Martin Luther King Jr. Day, I find myself deeply reflecting on Dr. King's profound wisdom, particularly his timeless words: "Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate; only love can do that." In today's America, where division and hateful rhetoric is more prevalent than ever, these words resonate with a sense of urgency and action.
Dr. King’s dream was not just for an end to racial injustice, but for the creation of a society where every person, regardless of race, creed, or background, could live together in harmony. Yet today, we couldn’t be more divided, despite there being more that unites us than divides us.
As I run for Congress in Oklahoma's 5th District, I am motivated by the same principles that guided Dr. King. The divisive rhetoric that has poisoned our political landscape does not reflect the moral fabric of America – a fabric woven with threads of compassion, community, and resilience. It's time for us to reignite the light of understanding and empathy in our daily interactions and political discourse.
Our campaign is more than a political journey; it is a commitment to reviving the spirit of unity and mutual respect that Dr. King championed. It's about creating policies and environments that drive out hate with love, darkness with light.
As we honor Dr. King today, let us each pledge to be a beacon of that light and love in our communities while renewing hope in the American Dream.
In solidarity and hope,
Madison Horn

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: Dive into the Republican Presidential Race, Border Woes, and Wild Pet Tales!
body:
New for dpwillis67@gmail.com - No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4beb2b3d8c&e=567664f14c)

We're excited to share the [latest episode of the No Doubt About It podcast ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4448c881ed&e=567664f14c)with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, featuring a special guest, famed political consultant Jay McCleskey.

[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b9a16fb911&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, we delve into the heart of the Republican presidential race in Iowa and New Hampshire, discussing whether President Trump has it locked up or if there's a possible upset in the making. Join the conversation as everyone makes their predictions and speculations about the upcoming political landscape. **The crew shares their Trump VP picks as well.**
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2f1d34b2b4&e=567664f14c)
---
Shifting gears, we turn our attention to the border, where the Biden administration's incompetence has both Republicans and Democrats fuming. **Could the failures in border policy lead to mass deportations**?
As a delightful bonus, we wrap up the episode with a lively discussion on adopting wild animals as pets. **Jay shares his attempt to adopt a raccoon** , while Mark dreams of having a bobcat as a companion. Krysty thinks they're both a bit crazy—tune in to find out more!
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=053f12569f&e=567664f14c)
---
We invite you to listen, like, and subscribe to the No Doubt About It podcast on your favorite platform to stay updated with our latest episodes. Don't forget to [subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0ff29ead00&e=567664f14c) for additional content.

If you enjoy the show and want to support us, visit [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=db06de4f9c&e=567664f14c), where you can purchase gear and make financial donations. Your support helps us continue delivering engaging content.

Thank you for being part of the No Doubt About It community, and we look forward to sharing more entertaining and thought-provoking discussions with you in the future.

Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti

clean_body: New for dpwillis67@gmail.com - No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | | We're excited to share the Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, featuring a special guest, famed political consultant Jay McCleskey. In this episode, we delve into the heart of the Republican presidential race in Iowa and New Hampshire, discussing whether President Trump has it locked up or if there's a possible upset in the making. Join the conversation as everyone makes their predictions and speculations about the upcoming political landscape. The crew shares their Trump VP picks as well. | Shifting gears, we turn our attention to the border, where the Biden administration's incompetence has both Republicans and Democrats fuming. Could the failures in border policy lead to mass deportations? As a delightful bonus, we wrap up the episode with a lively discussion on adopting wild animals as pets. Jay shares his attempt to adopt a raccoon , while Mark dreams of having a bobcat as a companion. Krysty thinks they're both a bit crazy—tune in to find out more! | We invite you to listen, like, and subscribe to the No Doubt About It podcast on your favorite platform to stay updated with our latest episodes. Don't forget to for additional content. If you enjoy the show and want to support us, visit , where you can purchase gear and make financial donations. Your support helps us continue delivering engaging content. Thank you for being part of the No Doubt About It community, and we look forward to sharing more entertaining and thought-provoking discussions with you in the future. Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2024 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: What a ride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The road to the Iowa Caucuses has been long and winding, but together, we've made it. I have a note to share ahead of this evening.
---
| | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click [**here**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_t=Rg5AeWjsJz6_ll_bpE4lmBcESZOGqS3o2M528WUsjzKwIh4pogNYjGBu4x2USEJBViqq394car_A_eF6N6FCvJL2kcZ4XQLMCaGvgKkEyBM%3D)
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38ifJcu6m0Cgc1L2kYQVzPxMnsW3W0nu4XriVmERNhKtBKPiFurmm7aHtXBhKcvwrWqczxBr5YaSvKvkTo91ZIvY1x38Y-vHp4dnd7Dw16CDFFXjAWHFePj1t2v9tbSRawoODn8O2rABNdKoW5TXhym3)
Hey Peter, Today is the day of the Iowa Caucuses--the most important day our campaign has faced yet. With just hours to go before the first votes start to take place,**I wanted to send over my recollection of the days that got us here.** Thinking back, I wouldn't be where I am today if it weren't for the incredible outpouring of support that the launch of our campaign was met with.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38g_6b-zMm0-BhMDr4sVKOmYCMFtvLmu8fmEL_DlSqEz1M1r7vd5ITy03berYO7u_JsMGkShku4KWKWqUUYRTl6Bub07weKvGkvgIfekmHLr3IbncLpoZZw6MY35OrkSoc4jiW1u2ApeaZVeJD16_g_f)
---

When we first started, the American people made it clear that they were ready for a change and willing to fight for one. We've been underestimated initially, but we haven't let our voices be silenced.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38hKSZWYDlLb0aXqb4s4tmitUsc-jwumWrCHBY12XwGMN8kVm8UPYGoPgIXWmZfshwMqmxK39V63h8J1Vo02j99h_xuh-iGpNafimTd1d2b9NxyiYfQtXLeKMTCKvWNtWI6ScOKzR1hWNmI89b1rAisq)
---
Since our earliest days, we haven't slowed down, and we haven't let up. We have been determined to outcampaign every candidate at every turn and reach as many Americans as possible. That's why we made it to every single one of Iowa's 99 counties ahead of **today.**
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38iV2B67F6YiSSG1Xu0JdO4HksRCqHqZX2tQyvTGGKv5YBkqGpGO0iYhm2OgiJpvAORQWZ4IyCh6OZsT2wZyyrclAx3R-xu0Py5hilIhRYJ-9PNmakJqbHGKm0XxhAaF4xuyt05Ayso170tGX7VuapNr)
---

We haven't just reached people in person. We've taken our message to every news outlet from Fox, to CNN, to MSNBC, to countless others by participating in interviews, roundtable discussions, debates, town halls, etc... We haven't left one stone unturned.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38i60v7OvZULY6TzN4Q_p7FRIVvKEvYqoC8jBOdHfycvjb6i7Tkt0jPlu2-dmRgrHV1Nqi1dW38zslWJnvDipWa5SVojoYGYOFjBj-9nSMFlr5Y--lJ9BUCCP2twQj6j7OnayMUCgkTBbctItmzuo3BI)
---

Along the way, we've earned some major endorsements, such as Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds', Congressman Chip Roy's, Congressman Thomas Massie's, and the list goes on with state, local, and evangelical leaders up and down the country.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38ikwJiclspAThJFb7VfEzj6-IJxSWWSdUqA3SRJQWD7e7cOFGdHJnc7zdMNlyRdvKv-SeI51kFrQbLf-n83Rq7df5Oo4OFHkBRtV3Pm7aBLXhIjSMHb61U1d-5KmSEeEB29VerHXVdgEnIGo-FlwGSo)
---
Peter, no one expected us to have the momentum that we do, and none of it would have been possible without you. You are the reason we are going to shock the nation with our support at the caucuses today. **We don't have much time before voting begins for the first time in the 2024 presidential cycle, and this is the moment for all of our hard work to pay off.** _With your support, our momentum can be stronger than ever as Iowans head to their caucuses. They need to see that they won't be fighting alone, and I need your help with that._ Everything has led up to THIS MOMENT. So Peter, I am asking you to step up one last time before caucusing begins. **[Can you send in just $10, $15, or $25 in the next 9 hours?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38jwXu4AeHgdLONTwZIftVEqSe3uNcKewDcD1gzpoCySU5nFBWJ-yZB7LJLTawM6ysKdZYmrLJYsyzW0abxXt9EpExkm6ymWwZ1bpa9gcRyv916J_vaQg8wI4dKMxNhH6MSaHz7KyN7XSvMUGstV8uGV)** This is our time for choosing. Tonight, our Great American Comeback can begin to take shape, but it all depends on how much we're willing to fight for it.
---
| | [Send In Your Support Here](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38hloYo2Bza3ZD9A_zB1S3fOZP9OIZSx4E_IBnDhtL9GhIV4YJVkdZfbmSX6XwhfDWMHHoxU7Ud-m9bCtWBLQy9p2Cw5Ff8eBqpTddZdpG1TtB685WwrYXcqJO3C-Hb_XszFxly3A6i9YZgLzGfrBwZW)
---
**_Thank you for all you've done to get our team this far. I know I can count on you to help us go into this critical evening stronger than ever._** God bless,
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38hCRXyahAs8P9cGvby5HN_v9tylITl4tBLMA5XMthL9G7eNJwK4OQsfoTkyH2nsoG0nbMMi9SRjaJ9LIGkTWzyV7y_uXnmi6xMruhMu1Hmq2W5rNgEB9KzKGEEzIUjnK44uV_bME3SAqf_qO4SgtPDV)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38j5HqLKfjW2PhAdsf-d3Xe-Qm48rJa0vkQD2Wp4Hf_T6NOuTS_Lw1mub9AczjMl1VGDIATtMzQQpI1RhYPZBKmSQfwhK5gpRfOY4ZwXEtxfjT_z2nVnLR4xjYdAuABvWcOMySteDo-0xmKi7wumFVXn)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=74da32cc46374ffbaf5e890626c14513&_e=uOH2MpbqhwJNjDebj8rKEMdnzKlgTXhvwAnypr-1OjflNNnuf8a9818xZsQeWrGuFZb6hkFpFX8oHDcre3FanRK_MEbaFIHLpXS9upNXUnFiWBdqMm2QooCzYdiDgbW75YyUmCYblPE3wXyke-fnIq6yN14gCbiEXcvItHeTV1BM952kxn-cxDbYOKSVArFYmS1tcfu8CXtbS14hE5EFCHVGtJjcs72eb34ad3U-cyO5AuBeVItRCdIpLL_FSthoQIFCuuzR_DGKDCom4TZAFt2LirodZDsrjZkYZXOz38jGLsuv-DvugbcJd12JlSGJigqk1hUtD6_Jc72cPj-UljfwRr7KENaZLRXuYhUyeUvPLW01g86B4-1Tj_bYfJCVM1Qr9pOr8PsbYyyujxW-Y9ijulyCcsR3EVFpeTiZBEu5rRX4gjw-wrWXOiihLlS8)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

subject: Folks like you and emails like this one

body:
| Our campaign runs on small-dollar grassroots donations.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1855%2E35263%2E7krF06)
Peter, would you believe us if we told you that our campaign runs on small-dollar grassroots donations from folks like you to emails like this one? **What if we told you that our average online donation last month was just $22?** While Tammy relies on grassroots supporters to power this campaign, Republicans are trying to sell Wisconsin’s Senate seat to the highest bidder. Not one, but TWO megamillionaires are gearing up to run against Tammy, backed by tens of millions of dollars from their own personal fortunes. If you knew that your donation could have an outsized impact on our work to defend Tammy from the millions of Republican dollars that will soon flood Wisconsin, would you spare anything from $5, $10, or even $22? **[If your answer is yes, please pitch in before tonight’s mid-month deadline:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3616?c0=tbe-em-jan24.H0UPlo&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240115_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1855%2E35263%2E7krF06)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jan24.EnWOzU&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240115_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1855%2E35263%2E7krF06)

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Our course on the American Founding—Now on DVD
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-c5qvQ3i1wO8AuX9-jldnA~~/AARclAA~~~) [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-c5qvQ3i1wO8AuX9-jldnA~~/AARclAA~~~) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-c5qvQ3i1wO8AuX9-jldnA~~/AARclAA~~~)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bXosjeX2w1OGN3KDTwnPKg~~/AARclAA~/RgRniBCWP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWiMGOlZQJdMxtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1Ruy_qiDVx02YVpG_z7xGg~~/AARclAA~/RgRniBCWP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplojBjpWUCXTMbUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Ami Bera
subject: MLK’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

Today, I will be joining many of you across the country in honoring the life and work of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr by marching, volunteering, and serving others.

The vision Dr. King had for our country was never deterred by politics or partisanship. Rather, Dr. King was guided by the belief that every person — no matter their skin color — deserves equal rights. In the effort for civil rights legislation, he and so many others were unwavering and, Peter, we must be unwavering in our work too.

In honor of Dr. King on this national day of service, let’s not view today as a day off, but a day on—it’s an opportunity to recommit to the spirit of service and the fight for a more just world.

Thank you,

Ami
---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ea3b4eb86d34e58817207ba11a17d49&_e=G2H_dx7wBrm8YYKLKXUiU19MNxLpNiYCPL2xgRff6xUwLHNc4RHVZGagl8SlsuSrEgx5usLSvIITLdFKtSy7ynpVq-lapmPNZ9i8IkkyhHcAValCCj94OMOSYbo3AOB7S_Fpx5bkETRxQTIIrGM29vuOzJicDV1dVfHyyivNwhf5AfUWnowX-J3hYMzrPBkJazTm31voZkFXEey7CorkziXpUc4dMlX7JZuL9HEyWCRzG1e2UeamI7CS_8lYuXZyqzsynpZneNSYJ0p_Z12bvPmHNBhg1U2T5ND2UHXTiF7hb739R9NsHFPxrRO3_yOKdoVqaSYG6Y9y0Y6htpI4-iYhRpCu2BQztq7wlEhROoWc3DXD_b_90xdcEbiQecIdQBwGvXnHaRBG98H8CMsdL5dYCLxKa8G9PGapevMneLPRv7ygP3plQu1n3ozLlx6s) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ea3b4eb86d34e58817207ba11a17d49&_e=G2H_dx7wBrm8YYKLKXUiU19MNxLpNiYCPL2xgRff6xUwLHNc4RHVZGagl8SlsuSrEgx5usLSvIITLdFKtSy7ynpVq-lapmPNZ9i8IkkyhHcAValCCj94OMOSYbo3AOB7S_Fpx5bkETRxQTIIrGM29vuOzJicDV1dVfHyyivNwhf5AfUWnowX-J3hYMzrPBkJazTm31voZkFXEey7CorkziXpUc4dMlX7JZuL9HEyWCRzG1e2UeamI7CS_8lYuXZyqzsynpZneNSYJ0p_Z12bvJrCPSEO67oLMluDCC1rgMMwRo1CayExegnULIoYaCE7c_sgNSmTg9v9UO-it4RObuAM7OwO8tZ7KbmCNiSKujExcuollNpUJcZpqfLBuU7cZYL9qvJep4YxR7ZYv4QRIYZTlsukb6vB6Vp1TF5xMReBCBwea8DINTM-QZ4huxQr) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ea3b4eb86d34e58817207ba11a17d49&_e=G2H_dx7wBrm8YYKLKXUiU19MNxLpNiYCPL2xgRff6xUwLHNc4RHVZGagl8SlsuSrEgx5usLSvIITLdFKtSy7ynpVq-lapmPNZ9i8IkkyhHcAValCCj94OMOSYbo3AOB7S_Fpx5bkETRxQTIIrGM29vuOzJicDV1dVfHyyivNwhf5AfUWnowX-J3hYMzrPBkJazTm31voZkFXEey7CorkziXpUc4dMlX7JZuL9HEyWCRzG1e2UeamI7CS_8lYuXZyqzsynpZneNSYJ0p_Z12bvJxjPzSxaDsVl0N3SZ4RYI4IYxLwDhK-xDmLzFPmudxFOtYUj1JEAEcHwVm-wYCpA-KcVADH43HJqQbi572hbE6wHXZzgMHr08Qnkq8pYTJEA9yhcmg3K3BmEvqiDGic4xxV0FHBgIf0njQrVVTX6y0rhQl58TxBZ_nl0K18lx3R)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---
Democrats stooped to a new low... Friend, did you see that one of the corrupt liberal career politicians running for my seat DARKENED MY SKIN COLOR in a request for campaign donations? Democrats are coming at me in droves--and one of them, an indicted former judge (where do they find these characters?!), darkened my skin color in a pathetic attempt to fund his campaign. I'm disappointed but FAR from surprised. But what can you expect from another one of these hypocritical white liberals who is literally trying to defeat the only Black congressman from the State of Michigan? He just can't stand the fact that I'm a Republican! Democrats are so scared that Black people are beginning to wake up and realize that Democrats are the party of prejudice--so they're resorting to dirty games! That's why I need you to stand by me.
---
[**STAND BY ME**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=090b20b7774a48ffabfe52daca56f6cb&_e=4ApBvGHBZ8lIg8r7pEHOZPab8VdjMUfpfMngioXP3382EosU4cLb0f-jBYT-JLHJwqX4-B2QC9CdpSDMIE6gbQeRHf5BPNL-AEtuZJdvd7BaXb9VqcPcOclYACJIUWIJ8rqs6UcKipd54jDVNRHTsgONGTGpTcRRfapUUtHXeFmZFur8wTBOlwR7kgTqzCZpvxTbY98uN4q3tEv889eo7Cjal5U5GdDopSMLnaQu3ff_-YqnlkFt0EgIFa50FUzs2dU09IYucbk74bmdMj0O_4uyCJ7iHs7mtdrRMYKW4tc%3D)
---
I didn't put my life on the line flying combat missions as an Army Ranger-qualified Apache pilot in Iraq to have the Radical Left try to define me by my skin color alone. He's using an old racist trope by darkening my skin to get votes... this coming from the party that likes to call Republicans racist. HA! Hypocrites. From MIT to Macomb County, liberal elites like my opponent believe the same thing: whether you're Black or whether you're conservative--or BOTH, like me--they're better than us, they're smarter than us, and we should just shut up and fall in line. Well that's a load of BS! He's focused on using racial tropes to win his primary. I'm focused on serving the people. That's why, I need your help to support my conservative campaign. Will you join me?
---

clean_body: I'm disappointed but FAR from surprised. | | | Democrats stooped to a new low... Friend, did you see that one of the corrupt liberal career politicians running for my seat DARKENED MY SKIN COLOR in a request for campaign donations? Democrats are coming at me in droves--and one of them, an indicted former judge (where do they find these characters?!), darkened my skin color in a pathetic attempt to fund his campaign. I'm disappointed but FAR from surprised. But what can you expect from another one of these hypocritical white liberals who is literally trying to defeat the only Black congressman from the State of Michigan? He just can't stand the fact that I'm a Republican! Democrats are so scared that Black people are beginning to wake up and realize that Democrats are the party of prejudice--so they're resorting to dirty games! That's why I need you to stand by me. I didn't put my life on the line flying combat missions as an Army Ranger-qualified Apache pilot in Iraq to have the Radical Left try to define me by my skin color alone. He's using an old racist trope by darkening my skin to get votes... this coming from the party that likes to call Republicans racist. HA! Hypocrites. From MIT to Macomb County, liberal elites like my opponent believe the same thing: whether you're Black or whether you're conservative--or BOTH, like me--they're better than us, they're smarter than us, and we should just shut up and fall in line. Well that's a load of BS! He's focused on using racial tropes to win his primary. I'm focused on serving the people. That's why, I need your help to support my conservative campaign. Will you join me? Thank you, John James | | Paid for by John James for Michigan John James for Michigan P.O. body:
Buckle up for some electrifying news! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=0eb6088ef2&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,

Buckle up for some electrifying news!

The Mesquite Patriots, champions of our constitutional values and American way of life, have just endorsed our campaign for Nevada’s 4th Congressional District. This isn't just big; it's monumental! [But Peter, , I NEED YOUR ENDORSEMENT!](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=77606db0d2&e=273c9a71fb)
[****](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=16f58eac5a&e=273c9a71fb)

The Mesquite Patriots, a powerhouse in defending American principles and freedoms, see in us what you've known all along – that our campaign is the real deal. Their endorsement is a roaring endorsement of our shared values: God, country, family, and unshakeable America First dedication. The Mesquite Patriots are all in, and they’re bringing their passion, energy, and unwavering support to our cause.
**[We Need You – Now More Than Ever](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c9e899a8e9&e=273c9a71fb)**
Let’s turn this endorsement into a tidal wave of action. Donate, volunteer, spread the word – whatever you can do, it counts. Your involvement is the turbocharge we need to push forward and win. [I need your endorsement too Peter. ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=159a2ca79c&e=273c9a71fb)

Thank you for being the heartbeat of this campaign. Together, we’re unstoppable.

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: Letter from a Birmingham jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09262023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09262023]
Hi Peter, I'm not like most politicians. I don't shy away from the tough issues and I'm always going to be crystal clear where I stand.
No doublespeak.
No politician's lingo.
I stand firmly behind Israel's right to exist and defend itself.
Hamas is a terrorist organization that has killed innocent civilians, taken innocent hostages, and broken international and moral law.
All parties must adhere to international humanitarian law and the Geneva Convention.
I stand firmly behind a two-state solution for a more lasting peace in the Middle East.
We need people in Congress who can do what I just did. People who can stand behind their values and their principles. I'm that person - and I always have been.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=100823]
Thank you,
Kurt

Hey Peter,

It’s Mark Takano – **Republicans voted to formalize their sham impeachment inquiry into President Biden.**

This means that they are continuing with their _baseless efforts_ to impeach President Biden, all while wasting _taxpayer dollars_ and refusing to focus on the issues that _ACTUALLY matter to working families._

And the worst part is – they KNOW they don’t have any evidence. Republican Speaker Mike Johnson said so himself!

Peter, I’m a strong progressive and I’m proud to have led President Biden’s agenda through the House.

But if we don’t win back the House majority and protect President Biden from baseless impeachment efforts, _**we could lose everything we’ve worked toward.**_

[**We need a SURGE of Democrats to step up and help us reach our critical Mid-Month fundraising goal if we’re going to succeed in flipping the House blue and protecting President Biden’s agenda. name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Celebrate the Legacy of MLK
body:
Today we’re celebrating the life and legacy of Martin Luther King Jr., a leader of the civil rights movement.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77125472/449455216/444630146?refcode=1-15-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3YWM1N2I1LWM4YjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HTpxQMJ49l-9w5elB1W2td_oxu9zS81CeEgmWDwPv7o=)
---
| | Friend, Today we’re celebrating the life and legacy of Martin Luther King Jr., a leader of the civil rights movement. King was instrumental in securing equal rights under the law for Black Americans and his legacy lives on in our work. With threats to our democracy growing, it’s more important than ever to remember the sacrifices that King and other civil rights leaders made to secure the right to vote for all Americans. The gutting of the Voting Rights Act and attempts to close polling places, restrict absentee voting, and draconian voter ID laws are all forms of voter suppression that are actively being proposed and used throughout the United States. This is a dangerous trend that needs to stop.**[Our voting rights are under threat, and we know how dangerous this is to our democracy. If you’re also disturbed by the constant attacks on voting rights, please chip in $10 so we can keep working together to fight back against these attacks.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77125473/449455217/444630146?refcode=1-15-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3YWM1N2I1LWM4YjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HTpxQMJ49l-9w5elB1W2td_oxu9zS81CeEgmWDwPv7o=)** Politicians continue to quote Martin Luther King Jr. while actively fighting against every single thing he stood for, particularly when it comes to voting rights. Preventing people from casting their ballots is _exactly_ what King fought against, and even though certain people plaster his name and quotes everywhere today, they continue to undermine his work at every turn. **[Today more than ever we must remember the sacrifices of Martin Luther King Jr. and pledge to carry on his legacy by protecting voting rights and fighting for free and fair elections. If you’re with us, please contribute $10 today so we can keep working to ensure equal ballot access for all Americans.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77125474/449455218/444630146?refcode=1-15-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3YWM1N2I1LWM4YjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HTpxQMJ49l-9w5elB1W2td_oxu9zS81CeEgmWDwPv7o=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action
---
| | Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund
100 M Street SE
Suite 1050
Washington, DC 20003
United States
---

body:
This initiative is a major step toward restoring public trust in our elections.
| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=cfbf07c412e24d10bf0af3ce6da65315&_e=e51lWSBKMUAqJm27qzNsfer-VcOFfRSthoLv330pEz2igS2J0vfvgOxMxWacZKQr7cnP6hOGROFkgoq40ScqnVn0CaZUp0BmfUODMZ-iIqt_1_ls1iAJv4kiubbFXcLzKR2Y9wV_ONgirRc_TKLOXuWqMQaDYE53sHS9GtwTqorfBI_WrZHQq_TingGinyASGqgAYNB6oEVbVehvqXshXtcXejqY8fip7kMQ0sqqW5M3HbFy4JeesRcwI9exCIHMwGKXDu6swHHqlHhaBizfV2mKiIP-pWr-d5TRs7MQexc1BdfSMLpY9wDFGuIj8b1JJEDZrxM1ACYrdw0AsnhtOV3EUKnMThCdEQr3a7kxfmfl0j0XkD1inCjktnxkPxbUrrkV2FYYFUZo5uBeefj16qXPKnupY6BT8Vu2uGxnjMpD_YfPGn7qyJvXUv5nE8Izsifis9Z-Oq3hYzgpHnfahfxjoin87-qsqjtSOoUT1gI%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Earlier this month, I led an initiative in the House to roll out an array of **election security measures** that I’m recommending _every state in the country_ follow this November.
---
The **election security tool kit** offers practical guidelines for running elections that will bolster public confidence in the 2024 results.
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=cfbf07c412e24d10bf0af3ce6da65315&_e=e51lWSBKMUAqJm27qzNsfer-VcOFfRSthoLv330pEz2igS2J0vfvgOxMxWacZKQr7cnP6hOGROFkgoq40ScqnVn0CaZUp0BmfUODMZ-iIqt_1_ls1iAJv4kiubbFXcLzKR2Y9wV_ONgirRc_TKLOXuWqMQaDYE53sHS9GtwTqorfBI_WrZHQq_TingGinyASGqgAYNB6oEVbVehvqXshXtcXejqY8fip7kMQ0sqqW5M3HbFy4JeesRcwI9exCIHMwGKXDu6swHHqlHhaBizfV2mKiIP-pWr-d5TRs7MQexc1BdfSMLpY9wDFGuIj8b1JJEDZrxM1ACYrdw0AsnhtOeuqcj-w4rs-ZcUNYYJpRBjD2dvFZCKOeodjap2uzf1X2Nv_5FZglp66HIl9bXHvwmPmOCkTgAEmrRDp6GYWKGV_xOevXUEj1ILRBXk13VyIQfE2eVU-x0cRBJnmG6flwc4Uq9G7cNgASO_PLF7jE4A%3D)
---
I’m focused on increasing voters’ confidence and participation in our elections. By providing a tool kit of election integrity bills to states, we are going one step further in securing our elections and increasing Americans’ confidence.
---
I’m recommending that states implement voter ID requirements, ban ballot harvesting, and stop noncitizens from voting. These common-sense policies will make it easy to vote and hard to cheat.
---
**But Democrats in Washington are already trying to label this resolution as a threat to voting rights.**
---
They want to frame a nonpartisan method of remedying the eroding trust Americans have in their elections as a right-wing political issue.
---
_Friend, the Democrats are trying to kill my bill on election security –I need your support to keep driving this initiative forward._
---
**[So please make a contribution so we can restore public confidence in America’s elections this year.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=cfbf07c412e24d10bf0af3ce6da65315&_e=e51lWSBKMUAqJm27qzNsfer-VcOFfRSthoLv330pEz2igS2J0vfvgOxMxWacZKQr7cnP6hOGROFkgoq40ScqnVn0CaZUp0BmfUODMZ-iIqt_1_ls1iAJv4kiubbFXcLzKR2Y9wV_ONgirRc_TKLOXuWqMQaDYE53sHS9GtwTqorfBI_WrZHQq_TingGinyASGqgAYNB6oEVbVehvqXshXtcXejqY8fip7kMQ0sqqW5M3HbFy4JeesRcwI9exCIHMwGKXDu6swHHqlHhaBizfV2mKiIP-pWr-d5TRs7MQexc1BdfSMLpY9wDFGuIj8b1JJEDZrxM1ACYrdw0AsnhtOYM5kG_gdiNDuh9I0BT67IZcbkRwGFx5nBPECFdrH5Y6Vvtti4PC5a4AdVGKCFXdaei06-vKDpVkUv7lNPtsyyDIpG51op-fLHltaK6bTYDXxBNS3lkF5LGdqjWCayh2FfWZRPKXm2F_RLGChDZkA-g%3D)**

clean_body: This initiative is a major step toward restoring public trust in our elections. | Friend, Earlier this month, I led an initiative in the House to roll out an array of election security measures that I’m recommending every state in the country follow this November. The election security tool kit offers practical guidelines for running elections that will bolster public confidence in the 2024 results. I’m focused on increasing voters’ confidence and participation in our elections. By providing a tool kit of election integrity bills to states, we are going one step further in securing our elections and increasing Americans’ confidence. I’m recommending that states implement voter ID requirements, ban ballot harvesting, and stop noncitizens from voting. These common-sense policies will make it easy to vote and hard to cheat. But Democrats in Washington are already trying to label this resolution as a threat to voting rights. They want to frame a nonpartisan method of remedying the eroding trust Americans have in their elections as a right-wing political issue. Friend, the Democrats are trying to kill my bill on election security –I need your support to keep driving this initiative forward. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

Dear Friend,

Liberal billionaire George Soros is targeting South Texas. The Texas Voice reported he recently donated _**$100,000**_ to the Cameron County Democratic Party, composing almost their entire budget this fall.

Soros sees the conservative shift happening in the Rio Grande Valley as Democrats switch parties and more Republicans are running - and winning - up and down the ballot.
[>> DEFEND TEXAS FROM SOROS! >>](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=414e0716536944558565a459ed17d4d4&_e=jQXbGZv8PLm2krrpthR57SAgOuIln3T2AmSXmsYMHM8lFeQvqM-04MGuARxyswYK_o9HG1HkfZz6nOQEPhoMN-SIQg2NIAZ1VjLmL9CDISO4pTrPT2w-6Xhb--fHiO4rJkj4xAo0G0XdhaGxWN83WwHwnbZXfivaS1dEKxwHG6lUK8eETJz4ccE2aiT6IXiLlbuNIXROTuXFChDvA0oXN4iMaHvf6TGtzPwSUb_vNjUavxRIBJF-lo_QqFAIZLDm7F-8Cbd4gk5l8FBt3yCCqCc7-eBOjehe6HopAiFMBINuZ579mJMfW_H-CkYa1_0aQrKcvKSLgePnKqZ4qVpRJn9nVgdV1K74-oP4_ljQ0u3GC2IuHBY748OdTKNasUf1)
George Soros has spent **MILLIONS** trying to turn Texas blue. Soros and his fellow liberal elites are relentlessly focused on imposing their radical, progressive policies on Texas. _**And as we enter election year 2024, the stakes could not be higher!**_

**Friend, we rely on your support to fight the Soros billionaire machine.[Will you step up and make a small donation today to Keep Texas Red?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=414e0716536944558565a459ed17d4d4&_e=jQXbGZv8PLm2krrpthR57SAgOuIln3T2AmSXmsYMHM8lFeQvqM-04MGuARxyswYK_o9HG1HkfZz6nOQEPhoMN-SIQg2NIAZ1VjLmL9CDISO4pTrPT2w-6Xhb--fHiO4rJkj4xAo0G0XdhaGxWN83WwHwnbZXfivaS1dEKxwHG6lUK8eETJz4ccE2aiT6IXiLlbuNIXROTuXFChDvA0oXN8AA1O8k98A7HyTsN3sEKzoDW6Rw_5WG_4-QXSgust2mEUwn-hu__lWHZwIBhbO9E29ijGedHQveWTI0AjyluT8g3tzjvn9nRbn25boQZWZ62zJhX8IT8bTRdeeeiWoY_F_dIKPTvEZ4xDlZ--ucHCz9SsbiH2bm80I9jhdvn8Lo)**

It's Caucus time!

Growing up in Iowa - I value the sacred tradition of being the first in the nation to vote for the next Republican Nominee.

Fellow American, I am working hard to ensure we put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House. He is the only candidate strong enough to withstand the attacks being unleashed by the Washington establishment. The media is terrified that he will secure the border, fix the economy, and restore peace throughout the world.

name: Joe Pereles
subject: Running for office wasn't on my bucket list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
body:
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
Dear Peter,
If we haven’t met, I’d like to introduce myself: my name is Joe Pereles (rhymes with my nickname, “Fearless”) and I am a Democrat running for the Missouri State Senate (District 15 in the suburbs of St. Louis, Missouri)—an open seat and rare flip opportunity in 2024.
Like many of you, I am distressed by what passes for “politics” these days: the anger and the endless outrage; people treating each other as enemies instead of fellow Americans; the loudest voices in the room bullying their opposition into silence. Like you, I yearn for a better system, more civil conversations about real issues, and putting people in charge who we can actually trust.
Too many of us look at what’s happening in the world, in our government, and in our neighborhoods and shake our heads at how our leaders seem to fail us. From the most restrictive and dangerous abortion ban in the country, to galling corruption and disdain for democracy in Jefferson City—the people of Missouri can’t afford any more of this.
This isn’t the state in which my wife and I raised our kids. This isn’t the future we wanted to leave them.
Running for office was never in my plan. I’ve had a fulfilling and rewarding career practicing law, in both private practice and as Senior Vice President for Development & General Counsel for Drury Hotels. My life’s work has revolved around making deals that benefit everyone in the long-term—coming up with win-win situations that lay the foundations for a brighter future.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=wu1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=wu1]
I’m not running for fame or fortune, or to demonize my political opponents: I’m running because I cannot stand to watch Missouri slide to the bottom any longer, and I must stand up and do something about it because we can do better.
We will win if we come together, organize, and fight—that’s why I need you on my side, Peter.
My friends call me ‘Fearless’ because I have been known to take on tough challenges and never back down. When it comes to restoring our rights, fighting to preserve our democracy, and turning things around in this great state, we will all need to take on this task with courage and tenacity.
I am proud to be a candidate for elected office for the first time in my life—and to work for a better future for my two young granddaughters and for you.
I humbly ask for your support and your involvement, however you can give it. Please visit my website to learn more about me and why I am running, sign up to get involved, or to make a donation to my campaign. [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
The days ahead will test all of us, and I look forward to standing shoulder to shoulder with you to face our challenges head on, together. Thank you so much, and please don’t hesitate to reach out if I can ever be of service.
Yours in Service & Gratitude,
Joe Pereles
Democrat for Missouri’s 15th State Senate District
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
P.S. There are no easy answers to our problems, but I know that the path to change starts with us, right here and right now. If you can, I would be honored if you would make a contribution of any amount to my campaign: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=wu1-1]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=wu1-1]
mailto:info@perelesformissouri.com [mailto:info@perelesformissouri.com] https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/] https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100095572659729 [https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100095572659729]
Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
Checks can be mailed to:
Pereles For Missouri
PO Box 6641
Chesterfield, MO 63006
United States

subject: Our first major test of 2024

body:
This is going to be a big year, and we need to make sure we hit every single one of our fundraising goals.
#

Hi friends, it’s Gabby.
Tomorrow at midnight, GIFFORDS PAC faces our January mid-month fundraising deadline—our **_very first**_ fundraising deadline of the year.
[**I’m respectfully asking: Can you make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before this crucial deadline passes?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240115-1-30&t=1&akid=7392%2E3935704%2E3Qj7kH)

With the election year officially in full swing, we need to do everything we can to raise the resources to maintain our gun safety Senate majority, take back the House, support gun safety candidates in state and local races, and reelect President Joe Biden to the White House.

body:
I’m disappointed but FAR from surprised.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b935247685e547db99071adacc206b2a&_e=afIcxN9mpycxtEVGTQMMjRSXLqbKFaxa5JEsdBpN-QfPweCa7H95fecIQ5FHcxQ5JyIfty4mDIqnWFhff5hWQ851bHdO3kz7seOjA-CkbVdRVPMBRgJSDr-Gcv0vVEl870Uopg3VTF0DZNT807nKWvyl-JlozkOVkhE7KXjr8fMy67qFatTam8uwesZ241DNAkZUJXvy3jrf1nVWQuGam1vOCEMcnWzXtsIY_uIAMkb_t8vYuFJNFRptLMMWMer86iV48Z081L8hCeXK_x3D6qxXgYhc_JXH9iLvNQUC87A%3D)
---
Democrats stooped to a new low... Friend, did you see that one of the corrupt liberal career politicians running for my seat DARKENED MY SKIN COLOR in a request for campaign donations? Democrats are coming at me in droves—and one of them, an indicted former judge (where do they find these characters?!), darkened my skin color in a pathetic attempt to fund his campaign. I’m disappointed but FAR from surprised. But what can you expect from another one of these hypocritical white liberals who is literally trying to defeat the only Black congressman from the State of Michigan? He just can’t stand the fact that I’m a Republican! Democrats are so scared that Black people are beginning to wake up and realize that Democrats are the party of prejudice—so they’re resorting to dirty games! That’s why I need you to stand by me.
---
[**STAND BY ME**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b935247685e547db99071adacc206b2a&_e=afIcxN9mpycxtEVGTQMMjRSXLqbKFaxa5JEsdBpN-QfPweCa7H95fecIQ5FHcxQ5JyIfty4mDIqnWFhff5hWQ851bHdO3kz7seOjA-CkbVdRVPMBRgJSDr-Gcv0vVEl8_11nGsO8HK0OUYm8mhES22lS5wDGplK4WDPtj39EZRN_M3cpdJJUBUCtdfLvx7BeDF-pXN9KinYl5TsfSSLcp5MNnJAiXDOJUlmzd-iOOm_lkEsvffBAzHIDHoJDc4UX3FZmNrAD8YV660PPtAaH4avMOBnpPTsfUEIuVTC5zek%3D)

I didn’t put my life on the line flying combat missions as an Army Ranger-qualified Apache pilot in Iraq to have the Radical Left try to define me by my skin color alone. He’s using an old racist trope by darkening my skin to get votes... this coming from the party that likes to call Republicans racist. HA! Hypocrites. From MIT to Macomb County, liberal elites like my opponent believe the same thing: whether you’re Black or whether you’re conservative—or BOTH, like me—they’re better than us, they’re smarter than us, and we should just shut up and fall in line. Well that’s a load of BS! He’s focused on using racial tropes to win his primary. I’m focused on serving the people. That’s why, I need your help to support my conservative campaign. Will you join me?
---
[**JOIN ME**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b935247685e547db99071adacc206b2a&_e=afIcxN9mpycxtEVGTQMMjRSXLqbKFaxa5JEsdBpN-QfPweCa7H95fecIQ5FHcxQ5JyIfty4mDIqnWFhff5hWQ851bHdO3kz7seOjA-CkbVdRVPMBRgJSDr-Gcv0vVEl8qhSN_dS3QXLijQgfLCLlBlpJhJDsjGdUMWG_u6xCJCvoaKvDS78S_LHXpYNCITdW9qqlMjGvh7TboGpme5ah6chj-W1Mw0sgxw4ld9QSKpdKk8g-_BNbAKOxq3w_BTU2vAN2NxEOsaU4OxmlQFr2JM4rdCitr_BKRFNhIhIa3is%3D)

clean_body: I’m disappointed but FAR from surprised. | | | Democrats stooped to a new low... Friend, did you see that one of the corrupt liberal career politicians running for my seat DARKENED MY SKIN COLOR in a request for campaign donations? Democrats are coming at me in droves—and one of them, an indicted former judge (where do they find these characters?!), darkened my skin color in a pathetic attempt to fund his campaign. I’m disappointed but FAR from surprised. But what can you expect from another one of these hypocritical white liberals who is literally trying to defeat the only Black congressman from the State of Michigan? He just can’t stand the fact that I’m a Republican! Democrats are so scared that Black people are beginning to wake up and realize that Democrats are the party of prejudice—so they’re resorting to dirty games! That’s why I need you to stand by me. I didn’t put my life on the line flying combat missions as an Army Ranger-qualified Apache pilot in Iraq to have the Radical Left try to define me by my skin color alone. He’s using an old racist trope by darkening my skin to get votes... this coming from the party that likes to call Republicans racist. HA! Hypocrites. From MIT to Macomb County, liberal elites like my opponent believe the same thing: whether you’re Black or whether you’re conservative—or BOTH, like me—they’re better than us, they’re smarter than us, and we should just shut up and fall in line. Well that’s a load of BS! He’s focused on using racial tropes to win his primary. I’m focused on serving the people. That’s why, I need your help to support my conservative campaign. Will you join me? Thank you, John James | | Paid for by John James for Michigan John James for Michigan P.O. name: Hilary Franz
subject: MLK’s fight today

body:
Today, as we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., it's a moment for deep reflection on the courage exhibited by those who shaped the civil rights movement.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77127358/449458899/2121138121?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFlZGFlYzctY2JiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dDZ5QAI6TJxpWfbw8o7i9oToJ3mrTf-Q1N7DrbXybUs=&emci=10ecae8e-78b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f1edaec7-cbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=11003312)
---
| Peter,

Today, as we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., it's a moment for deep reflection on the courage exhibited by those who shaped the civil rights movement.

Dr. King's teachings emphasized the vital roles of determination, compassion, and nonviolence in the pursuit of social change. He spent his life fighting for a more equitable government. From equal access to the ballot box to a living minimum wage and affordable housing, his vision remains as relevant today as ever. Today is a reminder that our work is not done – we must celebrate Dr. King’s legacy by recommitting to action.

Our strength lies in collaborative efforts that transcend our differences, working together to forge a more perfect union. Embracing and acknowledging the diverse backgrounds and struggles of others strengthens our collective resolve. I’m ready to fight in Congress with that same spirit of collaborative effort to make our government work better for us all.

I firmly believe that only through unified action can we craft a future where every individual is free and empowered to fulfill their potential. Today, I invite you to join me in celebrating our achievements while committing to furthering Dr. King's visionary ideals.

In solidarity,

Hilary
---

body:
**** Today is MLK Day, and here at Team Dean we’re taking time to honor Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s dedication to progress, service, and community by helping to stock local pantries here in PA-04 and **[attending a few community events.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77127349/449458892/721541588?refcode=01152024_MD_MLKDay_EN_1&refcode2=e3edaec7-cbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2VkYWVjNy1jYmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prWmwIx1nB0XC9oaFfM5qTG_Cw23bXvmoQZbh_0qlhk=&emci=eaa80f4f-b1b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e3edaec7-cbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569)** We hope you’ll join us!

Mad’s passion for service stems from not only her love of Pennsylvania, but also from her parents who emphasized service to one's community and neighbors.

Team Dean would love to hear from you about how you’re planning to help your community this year. From participating in food drives to volunteering at local organizations – every act of service makes a difference.
**[Fill out this short survey and tell us about what you’re doing in your community!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77127352/449458893/-1624225604?refcode=01152024_MD_MLKDay_EN_1&refcode2=e3edaec7-cbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2VkYWVjNy1jYmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prWmwIx1nB0XC9oaFfM5qTG_Cw23bXvmoQZbh_0qlhk=&emci=eaa80f4f-b1b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e3edaec7-cbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569)** | | [ **TELL YOUR STORY** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77127353/449458894/-1624225604?refcode=01152024_MD_MLKDay_EN_1&refcode2=e3edaec7-cbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2VkYWVjNy1jYmIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prWmwIx1nB0XC9oaFfM5qTG_Cw23bXvmoQZbh_0qlhk=&emci=eaa80f4f-b1b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e3edaec7-cbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569)

Thank you – both for being such a strong member of this team and for your service to our communities.

— Team Dean

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_
