clean_body: ** Today is MLK Day, and here at Team Dean we’re taking time to honor Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s dedication to progress, service, and community by helping to stock local pantries here in PA-04 and We hope you’ll join us! Mad’s passion for service stems from not only her love of Pennsylvania, but also from her parents who emphasized service to one's community and neighbors. Team Dean would love to hear from you about how you’re planning to help your community this year. From participating in food drives to volunteering at local organizations – every act of service makes a difference. | | Thank you – both for being such a strong member of this team and for your service to our communities. — Team Dean Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. If you'd like to donate,= If you’d like to volunteer, = Paid for by Mad4PA PAC Mad 4 PA PAC PO Box 444 Glenside, PA 19038 United States Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, but we know that our inboxes can get flooded. Sign up for our to stay up-to-date with Mad and the campaign without overloading your inbox. We will only send you the important messages only a few times a month. . If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to .

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Our multi-racial movement for peace builds on Martin Luther KingJr.’s anti-war legacy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Carrying forward MLK’s legacy of justice, liberation, and peace. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv0qbKmbYxhG6bkFX2MDGy4LKAhRYpotxlWaA6ECnPKDG2ZlIYOUpgYbxBQt2R02k7dodtWpeJS7TkrZOOKtY-r2Z_zNdXA93c9C4h2vVc7DAIkpU-c3aB8DZfdgY-OqFVcBqwvvZsXvAGIIni_q2h1aNCKj9nl8QsPLLcwIftqQOgLJi4jvdhD0mRQKoNw7dmqSUBcWsg6WSC7Ps4F0tiQb8UJIjsPW-SSDXB41JQ1ZgtXZWA2KCojnq3kqIkJfRkPZYkIHCiReheiH9tDZtdWk_TscC7NaAZnyd3Xflh5gg/430/mE00y325QoCzC4zPG4x6uA/h0/NizfFIy6tHvyQLiMunV7C_NEh2u42vMzDgRIsaEMtwI)
---
Friend, Today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, a time to recognize and carry forward the civil rights leader’s legacy of justice, peace, and liberation. In 1967, MLK condemned the Vietnam War and called for a ceasefire at an event with the interfaith anti-war group Clergy and Laymen Concerned about Vietnam. Today marks 100 days of genocide against Palestinians. Last week, Rabbis for Ceasefire protested at the United Nations, joining Americans across ethnic and racial backgrounds rising up for a ceasefire. **This multi-racial movement for peace is building on Martin Luther King Jr.’s anti-war legacy.** **Grassroots groups like We the People Michigan are leading the way, advocating for a ceasefire alongside long-term work to build a more just society where all people live with dignity—akin to what MLK called “Beloved Community.”** We the People Michigan envisions a state where all our neighbors have their basic needs met, meaning every resident will have access to clean water, clean air, good food, and affordable housing. They’re building the multi-racial democracy that we deserve, empowering communities to determine their own future together and forging alliances for racial justice, housing justice, immigration justice, economic justice, and more. **[Please donate to We the People Michigan today to support their crucial work for a multi-racial democracy and for the dignity of all people.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKyey6SlHvqpF09hCM-6XWZQ0LAwPikLkfjkn4UBqcqKGA6Cx07ai3oKcioQFQVvynNfpAnvj8Zosfv_gBp8m5hkUvo9l1RjjH53MA1KgzHptbh7u0O3Oc_vzn9REYgkzEjEqR_1cqfUFpodR3w-bJCqLE8NveXBBBgY2jdxLTfelr5KUXY59xieA2V1QCL0HVTVvZM6WFw9L8BkuAabx7O1oYeV5XELhw5Iorbpr--tXrLhPOjxGU24BO1arIeHX2UaHF-vC-rKuJYZM8Jua2Z441iln9RvVwsOaxvKzO4TbjZELQnXaEOjdUxryWawnbCYM7vxJdqxxfmQ9QBL0yLVRhIulhdGo6SvAKM91PPXyWJAObEsaKe0P34q4lbcROERZR7SogrkRL15V3-RwhJF17BC_2aDXAVSPU7ZsRvNHLg7FDkBtcfza_RdxksMb7/430/mE00y325QoCzC4zPG4x6uA/h1/L4giPVgpSKnyXfWDW4N_S7Z1ofOVQC66m6KscyiYwgI)** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKyey6SlHvqpF09hCM-6XWZQ0LAwPikLkfjkn4UBqcqKFDS8VvErgV7Rvqy6kQYjcsaWgi9i0025j-GNLfNO8PcApq1-M0h_TCGrPXDbkvynE0DEOVFqQOVbpn-hPVybstNB1SY3pZhJalnwcuc1j-3wNFnLYDLdvFQFFhKof-xoBDg8IvQMKmHra4a9F8-btGsssL3-tp4vP75D2SslLbyrk0tWQNAwI98UNME8fhM1GLaB2LQGbSiOg5LybsOfXtnvMSCbCl3KAZNED_ML_9d8qLM56k62bCoo3f5flxktZ9nJ7AqSRoiyZV-lSqSllQ4OMlE3EGYWVL-hubg8qjKkUqUy70CEIlVu7hJYvwT_XLAc4quOo0Zdnt04T0IqL8ZFKBjT8qS-DTxVBgqmIWRWLVs6xJCmHEM-EuC043cs9pOOgwORLBioV84dHYVf2d/430/mE00y325QoCzC4zPG4x6uA/h2/FBYZCU-WKHcb-4A3_63rSf-nhoUO4RcwAdM4ckmg1vU)
---
Martin Luther King Jr. named racism, poverty, and militarism as three interconnected evils. We can see those intersections so clearly now.
Last month, Congress passed our country’s largest-ever military budget: $886 billion for war and destruction. Meanwhile, our neighbors are still struggling to put food on the table and a roof over their heads, as wealth inequality soars.
Our federal government is complicit in atrocities rooted in racist dehumanization, sending bombs and billions of our tax dollars abroad while neglecting the needs of our struggling communities at home.
**In his April 1967 speech, MLK said: “a nation that continues year after year to spend more money on military defense than on programs of social uplift is approaching spiritual death.”**
**We must divest from endless war and death. My district’s residents sent me to Congress to invest in life.**
Every day I’m inspired by my neighbors who are fighting for our shared humanity and who understand that no human being is disposable.
As We the People Michigan explains: “We reject narratives that pit us against one another and divide us... We believe that we are most powerful when we work together.”
[**Please chip in today to support the life-affirming work of We the People Michigan, which is building multi-racial power for a Michigan that honors the dignity of all people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKyey6SlHvqpF09hCM-6XWZQ0LAwPikLkfjkn4UBqcqKFFWkaZ6RSdrxTztzP3HlJcGIFfL09ahknnCuKK1QhG1Itk9EK_xrv8QMaklyh7ftmcetX1iw4mSCtGlkcn8KOxJC6Zy8Lc3k6XYp5RG-LYNyNqxS8u1sQvSuGaiSww7t_Kn_OvCXTB5QG8JPMuWU4fxGl8KOg3Yfm4QxGVDZZ1UG9NzXuGIEnfFHGtgjKFQ9zRxsJIYQwbajs50PBWop6aXwtKYIHAOz0DZO1CVO-M_6QO6SFlwYuuw_-kqHtStvsYybfGcaADW88PlSloCoPS1kx6S4DA0hwrJpLAs7sogsQXbCH1mhSwdm5-Vdy_kBl2i1lz-7c1ZnH6iGCKBxcJlUZtFN5Pf36ZnP3nfmXUiZmc7T63Yjprf9sYat2_02uOEkWLeVgd8MXwgf_jRUUF/430/mE00y325QoCzC4zPG4x6uA/h3/YWd2uWXt1juPZmjybWtAxRhdVUBtOc7KNT4bJitNk8k)
[CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKyey6SlHvqpF09hCM-6XWZQ0LAwPikLkfjkn4UBqcqKGNPFSToRxRspjmDepCJJQRiPlUReRlLLJPAb-gE2SCLBmoeeU502NeQ-vXrRzFwzxQRTTqSomJ-epvZpU1jCgEgO3_e0fKVk5jSsJGlopiozc6KQWE7WAEiUSInZxSzY437Q6v2IHD_wbuUb2DSPSuHGVLjjEnKNOIvd-DSt_az-KLK9c-qad973EOLKFsnthRxygV29X5jpnfcJYd4URVmXm8x6wa2P0jJ-VUBIY1_i-DSaWBhThhfKaKR4BqCyNFKDMwn6fcQ-q8dgOO_yiYckcSbNaCWeRZwq1N8Db5uxfeWIgQn1yreK7Dy10Mj73SnDtei4SArB_cvYI3OOKhHZ05lhYx-ZxGNHMVutRdCLo8jrCAz_hZialfzGNWgNK9Ih7DatKS9TKzzgd0alZ9/430/mE00y325QoCzC4zPG4x6uA/h4/6BHxPmBrf18eF4CifUbQtwljwiQ9V-f7qsbISa1po80)
---
Together, we can create a more just future where all of us thrive.
“We are confronted with the fierce urgency of now,” said MLK in April 1967. “Now let us begin. Now let us rededicate ourselves to the long and bitter, but beautiful, struggle for a new world.”
Onward together in solidarity,
Rashida

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Budding leaders in The Bronx
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This King Day, we’re celebrating educational organizers making a difference in our community.
#
Just over a year ago, a young Bronx student named Olivia wrote to Alexandria asking for a literacy hub at her school. 📚 She mentioned that during the pandemic, it had been hard to get new books.
Olivia’s principal, teachers, family, and community all supported her idea. So together with Start Lighthouse, an org founded in The Bronx dedicated to narrowing the literacy gap, Alexandria secured federal funding to make it happen.
This Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, we’re lifting up Start Lighthouse and their work to revitalize defunct library spaces in public schools and bring multicultural reading programs to classrooms all around NYC.
[Dr. King fought tirelessly for education and opportunity for all. Join us to support these grassroots organizers who are fighting for the same. Will you make a $5 contribution today so Start Lighthouse can advance childhood literacy with a social justice lens?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240115.YgrqbD&refcode=em20240115-5644-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5644%2E2526796%2EkvQE1H)
Just over a year after Olivia wrote to Alexandria, we are celebrating the opening of a new literacy hub for all the students at Olivia’s school to enjoy!
Start Lighthouse used the funds that Alexandria secured from Congress to buy desks and teaching materials. They also curated a reading selection that embraces inclusivity and the diversity of this Bronx school, and will now be able to help children become proficient readers by 3rd grade.
Olivia’s story speaks so much to how **every single one of us in our community can have power.**
Olivia had a vision, and the adults around her believed in that. Now, an entire school of budding leaders has access to a reading center because she took action.
[For Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, help us celebrate Dr. King's legacy of activism, community, and opportunity for all by supporting Start Lighthouse’s work to bring the empowerment of reading and education to children around NYC →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240115.YgrqbD&refcode=em20240115-5644-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5644%2E2526796%2EkvQE1H)
Thank you for standing with this movement and our community.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=3&akid=5644%2E2526796%2EkvQE1H) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=4&akid=5644%2E2526796%2EkvQE1H) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=5&akid=5644%2E2526796%2EkvQE1H)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=5644%2E2526796%2EkvQE1H)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=5644%2E2526796%2EkvQE1H)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

subject: Tonight. Midnight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:

**Our FIRST deadline of the election year is TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT.**

Joe Biden, George Soros, and their billionaire socialist friends are going to spend millions of dollars in the coming months to try to defeat me, and they won’t stop until I throw in the towel.

_But I’m not about to give up so easily, and I know you aren’t either._

This is the last time I’ll ask before the deadline. I can’t meet this critical goal unless every single patriot steps up.

subject: LA Times Editorial Board Endorses Dave Min
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2bd381dc7fce/la-times-editorial-board-endorses-dave-min-15668532?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For immediate release:** January 15, 2024
**Contact:** press@davemin.com
**Endorsement: Dave Min should replace Katie Porter in the 47th Congressional District**
_By the LA Times Editorial Board_
_The 47th Congressional District in Orange County belongs to Democrats right now. But with Rep. Katie Porter (D-Irvine) running for the U.S. Senate rather than reelection, the race is more of a toss-up.

That’s a troubling notion. Aside from legitimate fears of what could happen to civil rights, basic social services and democracy if the GOP gains more seats in the House of Representatives, the leading Republican running for the seat, Scott Baugh, is out of touch with the district. The area was once solidly Republican but has been shifting leftward in recent years and is now a swing district with a mix of views, encompassing the coast from Laguna Beach to Seal Beach, as well as Costa Mesa and Irvine.

Baugh is a former state assemblyman who ran unsuccessfully for Congress twice. That included 2022, when he lost to Porter. His belief that there should be a federal law [restricting abortion rights](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=887a563ea8&e=7017cc100e) is out of keeping with voters’ values — and with the rights of women to have autonomy over their own bodies. He opposed the federal Respect for Marriage Act, which was signed into law in 2022 and codified the right for same-sex and interracial couples to marry, and he opposes banning assault weapons._

_He recently said that [“wokism”](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=f30174b65a&e=7017cc100e) was more of a threat to religious freedom than both world wars; perhaps if he had lived through the Holocaust, he would know better. In the 1990s, he faced [federal felony charges](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=43bf86f7bb&e=7017cc100e) over campaign finance violations; those were later reduced to civil violations for which he paid close to $50,000._

_Nine other people are seeking the seat in the March primary, including two locally prominent Democrats: state Sen. [Dave Min](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=e2bf5e9142&e=7017cc100e) (D-Irvine) and [Joanna Weiss](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=166d30f0b9&e=7017cc100e), an attorney and founder of a social- and political-action nonprofit, [Women for American Values and Ethics](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=f8af0dd5a1&e=7017cc100e)._

_The platforms of Min and Weiss are similar — both intend to protect a woman’s right to abortion at the federal level and say they are ready to battle climate change, work toward immigration reform and push sensible gun regulation. The difference is in their leadership skills, legislative experience and ability to achieve results and communicate a sense of cooperation._

_Min, an affable lawmaker who has authored successful bills on the environment and guns, has the clear advantage here. Before his political career, Min was, like Porter (who has [endorsed his candidacy](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=c3ebb87c81&e=7017cc100e)), a professor at UC Irvine law school. And like Porter, he should be elected to represent the 47th District._ _Min has not introduced as many bills as some of his colleagues during his three years in Sacramento, but he has authored bills on important issues. One bill, now under consideration, would set up a system for [phasing out offshore oil and gas drilling ](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=f9a22b18fc&e=7017cc100e)in state waters. Another, signed into law in 2022, bans gun and ammunition sales on [state-owned land](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=abcd46a8e4&e=7017cc100e).

There is one trouble spot in Min’s history, which Weiss is already using in her campaign: He was arrested last May on suspicion of [drunk driving](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=babb8d40da&e=7017cc100e) in Sacramento and later pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor. Min was pulled over after he stopped at a red light to check cross-traffic, but then proceeded through the intersection while the light was still red and with his headlights off.

It wasn’t a trivial incident, but to his credit, Min never treated it that way. He immediately made a straightforward public statement about his arrest and apologized. He didn’t try to make excuses or pretend that the arrest was unfair, overblown or an attack on liberalism. He has completed court-ordered community service and says that although he never had a problem with alcohol, he immediately stopped drinking. Too many political events — that’s where he was drinking before the arrest — are alcohol-infused, he said. He also, of his own accord, entered into therapy. More politicians who err badly should follow his example.

Min inspires confidence that he won’t repeat the mistake — and that he would be an excellent member of Congress._
[Read the full article here.](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=fa9b2c3056&e=7017cc100e)
---

PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616

But with Rep. Katie Porter (D-Irvine) running for the U.S. Senate rather than reelection, the race is more of a toss-up. That’s a troubling notion. Aside from legitimate fears of what could happen to civil rights, basic social services and democracy if the GOP gains more seats in the House of Representatives, the leading Republican running for the seat, Scott Baugh, is out of touch with the district. We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=29c66bbd0ce143e86dfb24c185c561f18a0d5bc56a4dff392d6c60d4f866e4f02bf01017d4c843e24834cb88cfa74ad452e21b6087b2d999)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=29c66bbd0ce143e86dfb24c185c561f18a0d5bc56a4dff392d6c60d4f866e4f02bf01017d4c843e24834cb88cfa74ad452e21b6087b2d999)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bob=20Christian?=
subject: More than a dream
body:
Dr. King called us to action. America needs to act -- for our Republic -- more than ever. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9d0e1afc452f/more-than-a-dream?e=3d27610f3d)
---
| |
---
| | **“Everybody can be great, because everybody can serve.” ** \-- Martin Luther King Jr. Today we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., who would have turned 95 today had he not been gunned down by a white supremacist driven over the edge by King’s non-violent movement demanding equality and justice for all people. I often wonder what Dr. King’s leadership and legacy would have been if he had lived through all these decades of our lives. I wonder what our nation would have become if we had not only stayed on the path of righteousness he was blazing, but if we had traveled it together. I believe we would be so much closer to the dream of little black boys and girls and little white boys and girls holding hands in the sun than we are today. So much closer. Now, for the first time in my life, we are going backwards. Away from the dream. The Civil Rights Act of 1964 and the Voting Rights Act of 1965 have both been gutted and reimagined as barriers to voting instead of the overwhelming freedom of their original intent – freedom for every American to vote safely and assured that their vote will be counted. Young black men and women are still being gunned down in our streets or left to be eaten by bedbugs in our prisons. Education is being ripped to shreds in the interests of protecting us from “unacceptable” knowledge. Women across the country are being forced to endure life-threatening pregnancies as they are reduced to reproduction factories and second-class citizens. Human beings seeking a better life are being treated as chattel at our borders, either flown around the country like cargo or left to die in the river. I am running for Congress again to stop our country from going backwards. It can be hard to see the vision through the chaos surrounding us, but the path has not changed. We need the courage to continue the work. Martin Luther King Day is the only federal holiday named an official day of service. All around us are opportunities to become involved in our communities and to lend a hand to our neighbors. Take the time to help feed the hungry or work a clothing drive. Go to your local library or school and read to children. Attend one of the many parades or events scheduled for today and take the time to learn and listen. It doesn’t take much to make a difference. “Everybody can be great, because everybody can serve.” -- Martin Luther King Jr.

---
|
---
|
---
| [Click to Contribute](https://christianforga6.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=377cebd307a6b880bd19996d8&id=50a9046d27&e=3d27610f3d "Click to Contribute")

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: Thinking back...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
The road to the Iowa Caucuses has been long and winding, but together, we've made it. I have a note to share ahead of this evening.

---

With just hours to go before the first votes start to take place,**I wanted to send over my recollection of the days that got us here.** Thinking back, I wouldn't be where I am today if it weren't for the incredible outpouring of support that the launch of our campaign was met with.

You are the reason we are going to shock the nation with our support at the caucuses today. **We don't have much time before voting begins for the first time in the 2024 presidential cycle, and this is the moment for all of our hard work to pay off.** _With your support, our momentum can be stronger than ever as Iowans head to their caucuses. They need to see that they won't be fighting alone, and I need your help with that._ Everything has led up to THIS MOMENT. Ron DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2df5574ed6d4e8bad12697812785c1a&_e=bSGN2xxVfmmgy1VeFqerRv5aKlG8YksZHuVTgwCZl5uKjkY8XHnKUBW5MiKoZggkRx6egjxXnSqxIbQn94p1Fa_-k_Vy6DH9G7j2ZS0y0oQ_wwu67xSLVyS0aS1GWUt8EaM_Dj0Co2VWHYtYsNg4OhHn6yLMSQFo-gGzwE3m9GZWoDaFkbaTFyW9O443mE8D7Ry4sNszKgzAG1zP3U6yKDZYXGtYZ1C4YiaHfrDkZFP-ArK8br80IDZ7Hsio1gB8A-24x2BpG1mqa5s0sJcYBx_e5E6VLNEzsKY2tRrs7jBJJU20XOnlhpq4bfKOmA94fVvs9PudHQKVw8UqwSVjfMflK0AwlSgD6y8SubEwQ3HXzFXLcKLsZPDdrz-SfbDSe9EHneKqV0fHcBye4iIF6nNcDHvic04iXas7a7qfyYSkfcKXmIx4saQ94wTYvbiN)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2df5574ed6d4e8bad12697812785c1a&_e=bSGN2xxVfmmgy1VeFqerRv5aKlG8YksZHuVTgwCZl5uKjkY8XHnKUBW5MiKoZggkRx6egjxXnSqxIbQn94p1Fa_-k_Vy6DH9G7j2ZS0y0oQ_wwu67xSLVyS0aS1GWUt8EaM_Dj0Co2VWHYtYsNg4OhHn6yLMSQFo-gGzwE3m9GZWoDaFkbaTFyW9O443mE8D7Ry4sNszKgzAG1zP3U6yKDZYXGtYZ1C4YiaHfrDkZFP-ArK8br80IDZ7Hsio1gB8A-24x2BpG1mqa5s0sJcYBx_e5E6VLNEzsKY2tRrs7jB8JojsH0h5LnFkv9j24jWtbCY4dGn_CtGkLr9tobZ0LOxEGuIYf_71AJ38KV94AWxKZwn-f8axhnbXlIAGfvqPZjUrgKacL4mqesVcx_TMw4OXwLNBt-Ip6aVqnb479ngadZ4ORl1M-0xhs9L3PV6j)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

Throughout this campaign, I’ve talked with a lot of voters who are sick and tired of the political games they’re seeing in Washington and Harrisburg. After all, voters don’t want to see non-stop partisan bickering from their leaders — they want real results for the working families who need it most.
That’s why I’m running a different kind of campaign for Attorney General. This positive, pro-democracy movement has an opportunity to defeat extremism, win in November, and send a battle-tested fighter to Harrisburg who knows how to deliver results to communities across PA.
But I want to be completely honest: **This race isn’t going to be a walk in the park.** As we speak, the far-right is preparing their vicious, misleading attacks on my record and my pro-choice, pro-Democracy, pro-Pennsylvania agenda. That’s why I’m reaching out directly to you.
[_**Just a few bucks can go a long way in a critically important election like this. Will you help me defeat extremism by chipping in a donation of any amount right now? →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77129202/449463976/-1407611433?refcode=email_011524_11-years&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDAzYTAxOS1kMGIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Lg54YgDiJ50ftCf__7oEoiPtnsYjbmxw3fkuBpc10U=)

Fellow Conservative, **Urgent – Democrats’ plans for Texas exposed in private email.** In a renewed push to take Senator Cruz down, Democrat Chuck Schumer just sent an email to Democrat donors and we have it. _See the screenshot below and _Schumer’s email to Democrat donors_ ..._

[](http://trk.tedcruz.-B2DwO42K6bH6iA)

**Schumer says:** _“With the retirement of Sen. Joe Manchin, we could hold every single seat we have and still lose Senate control. That's why it's so imperative that we help Colin Allred**defeat Ted Cruz in Texas.** _ **_Polls are showing these two neck and neck, and Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable GOP Senator in the country._**_We can win this race, but the GOP knows it too...”_ *** We can’t let Chuck Schumer and the absolutely unhinged Democrats take Texas and hold the United States Senate. That would destroy not only Texas but our entire Nation. Now with their frantic push to fund their far-left choice against Ted Cruz, we must urgently increase our fundraising goals to ensure we have enough money to fight back and match their campaign spending in every Texas county. _Please help us protect Texas, and Save America –_ __we need you__ _! _ **[**Every dollar helps! name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: This is how we honor Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s vision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
re: fighting climate injustice

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77130061/449466690/1328794144?refcode=ea.6af1dd0f-d2b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.6af1dd0f-d2b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhZjFkZDBmLWQyYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_92GhlcrFZcPwfjEfxHRMWgi1CMTl5RLdBTus5Qe2Do=&emci=ac237fac-69b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=6af1dd0f-d2b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)
---
| Friend, as we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. today, we at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC want to invite you to join us in reflecting on his message of justice, equality, and liberation.

Dr. King's commitment to bringing about a better world inspires us to address one often overlooked piece of the struggle for racial equality — the climate crisis and its impact on our Black and Brown communities.

The consequences of unabated expansion of the fossil fuel industry go beyond those of a changing climate. With each passing season, sea levels and temperatures continue to rise at an alarming rate, and so too in certain areas do incidents of infant mortality, disease, economic inequality, and a whole host of quality-of-life issues.

From the health impacts of drilling in communities in and around Los Angeles to the devastation caused by flooding in New Orleans, to the environmental contamination in the Ohio River Valley, to the water crisis in Flint, Michigan, the impacts of corporate pollution and environmental neglect in our most vulnerable communities should serve as stark reminders that despite decades of progress won by the blood, sweat, and tears of remarkable leaders like Dr. King, we must remain vigilant in the fight for justice, equality, and liberation for all of our communities.

While there is so much work to do, now is not the time for despair. Now is the time for action and hope. We hope today may serve as a reminder not only of the impact of a great man but also of the power of collective action and what we can accomplish together by standing up for what is right.

So, in this spirit, we invite you to join us in our mission to elect bold leaders who will fight for a livable future for all of our communities. In the coming days and weeks, we will continue to share with you how you can support this work to elect climate champions and hold all of our elected officials accountable in the fight for justice.

Thank you,

All of us at Jane Fonda Climate PAC
---

clean_body: re: fighting climate injustice | | Friend, as we honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. today, we at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC want to invite you to join us in reflecting on his message of justice, equality, and liberation. Dr. King's commitment to bringing about a better world inspires us to address one often overlooked piece of the struggle for racial equality — the climate crisis and its impact on our Black and Brown communities. The consequences of unabated expansion of the fossil fuel industry go beyond those of a changing climate. With each passing season, sea levels and temperatures continue to rise at an alarming rate, and so too in certain areas do incidents of infant mortality, disease, economic inequality, and a whole host of quality-of-life issues. From the health impacts of drilling in communities in and around Los Angeles to the devastation caused by flooding in New Orleans, to the environmental contamination in the Ohio River Valley, to the water crisis in Flint, Michigan, the impacts of corporate pollution and environmental neglect in our most vulnerable communities should serve as stark reminders that despite decades of progress won by the blood, sweat, and tears of remarkable leaders like Dr. King, we must remain vigilant in the fight for justice, equality, and liberation for all of our communities. While there is so much work to do, now is not the time for despair. Now is the time for action and hope. We hope today may serve as a reminder not only of the impact of a great man but also of the power of collective action and what we can accomplish together by standing up for what is right. So, in this spirit, we invite you to join us in our mission to elect bold leaders who will fight for a livable future for all of our communities. In the coming days and weeks, we will continue to share with you how you can support this work to elect climate champions and hold all of our elected officials accountable in the fight for justice. Thank you, All of us at Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: We must wake up every day and choose justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friends,

Today we honor and remember the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. His fight for racial justice inspired a sea change in our nation and around the world.

Nearly 60 years ago, Dr. King led thousands of people to protest against barriers to voting. Civil rights activists worked tirelessly to pass the 1965 Voting Rights Act, a landmark piece of legislation — but Dr. King knew that the work was far from over. We can see today that he was right.

As we honor Dr. King and those who marched with him, we must remember that this work is the work of lifetimes. He understood that changing hearts and changing laws worked in tandem; that progress on each front allowed the other to grow. We must wake up every day and decide to work for justice and equality, and teach our children to do the same.

With these ideals in mind, I recommit to Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s vision for total political enfranchisement and voting freedom. And I invite you, {FirstName or 'friend'}}, to reflect on Martin Luther King Jr.’s life and legacy with me.

Together,

Eric Swalwell

body:
The legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is much bigger than just one day
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77130531/449467887/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWJlOWY3NS1kM2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXpnPWb9pco-XXnHSxnlDiWDlYqlX4Tdf-ZIsroX2Hw=&emci=8579bef2-68b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=05be9f75-d3b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Today we honor him on this national holiday, but the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is much bigger than just one day. We should take this day as an opportunity to recommit ourselves to the values that Dr. King fought for tirelessly. When we look around at the state of our country today, it's easy to see that many of these ideas are endangered. Some are losing faith in our democracy, while others foster resentment and vitriol through spewing hateful ideologies. It's easy to become disheartened by the scale of the challenges that we face, but we owe it to Dr. King, we owe it to ourselves, and we owe it to one another to steel ourselves and dive into this fight. Today and every day, I am as committed as ever to realizing this country's original covenant of equal justice for all. I'll leave you with the words of Dr. King himself: "The moral arc of the universe is long, but it bends towards justice." Together in hope, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: The legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is much bigger than just one day | | | | Today we honor him on this national holiday, but the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is much bigger than just one day. We should take this day as an opportunity to recommit ourselves to the values that Dr. King fought for tirelessly. When we look around at the state of our country today, it's easy to see that many of these ideas are endangered. Some are losing faith in our democracy, while others foster resentment and vitriol through spewing hateful ideologies. It's easy to become disheartened by the scale of the challenges that we face, but we owe it to Dr. King, we owe it to ourselves, and we owe it to one another to steel ourselves and dive into this fight. Today and every day, I am as committed as ever to realizing this country's original covenant of equal justice for all. I'll leave you with the words of Dr. King himself: "The moral arc of the universe is long, but it bends towards justice." Together in hope, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. **Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Would MLK Identify w/BLM or MAGA
body:
MLK - BLM OR MAGA? Today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day and a good question to ask is whether Dr. King would identify with BLM or MAGA if he were aliv
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1914.1.481f454d2a30d0697dd667cccc7b646a) |
---
## MLK - BLM OR MAGA?
---
Today is **Martin Luther King Jr. Day** and a good question to ask is whether **Dr. King** would identify with _BLM_ or _MAGA_ if he were alive today. Some basic facts about **MLK** , **BLM** & **MAGA** are essential to answer the question. Here are 4 facts about MLK: **\- MLK Was Under FBI Watch For Politics**
**\- MLK Was Against Endless Foreign Wars**
**\- MLK Believed One Should Judge Character Not Color Of Skin**
**\- MLK Was A Bible Believing Christian & Preacher** Everything **MLK** was for **BLM** is against. Everything **MLK** was against **BLM** is for. I am convinced that if **MLK** were alive today he would _HATE_ the **BLM** movement and _LOVE_ the **MAGA** movement. In fact, I believe **MLK** would be a leading/vocal member of [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1915.1.6c0de9ced277c3e07a9645c092bd9a43). If **MLK** were alive today I am sure he would tell you: **We MUST win in 2024 with President Trump for ALL Americans.** Now to actually do that the **largest voting bloc** in America (Evangelical Christians) must turn out and vote their value system (the values of MLK). Unfortunately, the turnout among Evangelicals is _terrible_. **How do we mobilize the Evangelical voters?** I believe by mobilizing the pastors. [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1916.1.a4d4d31eb215edb9325a3f793d194a25) has numerous **Prayer Rallies** scheduled in 2024 in churches throughout the swing states. __I want thank our Partners for their continued support in the efforts of[Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1917.1.e4d6c298af1f61795a3cac7731307dbd) to make this possible. I want to ask you to partner with [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1918.1.1930369f73e6b114c61c096006575578) as we prepare for the upcoming 2024 Election. Here is how you can partner with us: -**Share the recorded National Prayer Call** of [Pastor's For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1919.1.a46286915609665060f75e4bdb050240) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1920.1.aafc877e0b7b0a6f0f61b34075490646) -Join the NEXT upcoming National Prayer Call/Host a Rally at your church. Visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1921.1.594750c5d27d95d6b006165a4e3005ab) -**Make a donation to**[Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1922.1.fc4a0023fe759703599d12e5beef84cc) of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1923.1.33481cb2ad20a745d0da871b2bf417d1) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1924.1.377f5b4df603da40030aba3702ab14e9), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1925.1.9e7c4438cd9de5caf218d11ae4f06bec), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1926.1.e365c8b564ca32cfa0549ebd36234fe1), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1927.1.f277b1373e58682260132c382e3a938a), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1928.1.5bae53c58dfaa0b8caa629424b12765e), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1929.1.bf1ce9c3a20206a9f2df8444d38f75f4)). ## Upcoming Event Hosted At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1932.1.72c1142b6b8689caddd848e5734b2631)
---
For 60 years people have asked: **WHO REALLY KILLED JFK?** _Movies_ , _books_ , _blogs_ and _government reports_ have all tried to answer the daunting question. One person who has put forth more evidence than anyone I know in answering this question is **Roger Stone** who has written a **New York Times Bestseller** answering who really killed JFK. **Roger Stone** is coming to Tulsa, OK for a _SPECIAL 2 Hour Event_ to lay out the evidence of who he believes killed JFK. There will also be a **LIVE Q &A session with Mr. Stone**. **When** : Thursday, February 1 | 6:30 pm **Where** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1933.1.98bdabe79416e08604fd3e1e477a4e97) | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 **MUST RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1934.1.506cb5dd67e804fa1fdd84256acacc5b)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1935.1.81a433b93625c0206644427028066dc1) Roger J. Stone
---
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the **Netflix documentary Get Me Roger Stone**.
**Richard Nixon** , **Ronald Reagan** , and **Donald Trump** —all of these Presidents relied on **Roger Stone** to secure their seat in the Oval Office. In a 45-year career in American politics, Stone has worked on over 700 campaigns for public office.

The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5505620.1938.1.2ac62bbc5eaeecb2adb7ec370b3629c7) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. body:
The road to the Iowa Caucuses has been long and winding, but together, we've made it. I have a note to share ahead of this evening.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObMnhIS9LtxytZEdE_W7olOs5YnuzWDYjB6AMWqPX8xVY-yz0vlrIi9F1J2THaRQd-5kjoC5URGtDtOLTqit9fsN2LwgvXrzA7-66-oGFRJtVvxGgQZKAPNZkYNP8C0P9A4RFT7qkbnEthSnJLKiYrpX)
---
Hey Friend, Today is the day of the Iowa Caucuses--the most important day our campaign has faced yet. With just hours to go before the first votes start to take place,**I wanted to send over my recollection of the days that got us here.** Thinking back, I wouldn't be where I am today if it weren't for the incredible outpouring of support that the launch of our campaign was met with.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObOqYnXY2joIF5IfRUHmcTsReclxUXcFeLnRimDkQzJSsnxYv6Z4BAeJkXo4YscCLGWD45gwewZx1ZAlSCyTizoMXzRDTbfuVR_VPEPHaUnnDeuxcEJtU6DNcQdtxqs1xBnjeYMReDzLfOnd4WZ_uW40)
---

When we first started, the American people made it clear that they were ready for a change and willing to fight for one. We've been underestimated initially, but we haven't let our voices be silenced.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObOwqRQKwHflv6mehViI5yEVTQfnywCaQATlD60bRni4_faSIoh-a9xzb0kcfjyHlRDjOt1A7E9twfm_crkXC4X0LZLTtNdsBF43-KipAYx0R5tCtnKTgbqriKjDXg8r34W70eGEqKzSJyTH6q8mcL4m)
---
Since our earliest days, we haven't slowed down, and we haven't let up. We have been determined to outcampaign every candidate at every turn and reach as many Americans as possible. That's why we made it to every single one of Iowa's 99 counties ahead of **today.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObP-DJqQ71e3YizYBLQ1vRJZCgJXrlai19iLOe9GU7csb1bBd8EbsZ2qZF4H0x6H7_bAt-dNxV9zJcVFLFyRl3iscjwJi8mIan-h91V6Am7mOis-K71xUlUqg6lpzYIQCprCUOOrJ1A8LJJWUcD3Aqas)
---

We haven't just reached people in person. We've taken our message to every news outlet from Fox, to CNN, to MSNBC, to countless others by participating in interviews, roundtable discussions, debates, town halls, etc... We haven't left one stone unturned.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObOIAJxS_vuOG3njn97STgMe10YZCjbThSlbZvIxqf65N8ZJipeW_rMnamKwoDuESiDy5Ev0DwGxbdw14WiY7kYN4B_J26vPpjzQo9rApy4YFMPS7PG0h3XVbz1dwWixLSvG1pVzhhVtfSITFmDVMif5)
---

Along the way, we've earned some major endorsements, such as Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds', Congressman Chip Roy's, Congressman Thomas Massie's, and the list goes on with state, local, and evangelical leaders up and down the country.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObMJgTFLvrJTfBzZ4Aa1o7dnOrkqe5YEdWmjH-ssrCvBNuXRmglRIGqg8HOtK45c4WyALXJ2mndvp_SoGW39NFIsY_3C1ckYUjB9zqmWq5okyAIS3U2OqnMdTyENXTEkWfXATJjd5G3jSdT_rlAxI7hw)
---
Friend, no one expected us to have the momentum that we do, and none of it would have been possible without you. You are the reason we are going to shock the nation with our support at the caucuses today. **We don't have much time before voting begins for the first time in the 2024 presidential cycle, and this is the moment for all of our hard work to pay off.** _With your support, our momentum can be stronger than ever as Iowans head to their caucuses. They need to see that they won't be fighting alone, and I need your help with that._ Everything has led up to THIS MOMENT. So Friend, I am asking you to step up one last time before caucusing begins. **[Can you send in just $10, $15, or $25 in the next 9 hours?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObPqNQnooDPEMKtSfZRFl3vJc_sw77WbgnOSwHv7Iej8jd-BBggjFebxZ2UfzHo15y2g_SJ3paIM7c0agnYrGHFgQT6aEDacoD6vJYaJIB1z4HFfA3ho5bcMJ_uqkavXVrAWfu5OIOTTpbmaTKR0acHO)** This is our time for choosing. Tonight, our Great American Comeback can begin to take shape, but it all depends on how much we're willing to fight for it.
---
| | [Send In Your Support Here](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObNisR3_Pq6cyVlTRFFIp9X3heJhbGqL8-J2UDkNF3haMk1H3YzUUxDJaSlMLjI7ob7RQ4WBrrttcV01U1QVBnZfyFSXh2TpFfw28_MU-fsywbOyIvrJIBSq6BHh6mBv95x9qySrXwQSUy-t-jaOSGmM)
---
**_Thank you for all you've done to get our team this far. I know I can count on you to help us go into this critical evening stronger than ever._** God bless,
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObOgPdUAQ3tDkrKsObInI2kJarBbLJQ2WfqDbQGZg35SmjYmXP8oASlwNmQx1uSXWNIyzozTxi9MkFrWMI6ULD7gbAnUTgZdtq3Br5hdFAAB_wRU69bcMBrc5GX0QJ3Lb2S8v74czB0Kom_RUwTbqI8E)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObNvMVXViuT6NSEe90JHEWQwK8gRBkh9_kkeUj7nhXtv1CB6e4p7JXC3Ed19TYL2c8c5lam6ynMBIvb6wIJ9YN97lAtjMczJfdR-4rblHmzoAxJXFd5WZurbIuVdReGYcaXA7b-6j2OnvPk0GH2FsHbt)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f1e7a1bb10f475ebee2dfda9daad121&_e=rWmgkcgJQ9rUhPWFMF0SehF6qLRvbowMem6cuuJiRFqyJbyIPhjY_dpBNlnLYp3DnCz2RHS_DLn0JJHGv2tS2jsWMCUcsnfjnQvVtfitVNYIQa92gKmCFuVBL2lqiJ5TLHQB1qQlTCbB7UJNHBCfof_ItGDqhGpJ9JlKorD24_pY4JME21KUw7pPhmUASEZfblBztpLQCtx0b3kStxvxLW4ozq1QlQuUpyXrPVjYIOBkBz4GfMDYhMrJSXa-Me1Iheu-u33tsrtI6xz_3uKdLpa8ocX8iq4vM7pr48ZjObMMGEZGxBg-XVTqZsM25avgUVikc1z4e6SiDAmIA0IAyv-7VkMwngJHAChL1GjLfpZvtwWjoPNgL0iaUqjmP6wtAKChnvspxQkiiLPd8ssCMWxLy1xxptqi-JR3KjP6xWk2cRkLcqHZbec7B9UKL4X-)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

clean_body: The road to the Iowa Caucuses has been long and winding, but together, we've made it. I have a note to share ahead of this evening. | | | | | | | | | | Hey Friend, Today is the day of the Iowa Caucuses--the most important day our campaign has faced yet. With just hours to go before the first votes start to take place,I wanted to send over my recollection of the days that got us here. Thinking back, I wouldn't be where I am today if it weren't for the incredible outpouring of support that the launch of our campaign was met with. | When we first started, the American people made it clear that they were ready for a change and willing to fight for one. We've been underestimated initially, but we haven't let our voices be silenced. | Since our earliest days, we haven't slowed down, and we haven't let up. We have been determined to outcampaign every candidate at every turn and reach as many Americans as possible. That's why we made it to every single one of Iowa's 99 counties ahead of today. | We haven't just reached people in person. We've taken our message to every news outlet from Fox, to CNN, to MSNBC, to countless others by participating in interviews, roundtable discussions, debates, town halls, etc... We haven't left one stone unturned. | Along the way, we've earned some major endorsements, such as Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds', Congressman Chip Roy's, Congressman Thomas Massie's, and the list goes on with state, local, and evangelical leaders up and down the country. | Friend, no one expected us to have the momentum that we do, and none of it would have been possible without you. You are the reason we are going to shock the nation with our support at the caucuses today. We don't have much time before voting begins for the first time in the 2024 presidential cycle, and this is the moment for all of our hard work to pay off. With your support, our momentum can be stronger than ever as Iowans head to their caucuses. They need to see that they won't be fighting alone, and I need your help with that. Everything has led up to THIS MOMENT. So Friend, I am asking you to step up one last time before caucusing begins. This is our time for choosing. Tonight, our Great American Comeback can begin to take shape, but it all depends on how much we're willing to fight for it. | | Thank you for all you've done to get our team this far. I know I can count on you to help us go into this critical evening stronger than ever. God bless, | Ron DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | - On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. name: Andrei Cherny
subject: What we’re fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
One of my favorite quotes from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is, “the arc of history is long but it curves toward justice.” |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77130800/449468801/-1589847016?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U1MjRiNDktZDRiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=82HdAF7rm0E8EWMUjSeqlPGTfPYETWkq6PhUfdbzLHQ=&emci=c65723ed-d1b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3e524b49-d4b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13520922)
---
Peter, On December 5, 1955, just four days after Rosa Parks was arrested, a 26-year-old pastor, new to Montgomery, was chosen to speak at the first organizing meeting of the bus boycott. As we celebrate Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Day, let's remember the very first words he said that day: _"We are here in a general sense because first and foremost we are American citizens and we are determined to apply our citizenship to the fullness of its meaning. We are here also because of our love for democracy, because of our deep-seated belief that democracy transformed from thin paper to thick action is the greatest form of government on earth."_ **A democracy of “thick action” is what we’re all fighting for in 2024.** The Republican politicians like Donald Trump and David Schweikert, who worked to overturn the election on January 6, were only able to threaten our democracy because “We the People” have lost faith in it. Last week, Gallup released polling numbers showing that a record low of just 28% of U.S. adults are satisfied with the way democracy is working in the country. _Can we blame them?_ Large majorities of Americans want common-sense gun laws, immigration reform, and border security, but year after year, Republicans in Congress like David Schweikert have blocked action on these issues. **We need to show Americans that democracy can work and that it is worth fighting for.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77130802/449468804/-857414343?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U1MjRiNDktZDRiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=82HdAF7rm0E8EWMUjSeqlPGTfPYETWkq6PhUfdbzLHQ=) Earlier this year, my son and I visited Selma. One of my favorite quotes from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is, _“the arc of history is long but it curves toward justice.”_ Often, people misinterpret this quote. He wasn’t saying that things will get better automatically over time. Dr. King said those words as he was about to lead hundreds across Edmund Pettus Bridge into danger. He knew that that arc only curves when **we** take action. [**So Peter, I’m asking you to join us in this fight today. Will you chip in $10 or more to help us win and take action on all threats to our democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77130805/449468807/-857414343?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U1MjRiNDktZDRiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=82HdAF7rm0E8EWMUjSeqlPGTfPYETWkq6PhUfdbzLHQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77130810/449468811/-857414343?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U1MjRiNDktZDRiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=82HdAF7rm0E8EWMUjSeqlPGTfPYETWkq6PhUfdbzLHQ=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: So be it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77130941/449469071/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240115_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0YWQ4MWI3LWQ0YjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XtuTvkvP4BA60MukcwXGru6jlZczOiKta_sjIMMiLHM=)
Peter,
Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks.
But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**
If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**

name: Gwen S. Moore (personal)
subject: “We are not makers of history.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
“We are made by history.” – Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77131785/449470857/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc1NTExMy1kN2IzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2f0tVpXiKPVeHIbLDY31w3pnmnIoZySamlGD68Xvtxo=&emci=4b402136-d6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=09755113-d7b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1486204)
---
| | Peter, Our democracy embodies the essence of bravery and strength exemplified by Dr. King and his fellow Civil Rights Activists. They boldly fought for equality through peaceful means, even in the face of violence. Their calls for respect and equality reverberated amidst a sea of hatred and actions driven by intolerance. As Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. once said, "We are not makers of history. We are made by history." This quote resonates deeply, especially as our nation yet again finds itself at a tipping point. It reminds us that injustice anywhere poses a threat to justice everywhere, echoing the powerful sentiments expressed in Dr. King's Letter from the Birmingham Jail. We have made remarkable progress, but we must continue to build upon our achievements, striving to restore justice and equality for all. Let us carry forward the lessons gleaned from the wisdom of Dr. King. Confront hate with boundless love, combat discrimination with unwavering inclusion. Together, we will forge a more perfect union, just as we have done before, because together, #WeRepresent! (P.S. They boldly fought for equality through peaceful means, even in the face of violence. Their calls for respect and equality reverberated amidst a sea of hatred and actions driven by intolerance. As Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. once said, "We are not makers of history. We are made by history." This quote resonates deeply, especially as our nation yet again finds itself at a tipping point. It reminds us that injustice anywhere poses a threat to justice everywhere, echoing the powerful sentiments expressed in Dr. King's Letter from the Birmingham Jail. We have made remarkable progress, but we must continue to build upon our achievements, striving to restore justice and equality for all. Let us carry forward the lessons gleaned from the wisdom of Dr. King. Confront hate with boundless love, combat discrimination with unwavering inclusion. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=037c1dde282b4945b08b878d5f00d209&_e=T5kiQuHlSNFy1JvaUpgriP1PO5y_yXaAn9GO335yC7nwf1YxyEXCuQQsM0lsskGVQjAdSnJsDt7f_8JF7TLsaSZ7uBm0o17VnkAAZ_FxDSrbHJH-nlB2gJzxrhOrzZ9VJEWSvYllgqeHvY6J7hVwIwO7drCrIL27wX5hBHiwUOw3BxgIYtGmdM0zjKfe6D-TWYC0Ly0IgY4m8tP9Lx7iBBuP3CcIBvTX0m-ApcGSacJbfWHJhy0B56FOuMx8WnufrmcFDTZw6lfJ3xkpszZl4iu4YGE-G2KsDsm91c0acRttPMLgG8zHORyXcnZ7AtEJWT-feU9X9fyKU7UoSopKr1q_0VpHo2L3l7gaGnwl2SZ43TD3KzhvFb5tZswnFUx7OYDLs8wcIq6H6GTM24u3wycsMxqaJ8iFOVmMIkPO2MF6XRQHbjVk2E0LzFzFL-vn)

| |
Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=037c1dde282b4945b08b878d5f00d209&_e=T5kiQuHlSNFy1JvaUpgriP1PO5y_yXaAn9GO335yC7nwf1YxyEXCuQQsM0lsskGVQjAdSnJsDt7f_8JF7TLsaSZ7uBm0o17VnkAAZ_FxDSrbHJH-nlB2gJzxrhOrzZ9VJEWSvYllgqeHvY6J7hVwIwO7drCrIL27wX5hBHiwUOw3BxgIYtGmdM0zjKfe6D-TWYC0Ly0IgY4m8tP9Lx7iBBuP3CcIBvTX0m-ApcGSacJbfWHJhy0B56FOuMx8WnufrmcFDTZw6lfJ3xkpszZl4lFAYWdw07o18qykZW55LFGt4n1N0bO5gVAh0FWS-2wSG7DI6xVo9Dv9RTgHB7jVMPR2dX6sfiJtbR46-7yZD8YthXxtaIdG4WsOrddi_e4TvBvXdB9Ntk1zuxey0s0viL9KokUPX4U3ilOLmTeFjeXpkzCR9TBTRvkhfO_qDs92)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

| |
---

Defend the Constitution

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1cb98386754444119ee45429c32de402&_e=9cgP0VaHz-NnxE3u_AHaiBfwN1xnObrGKubYwPuYHvy4js72QcUfn4JhoAHyzsWnu6rNxFpSfTBLHtdUj-udXx30ee0dD__1EYQ_RtnR0gyTu8dhgtzOgroIXN2tu4mlrqu131DVLWbFJ1xpxOgjU5JclANJOVGjCw2e6wT8CuEAhMYWUHZtK5avHHyRO921GLS7Gof5Fm1A6gzP_5aeq7wEmjZvyAhvXlQIjQxYSj6NYvFXd4ItOSOT35zskuxiM729vx6fxGAWY5uf4ZJEwLHZ5-aykYFRLhhOmXXHjpnKplASYWhhBLnxaI6ulXfEWUeY_r8xcfqb5wBlMHxZMPTxmyNWoF6L7U07X4Sk-eQZVrEKBdcTI5k_kBYtLDKJ3BsDGKPPCajfqZMxi5tOAUCfb9hM-fBrxCIsb3O3bbo%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1cb98386754444119ee45429c32de402&_e=9cgP0VaHz-NnxE3u_AHaiBfwN1xnObrGKubYwPuYHvy4js72QcUfn4JhoAHyzsWnu6rNxFpSfTBLHtdUj-udXx30ee0dD__1EYQ_RtnR0gyTu8dhgtzOgroIXN2tu4mlrqu131DVLWbFJ1xpxOgjU5JclANJOVGjCw2e6wT8CuEAhMYWUHZtK5avHHyRO921GLS7Gof5Fm1A6gzP_5aeq7wEmjZvyAhvXlQIjQxYSj6NYvFXd4ItOSOT35zskuxiM729vx6fxGAWY5uf4ZJEwIciymHO8spZI4J9DOfgEFRXoG1a7tKQp83_1BueWrr_919Atf7C0i-xgYRobj7xTbzbxxEgNOuvyGmolGEd5QC_x3dyuYwsCe__WE3iT6ckmcf5AseDMwFaZwFRO0wetcvyxlJg7WHRlv02NZUY-U0%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1cb98386754444119ee45429c32de402&_e=9cgP0VaHz-NnxE3u_AHaiBfwN1xnObrGKubYwPuYHvy4js72QcUfn4JhoAHyzsWnu6rNxFpSfTBLHtdUj-udXx30ee0dD__1EYQ_RtnR0gyTu8dhgtzOgroIXN2tu4mlrqu131DVLWbFJ1xpxOgjU5JclANJOVGjCw2e6wT8CuEAhMYWUHZtK5avHHyRO921GLS7Gof5Fm1A6gzP_5aeq7wEmjZvyAhvXlQIjQxYSj6NYvFXd4ItOSOT35zskuxiM729vx6fxGAWY5uf4ZJEwC7XrwKTdryMg-82APEakJMfjz0sJHAtSAwWIiPAZ6t7C-CKU_qZ-xC89Qj5-PTsC_AeSJDFpmxyysksSR-mHhAswCcNkbpbvQQ_SW_b5U_k-oHsj8OSeTPmT1qGJ84RmWWy88bBFgVL7iY2-4Di-hw%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---

Thanks for all you do.
