clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. Let us recommit ourselves to his struggle for the America we know is possible
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77132423/449472299/-3547583?refcode=EM_20240115_FR_12P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjZGIzYTVhLWQ4YjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B8gY9GKKcJ6q77RUMBQ_ktmRgEFEHUcnE2PdUvsqgAY=&emci=24e78901-8eb1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1cdb3a5a-d8b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=8431045)
---

**As we honor Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. today, we must wrestle with the fact that the progress he gave his life for is not guaranteed — that much is clear in today’s ongoing struggle for voting rights.** Today, we remember Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. and his life's work: to secure equality for Black Americans in the face of relentless violence and discrimination. **And every day, we honor his legacy by recommitting to the fight for a more perfect democracy.** The National Democratic Redistricting Committee was founded to help rebuild a democracy where voters pick their politicians — not the other way around. We fight for fair maps and support Democracy Defenders who are committed to protect the voting rights of all communities — especially marginalized communities that have been historically disenfranchised by gerrymandering. Across the country, Republican politicians have passed onerous voting restrictions that threaten to reverse the gains Dr. King and his contemporaries fought so hard for. This coordinated attack on voting rights is on a scale not seen since the days of Jim Crow. **We cannot allow them to succeed.** Dr. King believed that every one of us has a role to play — and that when we come together, we can overcome injustice and confront inequality. So on this MLK Day, as we celebrate his legacy, let us also recommit ourselves to his struggle for the America we know is possible. We know that with you by our side, we can and will bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice. Thanks for all you do,
Team NDRC | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77132424/449472300/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_20240115_FR_12P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjZGIzYTVhLWQ4YjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B8gY9GKKcJ6q77RUMBQ_ktmRgEFEHUcnE2PdUvsqgAY=)

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: My family's journey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

My family has been in the fight to create justice for generations. I come from a long line of veterans who have served since the Civil War, fighting to ensure that the ideals of life, liberty, and justice were a reality for every American. Today, as we honor the legacy of Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., it is not lost on me that my ancestors committed to this fight despite those rights being denied to them.

**We have made significant strides, but the fight for racial justice is not over.** Together, we can create change and build communities where everyone can thrive.

**As a Black man, I’ve experienced the pain of prejudice and discrimination. But I also know the power that comes from speaking out against injustices.** My career as a doctor showed me that affordable healthcare, the environment, and gun violence are not just policy issues – but issues of racial justice. This has fueled my commitment to eliminate systemic racism and create communities where all can thrive.

In Congress, I’ll amplify the voices of those who feel the system ignores them. I’ll advocate for policies that promote equity, justice, and opportunity for everyone. And I’ll continue to fight to create the future we all deserve.

World Economists Predict Worsening Economy In Coming Year http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8aktm3jlp1n63r8g7805vtokrrcmgtkt3uvna10_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnktrr4sdh6mijcdtjmuqr9djhepqq0sjl64qbccblktrr4tjl6eqb7dplkkr3fctnmmqfb95jmmj3fddkmerjb97l6gp7f8h1k8gn48n24hjm0pb6cdj64oj0c8iv0

Around 56% of top global economists predict that the world economy
will weaken in the coming year, according to a survey by the World

name: Mike Johnson [Speaker of the House]
subject: You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson.

_You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. _

So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing last week when he endorsed Trump too.

_**[He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we've got to stick together.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e2639c008ea439895aa75a21efb7363&_e=sOAAiLhfs83OHrZvMWnKrJ-lu3Wrt_yST_lXny3koZc-6hCT2uy7sGEqY48cULNEriknOXVJQlrx34Gcjrau7fHFVT-wjGnoUQcn_okquUTZ0KAtUplfHCSz2ugpBrka2g1v7fTH7x_nLhlI78Ja2ZZzB0emnIRVWmGm51bcuGIXOVrggpdDs1IpGezuIckb3BOccigcojemCm1cfDyfoz1ss_YIdwIFhTCghPpP1GVhPHOjLB8nWNP-tu3WVgOWmW-_SM9BTeNo0S4F8fQw6Fgy5QtIJE5prOMXs6WIvtmAUzUtIZx6p7koe0L-bNmc2bwk2BAgj8UbG8TtnS3C2mendbKOwYf1BBS7SBsnKKbLB4nOobv0vHTd0A2-kqF8UJIxYLJag8d6aULXM4kxika60NHWlPBhpKu5c7bwgVRf1so7dmymR9R_318bFVIKGDn321Y9GfektccgGzDLTQ%3D%3D "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together.")**_

That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.

But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse:
** Problem #1: ** We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals.

** Problem #2: ** House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us.

** Problem #3: ** Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute...

_**[So as one of my first moves of the election year, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e2639c008ea439895aa75a21efb7363&_e=sOAAiLhfs83OHrZvMWnKrJ-lu3Wrt_yST_lXny3koZc-6hCT2uy7sGEqY48cULNEriknOXVJQlrx34Gcjrau7fHFVT-wjGnoUQcn_okquUTZ0KAtUplfHCSz2ugpBrka2g1v7fTH7x_nLhlI78Ja2ZZzB0emnIRVWmGm51bcuGIXOVrggpdDs1IpGezuIckb3BOccigcojemCm1cfDyfoz1ss_YIdwIFhTCghPpP1GVhPHOjLB8nWNP-tu3WVgOWmW-_SM9BTeNo0S4F8fQw6Fgy5QtIJE5prOMXs6WIvtmAUzUtIZx6p7koe0L-bNmc5r5QG7suNphb36RkmQZhA2jUf4vjfB1xxRy_SW9VODPKbCAvSpz1BiFcMusC0VuEvwKxLsGtSkUsP1yY727IJJlr2jD49cqIOpsIKV5XXml6fDOAPNqCl5ZLnjUrTa-k0ObtY1O7poD5xr1rWRJRlA%3D%3D "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state.

If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: **1) ** SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, **2) ** SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and **3) ** Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN.

Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. **That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. **

_I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. _

_**[I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e2639c008ea439895aa75a21efb7363&_e=sOAAiLhfs83OHrZvMWnKrJ-lu3Wrt_yST_lXny3koZc-6hCT2uy7sGEqY48cULNEriknOXVJQlrx34Gcjrau7fHFVT-wjGnoUQcn_okquUTZ0KAtUplfHCSz2ugpBrka2g1v7fTH7x_nLhlI78Ja2ZZzB0emnIRVWmGm51bcuGIXOVrggpdDs1IpGezuIckb3BOccigcojemCm1cfDyfoz1ss_YIdwIFhTCghPpP1GVhPHOjLB8nWNP-tu3WVgOWmW-_SM9BTeNo0S4F8fQw6Fgy5QtIJE5prOMXs6WIvtmAUzUtIZx6p7koe0L-bNmcX50_eGDeWKEP0XAdPMVd8ZcgPIB_PplIgdy_vMlnCKj0tetSnXjW2SxcZ2E98DHhT-J3qY2O-Uwytc0oJ7KhTV6bLpnil8rnghdjK_mYWt5c4BaXOynhd2LIBW7kS1uLP8-NE5QuDGSSig9XoSQLrg%3D%3D "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.")**_

When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING?

Thanks for everything you do.

In liberty,
Mike Johnson (Speaker of the House)

clean_body: So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson. You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing last week when he endorsed Trump too. "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together." That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat. But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse: Problem #1: We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals. Problem #2: House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us. Problem #3: Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump. I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute... "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state. If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: 1) SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, 2) SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and 3) Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN. Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford." When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING? Thanks for everything you do. In liberty, Mike Johnson (Speaker of the House) | "Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Upping the ante
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hey Peter, I have some good news for you today.
Last week, we set our first mid-month goal of 2024 — $150,000. This was by far our most ambitious goal yet, but thanks to your support we hit it almost 24 hours early.
**Now, we’re upping the ante.**
If we’re going to stand up to national insiders dumping money into our race to support Josh Hawley, we have to keep being aggressive. **So after discussing it with the team this morning, we’re raising our goal to $175,000 by TOMORROW at midnight.**
If every person reading this chipped in right now, we’d be able to reach this stretch goal by the end of today. But since it’s a holiday and not everyone will be checking their email, we’re counting on anyone reading this to help us close the gap:
**[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help our campaign crush this goal + stay prepared for the fight ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42635?refcode=em20240115-4614&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4614%2E614464%2ErwjCji)**
**We even made a link just for you:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-20240115?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20240115](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42635?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20240115&amount=5&t=2&akid=4614%2E614464%2ErwjCji)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42635?refcode=em20240115-4614&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4614%2E614464%2ErwjCji)**
_National Journal_ said Lucas Kunce “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” this cycle — and between Josh Hawley’s tanking approval ratings among Missouri voters and the already vicious attacks about Lucas coming from GOP insiders, it’s clear they’re right.
We have a real shot to defeat Hawley, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday people this cycle... but we can’t do it without your help.
**Help our campaign close the gap on our $175,000 mid-month goal so we can stay prepared for the fight ahead by adding your first $10 donation today:**
**Here’s your personalized link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-20240115?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20240115](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42635?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20240115&amount=5&t=4&akid=4614%2E614464%2ErwjCji)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42635?refcode=em20240115-4614&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4614%2E614464%2ErwjCji)**
Thanks for all your help,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240115-4614-footer&t=6&refcode2=4614_614464_rwjCji&akid=4614%2E614464%2ErwjCji)**

body:
EXCLUSIVE: Chicago GOP Chairman Stephen Boulton responds to IR coverage with his own unedited opinion piece.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/1905e8cfcc1e/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-9638736?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=0aef9724bc) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=0aef9724bc)

This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0aef9724bc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

The IR Editorial Board offered Stephen Boulton an opportunity to submit a piece that we would publish in its entirety. And Mr. Boulton accepted that offer. The same invitation remains for any other IL GOP leader. It’s important that readers hear directly from party leadership on our platform.

In His Own Words: Chicago GOP Chair Stephen Boulton Responds to IR Coverage in Unedited Opinion Piece (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/in-his-own-words-chicago-gop-chair-stephen-boulton-responds-to-ir-coverage-in-unedited-opinion-piece.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0aef9724bc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/in-his-own-words-chicago-gop-chair-stephen-boulton-responds-to-ir-coverage-in-unedited-opinion-piece.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0aef9724bc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

By Stephen Boulton

I am grateful for the opportunity to inform people about both me and the Chicago Republican Party. Neither is being accurately portrayed in social media, and I commend the new Publisher of Illinois Review for allowing me the chance to respond.

I have been a GOP activist in Chicago since in 2000. I have held a number of posts in the Chicago and Cook County Republican Parties. I put in untold hours in volunteer work during the period 2004-2012, such as around $250,000 worth of free legal work defending candidates and attacking corruption, including a successful appeal to the Illinois Supreme Court. Unlike many others, I never asked for or took a penny in compensation, because I considered it an honor to be General Counsel of the Cook County Republican Party and later the Chicago Republican Party . . .

name: Keir Bradford-Grey
subject: Honoring Dr. King
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG
body:
As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/f_OCAZQVq06HV0T6jD6mWA2?unsubscribedata=RU0Jzho7ESXLOlqjD2xGoOhasu6mRiESimEM8kuWgnEum0rHwVZSbJyeBg8nP1L2Drxrar86PymHAKcbBoQslrYt4RhzfdD3Z2yuPICDoaKXLxH7uEnVnTtLXL8aTLegPK9kjQnAaXUhM6HGDkac8A7FAaopVivkvAsXRBxWz8p5ETXXNIUb2de%2BYCYKxCChEhrPsiphELMcDzVUwMJRYvF8oJJq0krh0jkyqAhF3bbcjUjAAngH5aYwc7A84UeFmmZlnmPTQZ7B0tT5TzavK3YVceaHt0FWymR9Q7ognRXWDLVdm4NndP38SJJqxMKbuVIkMNmi3Zx1M1NhagxmPvOcdkNHHXVFJ8diA8VkjaF%2F1%2FjTkWQDsiBB25UAhPr9CcPnOn6E0zvDi6czvRUffNTle7taPDZWuT%2BqRhcqfNHAOuuoED%2BuqkIuvG59yAKY)
---
| |
---
Peter,

Today, we honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., one of the greatest civil rights heroes in American history, whose tireless efforts left an indelible mark on our nation’s path towards a more just and inclusive society.

Dr. King famously said, “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.” As I continue my campaign to serve as the People’s Lawyer for all Pennsylvanians, I’m determined to protect our communities from injustice and uphold the principles that Dr. King dedicated his life to promoting.

And while we have made significant strides in many areas aligned with Dr. King’s vision for our country, it is clear that we still have a long journey ahead of us, Peter. In our pursuit for justice, equality, and democracy, we’re witnessing the havoc that extremism is wreaking on our country.

As we navigate the challenges before us, I will always continue to fight for justice and equality. Thank you for joining me in this journey towards a more just and equal America.

Wishing you a safe and reflective Martin Luther King Jr. Day.

Keir Bradford-Grey

clean_body: As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, Today, we honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., one of the greatest civil rights heroes in American history, whose tireless efforts left an indelible mark on our nation’s path towards a more just and inclusive society. Dr. King famously said, “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.” As I continue my campaign to serve as the People’s Lawyer for all Pennsylvanians, I’m determined to protect our communities from injustice and uphold the principles that Dr. King dedicated his life to promoting. And while we have made significant strides in many areas aligned with Dr. King’s vision for our country, it is clear that we still have a long journey ahead of us, Peter. In our pursuit for justice, equality, and democracy, we’re witnessing the havoc that extremism is wreaking on our country. As we navigate the challenges before us, I will always continue to fight for justice and equality. Thank you for joining me in this journey towards a more just and equal America. Wishing you a safe and reflective Martin Luther King Jr. Day. Keir Bradford-Grey * | = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG PO BOX 22321 | Philadelphia, PA 19110 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~ "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person _reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~ "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~ "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~ "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aKI567kloy1qAiGIpILg8Q~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/R1y6KokyMdRXtsur_dRagw~~/AARclAA~~~ "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/R1y6KokyMdRXtsur_dRagw~~/AARclAA~~~ "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5wtI-qpdzRAoEkYJXjq9QQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRniDrGP4ReAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_-YulZfQW03xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5wtI-qpdzRAoEkYJXjq9QQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRniDrGP4ReAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_-YulZfQW03xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5wtI-qpdzRAoEkYJXjq9QQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRniDrGP4ReAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_-YulZfQW03xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "DONATE")
---

You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. ~ "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. ~ "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?" | | ~ Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, ~ "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | ~ Nikki Haley | | ~ | | | | | | ~~ "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | ~~ "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. ~ **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Bob Casey
subject: A quotation from Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1710%2E552475%2EmtxZaJ)
Hi Peter,
Every year on the birthday of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., I’m reminded of this quotation:
_“We are not makers of history; we are made by history.” - Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr._
The truth is, history has brought us to a point where we must decide whether we will defend the civil rights of every American – rights that Americans like Congressman John Lewis and Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. were willing to give their lives for – or whether we will allow our democracy to crumble.
Over the last few years, extremists have ramped up an all-out assault on voting rights. In the months after the January 6 insurrection, **Republicans introduced over 400 voter suppression bills in 49 state legislatures, and dark-money groups spent tens of millions of dollars promoting them.**
Our democracy is under siege, and it’s time to fight back against the continued efforts to enact discriminatory voter suppression laws, embrace Trump’s Big Lie, and undermine our democracy. I will never stop fighting to protect your voting rights and make it easier for every eligible American to cast their ballot.
[**Today, on Martin Luther King Jr. Day, I'm asking you to join me. Will you add your name next to mine in support of defending the sacred right to vote?**](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20240115-mlk-day-petition/?refcode=em20240115-2&akid=1710%2E552475%2EmtxZaJ)
We must not only recommit ourselves to the fight for justice for all Americans, but also show up and stand in solidarity.
With gratitude,
Bob

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Los Angeles Times Endorses Dave Min
body:
“Dave Min should replace Katie Porter in the 47th Congressional District”

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/4fe5e844d099/los-angeles-times-endorses-dave-min-15668548?e=7017cc100e)

For Immediate Release: January 15, 2023
Contact: press@davemin.com (mailto:press@davemin.com)

Los Angeles Times Endorses Dave Min
“Dave Min should replace Katie Porter in the 47th Congressional District”

IRVINE, CA — This morning, State Senator Dave Min, the California Democratic Party’s endorsed nominee for California’s 47th Congressional District, received the Los Angeles Times endorsement. In their endorsement, the Times cited Dave’s policy bona fides, experience as an effective legislator, and “ability to achieve results.”

“Dave Min should replace Katie Porter in the 47th Congressional District”
By the Times Editorial Board

“The platforms of Min and Weiss are similar — both intend to protect a woman’s right to abortion at the federal level and say they are ready to battle climate change, work toward immigration reform and push sensible gun regulation. The difference is in their leadership skills, legislative experience and ability to achieve results and communicate a sense of cooperation.”

Min, an affable lawmaker who has authored successful bills on the environment and guns, has the clear advantage here. Before his political career, Min was, like Porter (who has endorsed his candidacy), a professor at UC Irvine law school. And like Porter, he should be elected to represent the 47th District.

Min has not introduced as many bills as some of his colleagues during his three years in Sacramento, but he has authored bills on important issues. One bill, now under consideration, would set up a system for phasing out offshore oil and gas drilling in state waters. Another, signed into law in 2022, bans gun and ammunition sales on state-owned land."

To Read The Times Full Endorsement Click HERE (https://www.latimes.com/opinion/story/2024-01-15/la-ed-dave-min-for-47th#:~:text=Endorsement%3A%20Dave%20Min%20should%20replace,to%20replace%20Rep.%20Katie%20Porter.&text=The%2047th%20Congressional%20District%20in%20Orange%20County%20belongs%20to%20Democrats%20right%20now.)

Min received early endorsements from outgoing Rep. Katie Porter, as well as the California Democratic Party, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions, and received the backing of the California Labor Federation. He is likewise endorsed by EqualityCA, NeverAgainCA, and California EnviroVoters. A full endorsement list is available here (https://davemin.com/endorsements) .

###

California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country.

============================================================
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Mike Johnson [Speaker of the House]
subject: You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson.

_You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. _

So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing last week when he endorsed Trump too.

_**[He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we've got to stick together.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de7096d146564804b630465fa6c68354&_e=tuTJbvXD6kj1tqtchQRM9Z7E4xQANSFiKzG4IVZloJboUxJisKL4HvxIy17ytt27aPGQ0dnIwiV_xPkAg60Dr6nW7o-6ogOxxwdUWBGkRo8yy6d5cdwv4dmBT-gvMSWuGlnQffQwoZF_1XbfSTdyFC_xQ95PMiSb_OO7YAZYXYLQA7uu4yxji-9xaWYfQFCTehqm_l70NHmZ1_-lpR6Lye__lF2Iyt5kgaS_0-LYdV1PoawNIGoYaKAgzgn-ZHKZYpthGfGgxZYFwBDGsdaaoAsqzwkZ4quFYZk6Z722JqSDVyziKe3NZe9_KbBKutLUxt1fodVzZssRKX0PV6XFz2TSRAs4ea_HLnrrLMXNym0dXqR4ByG1RLwoqSbmZ96Rreqr5MEU0gWtJoRr7NiUFTzRxfYmCJ8WT-DiPOeEWqF9R2cGcM0n7o14DBh466-u0vErS6PTGSzOu3wRTxvNbw%3D%3D "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together.")**_

That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.

But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse:
** Problem #1: ** We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals.

** Problem #2: ** House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us.

** Problem #3: ** Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute...

_**[So as one of my first moves of the election year, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de7096d146564804b630465fa6c68354&_e=tuTJbvXD6kj1tqtchQRM9Z7E4xQANSFiKzG4IVZloJboUxJisKL4HvxIy17ytt27aPGQ0dnIwiV_xPkAg60Dr6nW7o-6ogOxxwdUWBGkRo8yy6d5cdwv4dmBT-gvMSWuGlnQffQwoZF_1XbfSTdyFC_xQ95PMiSb_OO7YAZYXYLQA7uu4yxji-9xaWYfQFCTehqm_l70NHmZ1_-lpR6Lye__lF2Iyt5kgaS_0-LYdV1PoawNIGoYaKAgzgn-ZHKZYpthGfGgxZYFwBDGsdaaoAsqzwkZ4quFYZk6Z722JqSDVyziKe3NZe9_KbBKutLUezdAyF6bOGFbyMpFt_xAe6TNIJE9eoCI4d5OfLyyweZPqU9d8dKf5DYMmAm0oXkVQpb1yIDNq5PrI7qIu8LLE-DIslmS4fK-Q5iPX54K5CvpJwLBE8OjOyv-b2v2d5JdC5vM8SdVrVnnk_D7WkWwJg%3D%3D "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state.

If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: **1) ** SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, **2) ** SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and **3) ** Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN.

Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. **That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. **

_I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. _

_**[I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de7096d146564804b630465fa6c68354&_e=tuTJbvXD6kj1tqtchQRM9Z7E4xQANSFiKzG4IVZloJboUxJisKL4HvxIy17ytt27aPGQ0dnIwiV_xPkAg60Dr6nW7o-6ogOxxwdUWBGkRo8yy6d5cdwv4dmBT-gvMSWuGlnQffQwoZF_1XbfSTdyFC_xQ95PMiSb_OO7YAZYXYLQA7uu4yxji-9xaWYfQFCTehqm_l70NHmZ1_-lpR6Lye__lF2Iyt5kgaS_0-LYdV1PoawNIGoYaKAgzgn-ZHKZYpthGfGgxZYFwBDGsdaaoAsqzwkZ4quFYZk6Z722JqSDVyziKe3NZe9_KbBKutLUVVfWyMJTkRvGnpmeMpTZiAJdm_AHJdW_lD4paRElcaNBGvMnXwGVF9a4GSSv-GP_fn9lvF0N_yRif4wbbBCJgdx04YIhfpKi30qIsu5f7r_ruNK212_izYGa0Qbo76TZfnsP7sBjdnx8YCfEfbD5iw%3D%3D "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.")**_

When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING?

clean_body: So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson. You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing last week when he endorsed Trump too. "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together." That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat. But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse: Problem #1: We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals. Problem #2: House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us. Problem #3: Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump. I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute... "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state. If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: 1) SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, 2) SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and 3) Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN. Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford." When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING? Thanks for everything you do. In liberty, Mike Johnson (Speaker of the House) | "Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. – GA Dems

Peter, Today, we honor the life and legacy of Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., a civil rights leader dedicated to speaking out against injustice, inequality, poverty, and war. I invite you to take a moment today to reflect on what we can do in this presidential election to bring fundamental change to the still-existing injustices in our nation. Val

body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240115-2&t=1&akid=845%2E62735%2EVV0iTB)
Peter, today is the Founders Day for the incredible Alpha Kappa Alpha (AKA) sorority. 💕💚
This historically Black sorority is a personal inspiration to me. My mom is an AKA member and embodies the excellence and dedication AKA instills as an anesthesiologist, former professor, (_and of course when she was raising me)_!
Her determination as an AKA woman has been a guiding light for me. Her teaching and support have helped me navigate being a single father, being on set, owning a small business, and running for Senate in Michigan.
The incredible women of AKA deserve celebration each and every day, but especially on Founders Day — and that’s why I had to take a moment on this holiday to celebrate every AKA out there making a difference.
Happy Founders Day! 💕💚
[**If you have a moment to support our campaign today that would mean the world to me.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240115-2?amount=5&refcode=em20240115-2-845&refcode2=845_62735_VV0iTB&akid=845%2E62735%2EVV0iTB)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240115-2?amount=5&refcode=em20240115-2-845&refcode2=845_62735_VV0iTB&akid=845%2E62735%2EVV0iTB)**
I’m so inspired by the Alpha Kappa Alpha founding story and by the legacy of excellence that the sorority has crafted. In all of our work as a campaign, I hope that we can carry that torch forward.
Thank you so much,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240115-2&t=2&refcode2=845_62735_VV0iTB&akid=845%2E62735%2EVV0iTB)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Why I’m running
body:
It’s hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f814db4618d043c69e73e0ea626f8d48&_e=WEnMfa9B4n1x5m2EALlp-4G3h8yK_xKtaPbXotOOs5AxK8rN3kxNibbMvXLpilmtrdmBgNhxytCZJJXdozXXCW-Kv-lcq7xQ5oJ167Y7qk3p5bbXR7qH8645SLtuPxBjZ9EWC4BneM2FS-qHpH922qn1rYuMnFn1y1SRakAMSIhW4Jm1Gff7ZEsiFWg5Bawd5YmvR8tUOy_qaf_pWDOl59pHSoKq6JM04pXPZvnaujenvarHr7G80tqisCg2-YTNIdq-o_TzRDlt3qzWo7yuDcHmp5OpiqODSi_fR1B0u_0fGtJogn_SULgwTBq4h4Eck9KUBKml6CXedDkfOO0_YCLEQjtpdJVWAl7OnL9KQsdO1gAyyJa8rRcwAziCrMkfstpX-Nz85rSjlf1vZQCaOnnY_3D07X8LgVMNYQ9ocA6JAhaWXVl_evDo0gKERh4ranSj_UWDQuw7Hd3Py0KHIXSeDs1n7AJ2L2tlro6AjlKL0p_wenn--Kb4-wirCW840DueREZkxBYVD7FMQixWqOOvsby_-efKPSehJtTW_ldsd03sqfOdZOVnoMU-Kyyj3nrQEfXHc6PUQc0xwxYqTtM4WHbPOZ8StI8g74ydpNSlwKPB3gH2zUWw5YGA0SIY)
---

Friend,
It's hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight.

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we started as an underdog but are rising in the polls and proving those who underestimate our movement wrong. Supporters like YOU have helped us put on over 150 town halls packed with fired-up supporters who are ready to get our country back on track. I've met with overflowing rooms of voters across the country, shook every hand, answered every question, and shared why I am ready to win this race and lead our country forward as your next President of the United States.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f814db4618d043c69e73e0ea626f8d48&_e=WEnMfa9B4n1x5m2EALlp-4G3h8yK_xKtaPbXotOOs5AxK8rN3kxNibbMvXLpilmtrdmBgNhxytCZJJXdozXXCW-Kv-lcq7xQ5oJ167Y7qk3p5bbXR7qH8645SLtuPxBjZ9EWC4BneM2FS-qHpH922qn1rYuMnFn1y1SRakAMSIhW4Jm1Gff7ZEsiFWg5Bawd5YmvR8tUOy_qaf_pWDOl59pHSoKq6JM04pXPZvnaujenvarHr7G80tqisCg2-YTNIdq-o_TzRDlt3qzWo7yuDcHmp5OpiqODSi_fR1B0u_0fGtJogn_SULgwTBq4h4Eck9KUBKml6CXedDkfOO0_YCLEQjtpdJVWAl7OnL9KQsdO1gAyyJa8rRcwAziCrMkfstpX-Nz85rSjlf1vZQCaOnnY_3D07X8LgVMNYQ9ocA6JAhaWXVl_evDo0gKERh4ranSj_UWDQuw7Hd3Py0KHIXSeDs1n7AJ2L2tlro6AjlLcbzS4DlJMVmo-CGuwyygYPQiYAZPyFJXBItkt1EHOLoRzd_fzb5UvG8QiDBs3dgVrM4HiGWueApkWw8iqcT9Uj-OYk6MsJx0kvbXUNeMyXoEpB0dxJ7aL3lr2MhKssaDehtutkJZfJciv8hDuxu5x)
---

**[As we enter this critical stage of our fight, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f814db4618d043c69e73e0ea626f8d48&_e=WEnMfa9B4n1x5m2EALlp-4G3h8yK_xKtaPbXotOOs5AxK8rN3kxNibbMvXLpilmtrdmBgNhxytCZJJXdozXXCW-Kv-lcq7xQ5oJ167Y7qk3p5bbXR7qH8645SLtuPxBjZ9EWC4BneM2FS-qHpH922qn1rYuMnFn1y1SRakAMSIhW4Jm1Gff7ZEsiFWg5Bawd5YmvR8tUOy_qaf_pWDOl59pHSoKq6JM04pXPZvnaujenvarHr7G80tqisCg2-YTNIdq-o_TzRDlt3qzWo7yuDcHmp5OpiqODSi_fR1B0u_0fGtJogn_SULgwTBq4h4Eck9KUBKml6CXedDkfOO0_YCLEQjtpdJVWAl7OnL9KQsdO1gAyyJa8rRcwAziCrMkfstpX-Nz85rSjlf1vZQCaOnnY_3D07X8LgVMNYQ9ocA6JAhaWXVl_evDo0gKERh4ranSj_UWDQuw7Hd3Py0KHIXSeDs1n7AJ2L2tlro6AjlK-5DJhZZ-d4f9P_HxKCwDg9cq5_2uAw0dINR8isln3MNsH3tCQneInWJJ5UuzJst-wiR2MWG52SWi_2MavmtmWPIR6UaGIekWAWFPVjnDU0wWlIVLj1hmn7WUzmY3XNKLi3eSqMWroN_NlUCZsLArd "As we enter this critical stage of our fight, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.")**

I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. My parents came to America more than 50 years ago to a country that was strong, and proud, and full of opportunities.

_**But right now, our future is slipping. **_

**[We are in a battle to save our country, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important before the first-in-the-nation Iowa Caucuses today. **I 'm running for President because we have a country to save!** I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.

Saving our country will require us to elect a candidate who not only can defeat Biden and Harris, but one who can lead our country into a brighter future.

In the polls, I defeat Biden by 17 points. I'm the strongest candidate to go toe-to-toe with Biden in November.

And when it comes to leading America into a brighter future, I know how to get it done. As governor, we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy. Business journals started calling South Carolina the Beast of the Southeast - which I loved!

When I was Ambassador to the United Nations, I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

The future of America is too important to hold back now.

I'm running for President of the United States. I'm fighting for a strong and proud America...And I want you by my side.

Our moment is now and our mission is clear.

**[Let's save our country and secure our future. And let's move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f814db4618d043c69e73e0ea626f8d48&_e=WEnMfa9B4n1x5m2EALlp-4G3h8yK_xKtaPbXotOOs5AxK8rN3kxNibbMvXLpilmtrdmBgNhxytCZJJXdozXXCW-Kv-lcq7xQ5oJ167Y7qk3p5bbXR7qH8645SLtuPxBjZ9EWC4BneM2FS-qHpH922qn1rYuMnFn1y1SRakAMSIhW4Jm1Gff7ZEsiFWg5Bawd5YmvR8tUOy_qaf_pWDOl59pHSoKq6JM04pXPZvnaujenvarHr7G80tqisCg2-YTNIdq-o_TzRDlt3qzWo7yuDcHmp5OpiqODSi_fR1B0u_0fGtJogn_SULgwTBq4h4Eck9KUBKml6CXedDkfOO0_YCLEQjtpdJVWAl7OnL9KQsdO1gAyyJa8rRcwAziCrMkfstpX-Nz85rSjlf1vZQCaOnnY_3D07X8LgVMNYQ9ocA6JAhaWXVl_evDo0gKERh4ranSj_UWDQuw7Hd3Py0KHIXSeDs1n7AJ2L2tlro6AjlLWtLXmYWIcmkR2lRLSp2WkjLoRtZgANniqueheEQk6NK4_n_cXiVd0V-py9np-y1E9QxXT_rNH4ha2f5OHgJKk8PKCHyARdBxpTMy_H5yUMgYtbURwIbprcy-RXqGZ_L5h4aeWaWxPzdbqnmplOaU9 "Let’s save our country and secure our future. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: It’s hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight. | | | | | | Friend, It's hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we started as an underdog but are rising in the polls and proving those who underestimate our movement wrong. Supporters like YOU have helped us put on over 150 town halls packed with fired-up supporters who are ready to get our country back on track. I've met with overflowing rooms of voters across the country, shook every hand, answered every question, and shared why I am ready to win this race and lead our country forward as your next President of the United States. | "As we enter this critical stage of our fight, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters." I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. My parents came to America more than 50 years ago to a country that was strong, and proud, and full of opportunities. But right now, our future is slipping. "We are in a battle to save our country, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important before the first-in-the-nation Iowa Caucuses today. Can I count on you to chip in?" I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. Saving our country will require us to elect a candidate who not only can defeat Biden and Harris, but one who can lead our country into a brighter future. In the polls, I defeat Biden by 17 points. I'm the strongest candidate to go toe-to-toe with Biden in November. And when it comes to leading America into a brighter future, I know how to get it done. As governor, we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy. Business journals started calling South Carolina the Beast of the Southeast - which I loved! When I was Ambassador to the United Nations, I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. The future of America is too important to hold back now. I'm running for President of the United States. I'm fighting for a strong and proud America...And I want you by my side. Our moment is now and our mission is clear. "Let’s save our country and secure our future. And let’s move forward, together, toward our destiny – in a strong and proud America!" We have a country to save. With you on my side, I know we can do it! Thank you for everything you do. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. name: =?utf-8?Q?Thierry=20Tchenko?=
subject: MLK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tchenko for Texas
body:
His deeds matched his faith AND words | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/633cad7429ae/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12673889?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Today is a day of reflection. To anyone sending out quotes from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., I hope they are always fighting today for a better and more equitable future.
**MLK charted a path for all of us towards a world better than the one he inherited.**
He spoke great words. But his life and his actions were bigger than his words. His words were always secondary to his phenomenal and inspiring deeds.
As I reflect on my life and work as a lifelong public servant, an organizer, and a nonprofit executive, I have tried to live by the example that he set.
As your next U.S. Senator, I am committed to building a Texas that embodies Dr. King's vision - a place where every voice matters and every dream is achievable.
I hope today is a blessed and reflective day for you.
Thierry
PS — Tomorrow is Tuesday. Join me for a Tuesday With Thierry and we can discuss MLK, this winter freeze, energy policy or anything else you want.

name: =?utf-8?Q?J.R.?=
subject: JR Majewski's Story is one of PERSEVERANCE
body:
Peter, What if I told you that I was on path to defeat the longest standing | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/2023eoqdec-9188822?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=c8d4f59959&e=0426928d91)
| [DONATE TO SUPPORT AMERICA FIRST](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=4d57b6a53c&e=0426928d91)
---

Peter,
What if I told you that I was on path to defeat the longest standing Congressional Democrat in our nation’s history in 2022 until the left stole my SSN, forged my signature to illegally obtain my military service records?

That’s not all: they then used my military records to launch a multi-million dollar smear campaign against me, ACCUSING ME OF LYING about my service in Afghanistan!

But wait there’s more: get this: instead of helping me fight against these lies, can anyone guess what the Republican Party did? They abandoned me, withdrawing over $1M dollars in support for my campaign.

But this didn’t just happen to me it happened to 13 other Republican veterans who are running or current members of Congress.

Ladies and gentlemen, this is a small depiction of the depths that the establishment will go to in order to retain power.

This is no longer about Republican versus Democrat. That train left the damn station along time ago. And now it’s stuck out in the middle of some field in Iowa and everybody wants to power it with solar panels and wind turbines.

This election cycle is about saving America from the evil grasp of the UNIPARTY. A group of people that would rather burn this country down then loose control over it.

What we need is a top to bottom effort. Not only do we have to make sure Donald Trump takes back the White House. We have to ensure we send backup!
This is why I am running for Congress and have the support of Freedom Caucus Chairman Bob Good.
If you believe in America; if you believe in freedom; if you want peace and prosperity again, I urge you to seize [**TODAY**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=64a77b93f5&e=0426928d91)[****](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=108ddc9cf0&e=0426928d91) as the day you will pledge your support abolish tyranny! Will you pledge $20.24 to bring us over into the new year?

| Dear Patriot,, Today is a historic day! The Iowa Caucus is happening as we speak. We have so much on the line. Do you remember when we were in the White House? Do you remember the strong economy, the low gas prices? Do you remember peace around the world? We did not have wars in Ukraine or Israel! Do you remember having a secure border? Do you remember when AMERICA WAS GREAT? Only one book captures those magical year - [OUR JOURNEY TOGETHER](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=AOF0UcH39oinW-2B1Srdz7jjsVS7GSZG6KtDUrkL9MTvO-2B4kl670T3E7pfcwkdCx1tpEMT2kpANvcBa8OdI5UvDcfv1I0wHTPr8jcDOOtwx1WWW7wZj2phrihxDr0IGJk2CTsTrkV7-2FiRAs3IL9xyh72Es-2F3wr8GZgPPGmyZyDUkI7HjtwgD79tvsTVi8Hs7EgAsXG5eymt54IV3BqX-2FVKxA09uxKOB67DHDELwKRuNU7DpUNqeD8V6UEMpSMVnZTAmpmG_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgAsQ4nDpcKawhuaTqrZd2bsWemEXdhv1-2FJ9KVurqEF7GHBDTTEoe9tPeRpm5h1r-2FQFnFZh6eTuUHaqoxQf1qdfxD2ZfzFYAc6Ktk2Z53KN7JIVTEdpGcQ-2Ft0rzGXL-2FJ84NNZlXr6HSRQOt8mdSVfVJU6T-2F8DQW5vOD2bB-2B5tMb1clRD21MHyPtqudtXLQQ0N5e1ffmR1Vhd9FPCC-2BHpzZn-2F36qiw8jMxoJl5wgghFsWaZT6WjsJRA6APBouhaCVIzjHv0F9lOLziki6AS6Abye1NfheIzCx1-2F-2BBhMg9htyx3nArzUlhAsv1fzD1i8uFvvgP-2Bpwnu62QT2Yawf2wYSMkqmNpNEue7B-2Fvgx6McC0ZGuigC0nwlknxkhx61DGiCttnAxfpHpljWJWqEXtFfUWq-2F20rEL1a5ipfs-2BL7e7wjA-3D-3D)! subject: Why I’m running
body:
It’s hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight.

| |

| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de63d8f41e294d2eaa01c93d1227883a&_e=0G5wHcR2L8KyuF77wmCuJgfyrWJmeQaEiX1Qfl0dDneL3DeADu0iU7MwLBOxJLsILuiyO7uQUC1W_0UJwAiQvDnZzbjVkLnPjX_palvuZUxluciEBf5RBNvSfpRws7-Tde_l00hPUF93mODVKpQtYGEShPpmzZoDrFkMu_WFV4IciGKMVpe1yX5HvEiMCSD1HtAXzwBL2-3ZpZPebE0Egx1jNqX_UCc068uV3IX7cnC3f-lImg6D31iFR8dCYUa_t2EjMlUC0FFnWFX_m5yH9f012rd1EBhQXbkslrELk5tO7oFhQqTFYu69LS3d8EIMiGOqisaUcH4R_foRAHRjg5lswEgkxx0AV2-M3K9RuMco_nRikaomA-BCkCsdzB1dJnCX_kx7A3H1ofKiQ1_Mru7h6JhkrNufNicPSGkfxvtRUGnBEnmbhVE3VISiSu6F8rdixxEgtKdczbXQ3hCa6IYD0W0z_6_jsxZ7Mb1PN_yINtowVGl2hoHEUpL-kmDA1KjS99mgs1Tf6Q_SpzLw_kQXJTjDaU_xm4fmedux-8jnUspOug4mytFt6toRVLCiXTXY9l-aesWZBhUo5ByOk75K8h7vtQCHwOmL7T08cCIAwz_OkyYonFPMEAgWdt6I)

Friend,
It's hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight.

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we started as an underdog but are rising in the polls and proving those who underestimate our movement wrong. Supporters like YOU have helped us put on over 150 town halls packed with fired-up supporters who are ready to get our country back on track. I've met with overflowing rooms of voters across the country, shook every hand, answered every question, and shared why I am ready to win this race and lead our country forward as your next President of the United States.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de63d8f41e294d2eaa01c93d1227883a&_e=0G5wHcR2L8KyuF77wmCuJgfyrWJmeQaEiX1Qfl0dDneL3DeADu0iU7MwLBOxJLsILuiyO7uQUC1W_0UJwAiQvDnZzbjVkLnPjX_palvuZUxluciEBf5RBNvSfpRws7-Tde_l00hPUF93mODVKpQtYGEShPpmzZoDrFkMu_WFV4IciGKMVpe1yX5HvEiMCSD1HtAXzwBL2-3ZpZPebE0Egx1jNqX_UCc068uV3IX7cnC3f-lImg6D31iFR8dCYUa_t2EjMlUC0FFnWFX_m5yH9f012rd1EBhQXbkslrELk5tO7oFhQqTFYu69LS3d8EIMiGOqisaUcH4R_foRAHRjg5lswEgkxx0AV2-M3K9RuMco_nRikaomA-BCkCsdzB1dJnCX_kx7A3H1ofKiQ1_Mru7h6JhkrNufNicPSGkfxvtRUGnBEnmbhVE3VISiSu6F8rdixxEgtKdczbXQ3hCa6IYD0W0z_6_jsxZ7Mb1PN_wK8STOCAz_jcD4WxvwmlyRaSFZsAtj4BVtG2Kj7rfAWSgcUxjNpwfUWn2qmshuKBrTjAVjSNIECLIG9RKdvumJisw8fmH6H6BCwc3ruXT3qGR3TvMmUcDP0MXsDjMRVOojGgjPGHlrFMrQhZhQvfEq)
---

**[As we enter this critical stage of our fight, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de63d8f41e294d2eaa01c93d1227883a&_e=0G5wHcR2L8KyuF77wmCuJgfyrWJmeQaEiX1Qfl0dDneL3DeADu0iU7MwLBOxJLsILuiyO7uQUC1W_0UJwAiQvDnZzbjVkLnPjX_palvuZUxluciEBf5RBNvSfpRws7-Tde_l00hPUF93mODVKpQtYGEShPpmzZoDrFkMu_WFV4IciGKMVpe1yX5HvEiMCSD1HtAXzwBL2-3ZpZPebE0Egx1jNqX_UCc068uV3IX7cnC3f-lImg6D31iFR8dCYUa_t2EjMlUC0FFnWFX_m5yH9f012rd1EBhQXbkslrELk5tO7oFhQqTFYu69LS3d8EIMiGOqisaUcH4R_foRAHRjg5lswEgkxx0AV2-M3K9RuMco_nRikaomA-BCkCsdzB1dJnCX_kx7A3H1ofKiQ1_Mru7h6JhkrNufNicPSGkfxvtRUGnBEnmbhVE3VISiSu6F8rdixxEgtKdczbXQ3hCa6IYD0W0z_6_jsxZ7Mb1PN_wBXWJO0-_HFfMO2JIZeeD6pS2HhX-69OXj33ysk8Vezc0lRX_F3P6v0p1YXROK6tsWtxZ3_ATOV3H2MqnTP_tmNGztqm7Ba-LqY1anxN-ZsNSighv7TW4_Whr5NTf3MOYZK04lazoppcR0EdZcNHKR "As we enter this critical stage of our fight, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.")**

I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. My parents came to America more than 50 years ago to a country that was strong, and proud, and full of opportunities.

_**But right now, our future is slipping. **_

**[We are in a battle to save our country, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important before the first-in-the-nation Iowa Caucuses today. Can I count on you to chip in?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de63d8f41e294d2eaa01c93d1227883a&_e=0G5wHcR2L8KyuF77wmCuJgfyrWJmeQaEiX1Qfl0dDneL3DeADu0iU7MwLBOxJLsILuiyO7uQUC1W_0UJwAiQvDnZzbjVkLnPjX_palvuZUxluciEBf5RBNvSfpRws7-Tde_l00hPUF93mODVKpQtYGEShPpmzZoDrFkMu_WFV4IciGKMVpe1yX5HvEiMCSD1HtAXzwBL2-3ZpZPebE0Egx1jNqX_UCc068uV3IX7cnC3f-lImg6D31iFR8dCYUa_t2EjMlUC0FFnWFX_m5yH9f012rd1EBhQXbkslrELk5tO7oFhQqTFYu69LS3d8EIMiGOqisaUcH4R_foRAHRjg5lswEgkxx0AV2-M3K9RuMco_nRikaomA-BCkCsdzB1dJnCX_kx7A3H1ofKiQ1_Mru7h6JhkrNufNicPSGkfxvtRUGnBEnmbhVE3VISiSu6F8rdixxEgtKdczbXQ3hCa6IYD0W0z_6_jsxZ7Mb1PN_xlYN4rBoGgnTaCvVsvptpnU6wBL4T0aHN6X0DNcD4YW6Dn9ydGPlxH7vr4AiDKRxJUfTpD6ncEWh5Sz8h9vBjpLSgSaBiWJoqBZN09eW93zHGOYxisvPE5cRQFRRSNIuDcTxjuPCvqId73GdOOV5zu "We are in a battle to save our country, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important before the first-in-the-nation Iowa Caucuses today. Can I count on you to chip in?")**

**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save!** I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.

Saving our country will require us to elect a candidate who not only can defeat Biden and Harris, but one who can lead our country into a brighter future.

In the polls, I defeat Biden by 17 points. I'm the strongest candidate to go toe-to-toe with Biden in November.

And when it comes to leading America into a brighter future, I know how to get it done. As governor, we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy. Business journals started calling South Carolina the Beast of the Southeast - which I loved!

When I was Ambassador to the United Nations, I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

The future of America is too important to hold back now.

I'm running for President of the United States. I'm fighting for a strong and proud America...And I want you by my side.

Our moment is now and our mission is clear.

**[Let's save our country and secure our future. And let's move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de63d8f41e294d2eaa01c93d1227883a&_e=0G5wHcR2L8KyuF77wmCuJgfyrWJmeQaEiX1Qfl0dDneL3DeADu0iU7MwLBOxJLsILuiyO7uQUC1W_0UJwAiQvDnZzbjVkLnPjX_palvuZUxluciEBf5RBNvSfpRws7-Tde_l00hPUF93mODVKpQtYGEShPpmzZoDrFkMu_WFV4IciGKMVpe1yX5HvEiMCSD1HtAXzwBL2-3ZpZPebE0Egx1jNqX_UCc068uV3IX7cnC3f-lImg6D31iFR8dCYUa_t2EjMlUC0FFnWFX_m5yH9f012rd1EBhQXbkslrELk5tO7oFhQqTFYu69LS3d8EIMiGOqisaUcH4R_foRAHRjg5lswEgkxx0AV2-M3K9RuMco_nRikaomA-BCkCsdzB1dJnCX_kx7A3H1ofKiQ1_Mru7h6JhkrNufNicPSGkfxvtRUGnBEnmbhVE3VISiSu6F8rdixxEgtKdczbXQ3hCa6IYD0W0z_6_jsxZ7Mb1PN_x2wIjgy3Yx1TbxWDqn7rEurr72m0o9ovtlf8GpncXIDtR_k3mW_kQ5MfRy1-HzPhfZ72rMNbQ1YAM_PAOf21bQWqhB_PPC8Tb4aaz2NxfeSPJ_eq6poV0xu7L8v2wyi9zl3TdjpgtTQzf71Za1XFh2 "Let’s save our country and secure our future. And let’s move forward, together, toward our destiny – in a strong and proud America!")**

We have a country to save. With you on my side, I know we can do it!

Thank you for everything you do.
---
