My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: It’s hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight. | | | | | | Friend, It's hard to believe that after 11 months in this race, the first votes will take place tonight. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we started as an underdog but are rising in the polls and proving those who underestimate our movement wrong. Supporters like YOU have helped us put on over 150 town halls packed with fired-up supporters who are ready to get our country back on track. I've met with overflowing rooms of voters across the country, shook every hand, answered every question, and shared why I am ready to win this race and lead our country forward as your next President of the United States. | "As we enter this critical stage of our fight, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters." I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. My parents came to America more than 50 years ago to a country that was strong, and proud, and full of opportunities. But right now, our future is slipping. "We are in a battle to save our country, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important before the first-in-the-nation Iowa Caucuses today. Can I count on you to chip in?" I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. Saving our country will require us to elect a candidate who not only can defeat Biden and Harris, but one who can lead our country into a brighter future. In the polls, I defeat Biden by 17 points. I'm the strongest candidate to go toe-to-toe with Biden in November. And when it comes to leading America into a brighter future, I know how to get it done. As governor, we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy. Business journals started calling South Carolina the Beast of the Southeast - which I loved! When I was Ambassador to the United Nations, I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. The future of America is too important to hold back now. I'm running for President of the United States. I'm fighting for a strong and proud America...And I want you by my side. Our moment is now and our mission is clear. "Let’s save our country and secure our future. And let’s move forward, together, toward our destiny – in a strong and proud America!" We have a country to save. With you on my side, I know we can do it! Thank you for everything you do. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Peter, Time is ticking away before the Iowa Caucuses begin and we need you more than ever. Ron DeSantis reached out this morning to share what's been so special about this campaign leading up to this moment. **[When you're done reading, will you consider leaving any generous donation that you can before this critical night kicks off?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcpTNj_SIUO33dIMG8D3TmZT22_Jfw0IIDENdtxHk6lrnRBZxPDXVXc5g04MojgNFQ5OWIg2k1Go4G-kzJFshN-DW1rGosfO5o4l1l7xwM3symD3lJDJzm3k81_71-0h2oXumTaU4H98z3XxWV9LT9Zu)** **_We want to show our supporters in Iowa that we can earn $50,000 by the end of the night to back them up as they head to the caucuses._** How we fight today will make a direct impact on where we go from here. **Ron DeSantis needs you right now.** \- Team DeSantis \--------Forwarded Message--------

Subject: What a ride
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcppYZ6feLYsKauZFSOjeV-T5QCX2x1j4BY13mTrlDwgQzdE-4b1MsxlPAaZjlhprXizT1kSvGfekHLy3PeN3rWfiafBzAlzLN5f9r80irRYKmg9p90x8jmiaiduwiAfH3ybARGGTM0ArN_Z_fm4Qj3Q)
---
Hey Peter, Today is the day of the Iowa Caucuses--the most important day our campaign has faced yet. With just hours to go before the first votes start to take place,**I wanted to send over my recollection of the days that got us here.** Thinking back, I wouldn't be where I am today if it weren't for the incredible outpouring of support that the launch of our campaign was met with.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcqKF2jMm-i9QB0o7ZG7JKmvXvak-Qwrk0I-MdjPsu04ZDUNKcigcuOE1DEllfO80BrHMR9axr7i_0IIrEsYfPjdUQWyr0KrowWiIM_VKZuyMoZNOUiZqiTt_6lo15xWPX-3enfNy-pSmimK4oCkiM47)
---

When we first started, the American people made it clear that they were ready for a change and willing to fight for one. We've been underestimated initially, but we haven't let our voices be silenced.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcod_t5zdCRau5IjoB7N4oT4O8gdhGtvPqNDu-qOvv893boN2RnAtpECFCQ4eTWfiEuBiwJWFyNjlWNLq-nBiihGdvfebUYSnydsUHmG8P-ry7x9d-gUufX1XvSMs4Jv-Ie6Q75bEhWKUvEnwXyCZj1y)
---
Since our earliest days, we haven't slowed down, and we haven't let up. We have been determined to outcampaign every candidate at every turn and reach as many Americans as possible. That's why we made it to every single one of Iowa's 99 counties ahead of **today.**
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcr-Lj5I0sanRM31TQqrMMlfYsASae61Yq5h0v_iZKbKYU1LNpkaAJ4LiNahnF4J2uyOzpfNdA6tRJAeggypCJJh4XwAcLVmOd27XtEx03eMZ8DA1z9v1F-9ssxN8PfrPA4MjyX7dWjzoeX1sYyoGF3E)
---

We haven't just reached people in person. We've taken our message to every news outlet from Fox, to CNN, to MSNBC, to countless others by participating in interviews, roundtable discussions, debates, town halls, etc. We haven't left one stone unturned.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcpBiixEZ5OikrYCRNYQMlk8k1-22SeMY7RSFUytDREHNb4bxLxgba2nidJJbDjjtNKtI5bBAoafNv6UqYl0nQWAGyhvgImNjuc27wG0OmAYbCfhWXabSHM7YHrcLGooepaOW4BAN4HNJYxCW2q6f0gO)
---

Along the way, we've earned some major endorsements, such as Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds', Congressman Chip Roy's, Congressman Thomas Massie's, and the list goes on with state, local, and evangelical leaders up and down the country.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcqh8VjwotEB8WamF-R4zkph4Hxyp9rtdj6a2-zwT2WEymrFXlX2Xc672K9CQjtR21qKrEwI2H2hqhFkKvEt2BIagPefi0SUKkc11F9-TX8Y2rnfxZrmKJCjBSlzOmfot9gVgiDoGiSAiqAcoPLeFyV0)
---
Peter, no one expected us to have the momentum that we do, and none of it would have been possible without you. You are the reason we are going to shock the nation with our support at the caucuses today. **We don't have much time before voting begins for the first time in the 2024 presidential cycle, and this is the moment for all of our hard work to pay off.** _With your support, our momentum can be stronger than ever as Iowans head to their caucuses. They need to see that they won't be fighting alone, and I need your help with that._ Everything has led up to THIS MOMENT. So Peter, I am asking you to step up one last time before caucusing begins. **[Can you send in just $10, $15, or $25 in the next 9 hours?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcrfp4iyfGlSgMrH4IYChijFJBWEdWlt4b2yQhbwiVNPtGar5GA4G5x9O0Eo7cfD3MxJDqlAtwoNxSNal4ZlvhKj74is2-nPZW4zW8iGCtD9RqXJHjR7wN8_P-4ADjs1dV-B328Psf4YwQp_5dcbisTr)** This is our time for choosing. Tonight, our Great American Comeback can begin to take shape, but it all depends on how much we're willing to fight for it.
---
| | [Send In Your Support Here](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcpkxKN5ByyP1259Q0vvpnIcklL5m-GLG2C9UExeWZ_S5LqmO07IslefXq0wpc6p2X5-8lpHLvVhtIZOpHsi6UH7ohGi4bxn5JI9pU_7181dAChCnCwr_qfuszd8uOncWPRpJPxK-3CdiFvSPC-5AYdq)
---
**_Thank you for all you've done to get our team this far. I know I can count on you to help us go into this critical evening stronger than ever._** God bless,
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcol8JUzdcQ2SbXuDFLehKTvf2zWY_yhpAJXoT_frWfla-Pc30P6oHLTexaOBcM0tc3YhrR2ocQph2kuMlSv1CNadgURnfwk5bkATS0Bw7YgyRw2mGwssjkF-oM0ioaLugdDTDYm-Hv6xAGhYURXf2mu)
---

Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcqb715-3WG_6sJ00Tyqs0SCKEttG2scS1j7_fQm2AoBrtpN7kfnAEpJiaMJTh7z-W4rfGoVgkzAT4uQsxQ-R-VvkEQwZXiiJ0xGnFxP3PsnzO_6Ab4I7GetUzNJhINMeedSF8thjZwxRUSqm02hm8Op)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1f24f82ec9a440538312ffd50a76d4e7&_e=oShT_V81o1Xt9I15nQZwB1YpbJfREjPtzJ_kuKysJ39QrSaNN9BW3W8OyI0cKeaab76tuIX_T5JiEaPb0IZZy-R28-N39lhBw2e_az_kyyXOJ37KH1Q1bVka-itdypY_OxR7bm1bBlLyO5ZFyhH32YPnrSmnHOpnOMWjRHZIR2dQFAdwzdZgfpml2Yfk-2CMNazKS8CBn3BUTvt3alTzbMqOeNxYQOl5xyHJZLZ7JSeGM8BZvEfqzNbYaGGBJ9gYZP7mmp4whjiZwsT_f9hxopQ_lf6U43e5dW7kxyyxVcpL1Wknafor5RUCdTL1gWOd1-AgP4Tbgcs0Y9kqmE2qFO_tCAVD02LHLayTAQpO4AEw_BP1cQgKpgE9EZEwZOaU1CHiMnwUGOiYZUfzwUAg0zVcO7SndTZ_3jhCSenb0zt43q6b_bnD_LXV8fFxVrEL)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

clean_body: Your support is make-or-break. | = Hello Peter, I know you’re getting a lot of emails from my team and me. I want to assure you that we only reach out so often because it’s important. = | = In any campaign, some factors are out of our control — like our opponent’s fundraising. We know that Marsha has a massive campaign war chest at her disposal and that she can rely on influxes of cash from corporate PACs. We also know that she’s a hardline MAGA radical more interested in doing Donald Trump’s bidding than fixing the real issues facing Tennessee. Here’s what WE control: We’re saying NO to corporate PAC money We’re working with folks from all over the state to build a multi-party coalition based on Tennesseans’ priorities We’re prioritizing voter engagement and building a groundswell of grassroots momentum We’re budgeting for future expenses as early as possible to put our supporters’ investments to the best possible use As we finalize our budgets for the months ahead, it’s incredibly important that we have a clear idea of what resources we’ll have at our disposal. That’s why meeting our fundraising goals is critical to fulfilling our plans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. | We are in an existential fight for the future of our country and our democracy.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5075%2E5257348%2Eka_c4L)
| **Derek — We’re facing a budget crunch with just a few weeks left until California’s U.S. Senate primary. We need 3,297 more people to step up as 2024 Founding Donors TODAY.

[Chip in any amount today to become a 2024 Team Schiff Founding Donor!](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5075%2E5257348%2Eka_c4L)** | [DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240115_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5075%2E5257348%2Eka_c4L)
---
Derek — California’s U.S. Senate primary election is a few weeks away, and every voter will begin to receive a ballot in the mail and will start voting _even sooner_! We need to build up our grassroots team _now_.
We are in an existential fight for the future of our country and our democracy. We’ve made real progress, but real danger lies ahead, in the presidential election this year in which Trump has conditioned his MAGA loyalists to believe that if he loses, the process is somehow rigged or fraudulent.
**Many of the most consequential fights for the future of our democracy will be waged in the U.S. Senate. That’s why electing Adam to the Senate is so important.**

name: Peace Champions via Our Revolution
subject: Reflecting on our work towards peace and a more just future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Today, we remember the life’s work of Martin Luther King Jr.

Time and again, Dr. King put his life on the line in the struggle for
racial, economic and social justice — and in the greater struggle for
peace. He was one of the great moral leaders of the 20th century. Every
day that we organize, we can look towards his inspirational, and
difficult, work for guidance.

While Dr. King led the anti-segregation movement in the 1950s and 60s, he
also made his voice loud and clear in the anti-war movement. We look to
his bold, courageous stands, his unwavering voice, as we organize for
peace, racial justice, and economic security today.

It’s why we also look to Rep. Barbara Lee for inspirational leadership in
these difficult times. Lee not only fights for racial and economic
justice, she is one the most courageous anti-war advocates in all of
Congress. She was one of the first to call for a ceasefire in Gaza, and
she continues to work towards peace for the Palestinian people.

Lee was the lone, brave vote in Congress against the 2001 war
authorization in Afghanistan, which gave President Bush nearly unlimited
war powers. Her vote against war resulted in death threats at the time,
but was vindicated by history.

Lee was also one of the few to vote against the war in Iraq, the PATRIOT
Act, and the drone strikes in Libya. She always votes to slash the bloated
Pentagon budget, despite the majority of Congress voting to continue
giving more and more money to the U.S. military.

In Our Revolution’s recent Peace Town Hall with Lee and Rashida Tlaib, Lee
said, “Wherever I am or what platform I have, I’m going to fight for peace
and security for people no matter where they live.” She later added, “I
don’t believe in taking our resources and tax dollars to enrich arms
dealers that are scamming the system and creating war.”

As we organize for a more just future, Barbara Lee is a critical ally in
Congress — and that’s why we’re supporting her run for California’s open
U.S. Senate seat.

If you’re with us in this work for justice and peace, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13429?source=email-20240115&t=1011&akid=5190%2E5885482%2E6l2-9j ]please consider
adding your name to support Barbara Lee’s calls for peace today.

Thank you for your continued work to build the progressive movement.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Exciting News: Introducing a Major Tax Cut Package Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
It's time for Consumer Tax Relief
| | |
---
| | Derek, As we continue to navigate these challenging times of ever higher inflation and less money in our pockets, I am thrilled to share some uplifting news with you. Tomorrow, I will be introducing a significant tax cut package in the legislature. The **Consumer Tax Relief Act** is not just a set of legislative proposals; it's a reflection of our shared values and our steadfast dedication to enhancing the financial freedom and prosperity of our community. In the face of rising living costs and economic uncertainty, it's more important than ever that we take decisive action to support our hardworking citizens. **Key Highlights of the Tax Cut Package:** **Elimination of the Communications Services Tax (CST):** Recognizing the essential nature of communication services, we are taking steps to eliminate the CST, thereby reducing the financial burden on our families and businesses. **Reduction of the Meals and Rooms Tax:** In an effort to make dining out and tourism more affordable, we are proposing a reduction in the Meals and Rooms Tax. This will not only benefit consumers but also bolster our local hospitality industry. By the end of our proposed tax relief roadmap, our New Hampshire Meals & Roomns Tax will be lower than Massachusetts! **Employer Tax Relief:** We're proposing more reductions to both the Business Profits Tax (BPT) and the Business Enterprise Tax (BET). This move is designed to invigorate our local economy, encourage business growth, and create more job opportunities for our residents. **Support for Local Communities:** While we cut the Meals & Rooms Tax rate, we are also increasing revenue sharing to the municipalities to ensure they are not adversely affected by the tax relief package. This package is a direct response to the economic challenges imposed by external factors, including policies from Washington D.C. that have contributed to the rising cost of living. It's time we take control of our economic destiny and provide tangible relief to our citizens. I am reaching out to you to share this exciting development and to ask for your continued support as we work to pass this legislation. Your voices, advocacy, and engagement are crucial in helping to spread the word and garner support for these much-needed tax cuts. [Sign our petition in support of Consumer Tax Relief HERE.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) Stay tuned for more updates following the official introduction of the package tomorrow. Together, we can make a significant difference in the lives of the people of New Hampshire. Thank you for your unwavering support and commitment to our great state. Best regards, Joe Sweeney
---
| [ SUPPORT OUR CONSUMER TAX RELIEF ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---

---

Tomorrow, I will be introducing a significant tax cut package in the legislature. The **Consumer Tax Relief Act** is not just a set of legislative proposals; it's a reflection of our shared values and our steadfast dedication to enhancing the financial freedom and prosperity of our community. In the face of rising living costs and economic uncertainty, it's more important than ever that we take decisive action to support our hardworking citizens. **Key Highlights of the Tax Cut Package:** **Elimination of the Communications Services Tax (CST):** Recognizing the essential nature of communication services, we are taking steps to eliminate the CST, thereby reducing the financial burden on our families and businesses. **Reduction of the Meals and Rooms Tax:** In an effort to make dining out and tourism more affordable, we are proposing a reduction in the Meals and Rooms Tax. This will not only benefit consumers but also bolster our local hospitality industry. By the end of our proposed tax relief roadmap, our New Hampshire Meals & Roomns Tax will be lower than Massachusetts! **Employer Tax Relief:** We're proposing more reductions to both the Business Profits Tax (BPT) and the Business Enterprise Tax (BET). This move is designed to invigorate our local economy, encourage business growth, and create more job opportunities for our residents. **Support for Local Communities:** While we cut the Meals & Rooms Tax rate, we are also increasing revenue sharing to the municipalities to ensure they are not adversely affected by the tax relief package. This package is a direct response to the economic challenges imposed by external factors, including policies from Washington D.C. that have contributed to the rising cost of living. It's time we take control of our economic destiny and provide tangible relief to our citizens. I am reaching out to you to share this exciting development and to ask for your continued support as we work to pass this legislation. Your voices, advocacy, and engagement are crucial in helping to spread the word and garner support for these much-needed tax cuts. [Sign our petition in support of Consumer Tax Relief HERE.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) Stay tuned for more updates following the official introduction of the package tomorrow. Together, we can make a significant difference in the lives of the people of New Hampshire. Thank you for your unwavering support and commitment to our great state. Best regards, Joe Sweeney

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: Is this America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77140561/449490766/-749972717?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240115_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkMTc2M2EyLWYxYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fTd1QMpWYaSYPFER_qO2lCBZ373FM1tWYmxBDc-PCvk=)
Hey Peter, Harry Dunn here.
This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.
So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?
Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?
Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?
**That's not American to me.** I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.
[_**If that's the American you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to Upset the Setup and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign:**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77140564/449490768/-749972717?amount=10&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240115_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkMTc2M2EyLWYxYjMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fTd1QMpWYaSYPFER_qO2lCBZ373FM1tWYmxBDc-PCvk=)

clean_body: = Hey Peter, Harry Dunn here. This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history. So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America? Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America? Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America? That's not American to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Together, Harry | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | We are on a deadline | Fellow Patriot, I just wanted to take a moment today to introduce myself. My name is Derek, and I’m the Chief Strategist for Kat Cammack. To ensure we get off to a strong start in 2024, I’ve spent a lot of time going over the books and reviewing our finances. And today – I was shocked by what I saw. If we don’t raise another $5,000 MINIMUM by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT – Kat will be off pace for the rest of the year, which could cost her the race come November. Will you help us close the gap, and set Kat up for a conservative VICTORY this November? | | | | | | | Thank you, | | Derek Chief Strategist Team Cammack | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Derek, Team Cammack 5200 NW 43rd St, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Playing God
body:
The experts were wrong | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/playing-god?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

When humans play God, we all lose. The tyranny of big pharma, big government and arrogant doctors is eroding the trust in American healthcare. There should be an attitude of care and openness, but instead this toxic triad has led with hubris. I want you to take a little time and watch our most recent podcast on this very issue. [Click here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f6336521c3&e=9828080a05) or the [video thumbnail below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=a860554a18&e=9828080a05) to watch it:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9a19e40f3c&e=9828080a05)
---
| When we see political forces shut down free speech through censorship, alarm bells should go off. When the public square is shut down, we should be asking, “who is trying to play GOD and WHY?” [Watch the podcast](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2c7f39b7b4&e=9828080a05) or [listen to it ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9737b31ea5&e=9828080a05)when you have a moment.

We must continue to be vigilant against the triad of tyranny: big tech, big pharma, and big government.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Will you help us cross the finish line?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi friend — thank you for opening this. Our first fundraising deadline of the election year expires at midnight, and we’re falling short of where we need to be to reach our goal. Missing a fundraising goal during an election year won’t just force our campaign to scale back our budget, it also might raise red flags to our Republican opponents and anyone else keeping an eye on our campaign. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Honoring Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77141170/449492483/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzRlMDU3ZC1mOGIzLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fI-QMPz-bSvWOPDPEVuuQlf6VGwqc5We6RgZx2lp-lI=&emci=24214568-a7b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=174e057d-f8b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=5643047)
---
Friends, Today, we honor and reflect on the remarkable life and impact of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. We can all learn from Dr. King – his commitment to standing for what was right, even in the face of immense opposition, is a lesson we can all carry with us as we strive to honor his legacy. As we reflect on his impact on the world, I hope we remember that it is also a call to action. Each day, we can continue to contribute to the creation of the kind of world that Dr. King envisioned and inspired. Today and everyday, may we honor Dr. King’s legacy, and remember that it is our duty to carry out his dream by working collectively to uphold social justice, unity, and equality. _Andrea Salinas_

name: Bob
subject: Inspiration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Celebrating Martin Luther King Jr. Day
Speaking Up for What Matters
Today, we join the nation in celebrating the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., a man who fought tirelessly for equality and justice .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Dr. King's life offers a poignant reminder of the power of courage, resilience, and most importantly, the power of using our voices for the things that matter. I will carry those lessons with me in my journey to Congress.
JOIN OUR FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
"Our lives begin to end when we become silent about the things that matter." - Martin Luther King, Jr.
These words resonate deeply within me, as they did with millions of Americans in the 1960s, serving as a call to action.
I began my Congressional campaign last year on Martin Luther King, Jr. Day in 2023 because he called us all to serve , and that's why I'm in this fight: Service.
I pride myself on being an "issues-based candidate." Even when it's hard to hear, I will never remain silent on critical and controversial issues that impact our district, state, nation, and world. Where others may be timid, my commitment to you is that I will never be afraid to speak out.
In the spirit of Dr. King and his call to service, I pledge to face issues head-on and seek solutions that will benefit us all. In our communications, I strive to offer substance, not fluffy, frivolous squawk.
Why I Want to Continue to Serve
*
We
need
problem-solvers,
not
problem
creators.
*
We
need
leaders
who
study
issues
and
find
solutions
,
not
just
experts
in
fundraising.
*
We
need
independent
thinkers
willing
to
listen,
learn,
cooperate,
and
collaborate.
*
We
need
truth-tellers
with
honesty,
integrity,
and
courage.
*
We
need
wealth
and
money
out
of
politics;
candidates
must
earn
votes,
not
buy
them.
*
We
need
legislators
willing
to
fight
for
the
general
welfare
of
our
Nation,
not
to
tell
us
how
to
worship,
what
to
believe,
or
what
books
to
read.
*
We
need
legislators
who
will
promote
our
freedoms,
not
restrict
them.
*
We
need
leaders
who
will
unite
us
in
reaching
common
goals
that
benefit
every
citizen,
not
the
selected
few.
Another Dr. King quote important to my political mantra is:
"Of all the forms of inequality, injustice in health is the most shocking and inhuman."
And that's why I'm proudly the only family doctor in the country running for Congress to pass universal healthcare.
For people of all colors and backgrounds, we need a publicly financed, non-profit, national health insurance program that fully covers medical costs for every American citizen.
We need Medicare for All and a doctor in the House willing to make "good trouble" to get it done.
That's my inspiration. That's why I'm in this fight. Thank you for your support, loyalty, and generosity, and have a blessed and meaningful Martin Luther King, Jr. Day.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CELEBRATE DR. KING WITH US ON OUR SOCIAL MEDIA ACCOUNTS [https://linktr.ee/boblorinser]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: Team Kennedy
subject: It’s Not About The Billions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now.

|
---
| | | **Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_15_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Many experts are predicting that the candidates for president this year will spend $2 billion apiece to get themselves elected.
It seems that’s what it costs to convince people that you are the lesser of two evils.
But what will it cost a genuinely likable candidate like RFK Jr.? What does it cost if you’re actually discussing the issues people care about instead of slinging mud at your opponents?
That's where we come in.
Against all odds, our campaign has already made remarkable progress, having spent only around $15 million.
We’re leading both former presidents in all Americans under 45, leading with independents, and, in the battleground states, we’re just 10 points behind the two billion-dollar men.
We simply need to pull about 5 percent from each of them to secure victory.
Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now. While the media focuses on the staggering sums raised by others, we know that true power lies in the people.
**It's not about the billions;** **_it's about 100% participation from people just like you._**
**So, I humbly request that you donate now.** [**Join the ranks of the individuals who have already given $5, $10, or $24.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_15_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_15_24_email_1_1_nd&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_15_24_email_1_1_nd&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_15_24_email_1_1_nd&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=billions_1_15_24_email_1_1_nd&n=9)
Every donation, big or small, matters and contributes to the groundswell of support that will propel us forward on the path to victory.
Your generosity sends a powerful message, not just to the opposition but to the world: that real change can be achieved through the collective spirit of passionate individuals like yourself.
**Remember, it's not about the billions we don't have; it's about the power of unity and the strength of your belief in our shared vision.**
_Together, we will defy expectations and herald in a new era of positive change for our great nation._
Thank you,

clean_body: Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now. | | | | Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now. | Dear Peter, Many experts are predicting that the candidates for president this year will spend $2 billion apiece to get themselves elected. It seems that’s what it costs to convince people that you are the lesser of two evils. But what will it cost a genuinely likable candidate like RFK Jr.? What does it cost if you’re actually discussing the issues people care about instead of slinging mud at your opponents? That's where we come in. Against all odds, our campaign has already made remarkable progress, having spent only around $15 million. We’re leading both former presidents in all Americans under 45, leading with independents, and, in the battleground states, we’re just 10 points behind the two billion-dollar men. We simply need to pull about 5 percent from each of them to secure victory. Imagine the transformative change we can bring about if we stand together now. While the media focuses on the staggering sums raised by others, we know that true power lies in the people. It's not about the billions; it's about 100% participation from people just like you. So, I humbly request that you donate now. Every donation, big or small, matters and contributes to the groundswell of support that will propel us forward on the path to victory. Your generosity sends a powerful message, not just to the opposition but to the world: that real change can be achieved through the collective spirit of passionate individuals like yourself. Remember, it's not about the billions we don't have; it's about the power of unity and the strength of your belief in our shared vision. Together, we will defy expectations and herald in a new era of positive change for our great nation. Thank you, Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

D.C. Democrats are afraid of me - a regular, hard-working Northeastern Pennsylvanian who has spent his life supporting his community and who's now running for Congress.

**Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of them hate people like us and are spending MILLIONS of dollars to prevent me from flipping one of the most important seats this election cycle - PA-08.**

I've spent my entire life in my Northeastern Pennsylvania district, just like the four generations of my family before me. I've been working for and running my family business - an electrical contractor company - since I was 19 years old.
[ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=56bc54625340475188ba9ac49d181499&_e=8TWj71VuWnp1DLDt_bouY7iCaQqFjznKTo4JQhQ4iek_T361h3y-Tm67O1TNvqW5eZcHWoborPmoW4wajR_-aIkCADUoRSUVwzQAbKhn7y6Gc6_9ARFBRuCePHlrt7JxyLsNbz4rneomFMtEZ19PXNmxlIIYV77rD59XbShUH13G7z_9e_NX3RW2qrX3gPAKLD6fnm8FfU8stBx5Wk8VMzROox_2kW6UohmYhBNkwy52oD6VgH2XH6D0UoNwZgJu-LBfYF7OcEt3-byW2XR5sPFuPp-7Sq45gsA4jiN41kXvAEwMWVyMTRlKbgtUDPe_DfHR3I9soFTwl3b1PLN-NMkptoySrwG6u5ljyx4FgGYK6ywTNQl1EzLTM0y6NaGNW0QAKFF3qr2ROJqA3cVXCA%3D%3D)
People like you and me - hard-working and self-made Americans - put the Fear of God in Radical Rich Established Democrats. That's why they'll do anything to prevent our campaign from winning in November.

| | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxkz7FugzAQgOGnOTaQOWMgA0NblE6VuiRrZexzsMrF1JhEvH1FFHXp-vuT707zPHm3ddC8AuLo7QKIIF8AcU3yrE-nj7jl_edP_q7OeNkf8Q0Q0zbTn3x-UhBrP-216TPbVahLZzLqykYoqQ6NEtnYOYFDq8gOdVlpbIa2MmQPRjjVVsYKk_kOBVaiLBVKgYiFs1LWbd3aVurDoAgq8RhUuEiURn_9pmi1n7bCBM6mbkxpXh6LHQGPO7KB7zqZsYh0uxUm7HnwuY6RlrTk2qQQcx7ywCCPa-KvJazREMj-HwOsd8Bk_cog-8DPYjTP2l-uIHseni1R3I1LtgSsNYf1mkD2qLLY2fnup8kvdQOVuDzuMYF_AwAA___MaX4t) Friend,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden’s FBI.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxkz7FugzAQgOGnOTaQOWMgA0NblE6VuiRrZexzsMrF1JhEvH1FFHXp-vuT707zPHm3ddC8AuLo7QKIIF8AcU3yrE-nj7jl_edP_q7OeNkf8Q0Q0zbTn3x-UhBrP-216TPbVahLZzLqykYoqQ6NEtnYOYFDq8gOdVlpbIa2MmQPRjjVVsYKk_kOBVaiLBVKgYiFs1LWbd3aVurDoAgq8RhUuEiURn_9pmi1n7bCBM6mbkxpXh6LHQGPO7KB7zqZsYh0uxUm7HnwuY6RlrTk2qQQcx7ywCCPa-KvJazREMj-HwOsd8Bk_cog-8DPYjTP2l-uIHseni1R3I1LtgSsNYf1mkD2qLLY2fnup8kvdQOVuDzuMYF_AwAA___MaX4t)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he’s a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day.**

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he’s starred in Babylon Bee’s funny series, “Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas”) ...

... He’s also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden’s lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That’s right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What’s more, this isn’t the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka’s rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka’s home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates.**

As you can imagine, his best friend’s two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here’s what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn’t arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend’s little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That’s why I’ve filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 46 years.

You’ve seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I’m proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he’s alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He’s deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it’s too late.

clean_body: Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport. | | | | | Friend, Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport. He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire. The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant. Siaka was arrested because he’s a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he’s starred in Babylon Bee’s funny series, “Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas”) ... ... He’s also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country. Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden’s lawless administration. So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That’s right, MISDEMEANORS! What’s more, this isn’t the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka’s rights, either. Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka’s home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. As you can imagine, his best friend’s two little children, just three and seven years old, were terrified. And here’s what happened next: The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present! The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back! And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled! And because the FBI didn’t arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend’s little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property. Can you imagine being abused like this... as an American citizen in your own country? What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME. That’s why I’ve filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP. I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 46 years. You’ve seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets. I’m proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime) I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton. And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.**And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS! Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he’s alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country. He’s deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree. I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it’s too late. If Joe Biden’s FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends. I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: Volunteer. Educate. Support. Build Community. Vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
In order to honor his legacy and uphold his dream of a truly just society.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77141580/449493991/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWMxNjY3ZDYtZmJiMy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FOfm7xI6SAIYC5-UdxK6QclmApjeSRUaiq_VRyIM48c=&emci=f60bcb86-f2b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=5c1667d6-fbb3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter — Today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, a moment for us to not only reflect on the profound legacy of a visionary leader who dedicated his life to the pursuit of justice, equality, and unity — but to take action. This year, I am honoring the legacy of Dr. King with City Year Los Angeles at an MLK Day service event. **Dr. King's powerful words and unwavering commitment to civil rights continue to inspire generations, reminding us that the fight for equality is an ongoing journey — and one that we must continue to actively participate in to create positive change.** Here are some actionable steps to get involved in your own community:
* **Volunteer** : Dedicate your time to local organizations that work towards social justice. Advocacy is a powerful tool for change, and by speaking out against injustice and supporting policies that promote equality, we contribute to a brighter future.
* **Support Minority-Owned Businesses** : Strengthen economic empowerment by consciously choosing to support businesses owned by minorities.
* **Education** : I have seen firsthand education's critical role in dismantling systemic inequalities, that's why I'm committed to continuing my own education on the history of civil rights struggles and inequality. To carry on Dr. King's work, we must engage with our communities and foster dialogue that promotes understanding and empathy. Share information about racial and social issues to raise awareness and encourage informed conversations.
* **Vote** : Exercise your right to vote and advocate for fair and accessible voting practices.
* **Build Community:** Initiate or participate in community-building events that bring people together across differences.

I am honored to be able to volunteer my time with City Year, and always leave those events with a restored sense of hope and purpose. **As we commemorate Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., let's transform inspiration into action, and co-create a future where equality and justice prevail.** More soon, _Nick_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: In order to honor his legacy and uphold his dream of a truly just society. | | | | Peter — Today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, a moment for us to not only reflect on the profound legacy of a visionary leader who dedicated his life to the pursuit of justice, equality, and unity — but to take action. This year, I am honoring the legacy of Dr. King with City Year Los Angeles at an MLK Day service event. Dr. King's powerful words and unwavering commitment to civil rights continue to inspire generations, reminding us that the fight for equality is an ongoing journey — and one that we must continue to actively participate in to create positive change. Here are some actionable steps to get involved in your own community: Volunteer : Dedicate your time to local organizations that work towards social justice. Advocacy is a powerful tool for change, and by speaking out against injustice and supporting policies that promote equality, we contribute to a brighter future. Support Minority-Owned Businesses : Strengthen economic empowerment by consciously choosing to support businesses owned by minorities. Education : I have seen firsthand education's critical role in dismantling systemic inequalities, that's why I'm committed to continuing my own education on the history of civil rights struggles and inequality. To carry on Dr. King's work, we must engage with our communities and foster dialogue that promotes understanding and empathy. Share information about racial and social issues to raise awareness and encourage informed conversations. Vote : Exercise your right to vote and advocate for fair and accessible voting practices. Build Community: Initiate or participate in community-building events that bring people together across differences. I am honored to be able to volunteer my time with City Year, and always leave those events with a restored sense of hope and purpose. As we commemorate Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., let's transform inspiration into action, and co-create a future where equality and justice prevail. More soon, Nick | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

| Trump Wins Iowa Caucus!
---
|
---
| Congratulations President Trump, and team on winning the Iowa Caucus back to back! Folks from all over the country flew in to Iowa this weekend including myself to help Trump win so we can Save America! We spent many hours on the phone, helped set up events, and more to ensure folks knew where to vote and to ensure we had a strong voter turnout. I really enjoyed my conversation with President Trump. We love Trump because he is 100 % American, he loves our country and he loves the American people. Under president Trump, everyone was better off and the world was safer. I am proud to be the first elected official in Virginia to endorse Trump 2024!
Unfortunately, my Never Trumper opponent Bob Good and his never Trumper Facebook trolls continue to disparage Trump and fellow MAGA Patriots. Our campaign to represent the 5th is gaining momentum. Stay vigilant, we have a long ways to go!
[My official Iowa Statement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c96h1R1klTrH5YI2k_6V4Fq3TXi9h0OFG51Pu7Gj4H-7uCdD--yYcezrf774-FS65OVa7fscKYV7PL87SyYShziK_R8cAsN3AlOiXhAhDeS60hKcpc4-mA-5Ov9LSub_7OSclsuNkUYxLegWpJlo1Pc2UrjdwepOxT3l_-gjoqv7dC_df5TSc4siGYpQ1T9Dv-PapWUrXQ0iE5PJKlGq9TdIdHVMolH2ifLsB4pkJXKDBNzkgy19vpaO4n4FYbJR0DOYwJ8UHgJ8r9Ve5SEQeA==&c=BOx9wp4f3H2QTN6EX-8YWVlUmrXyBgCp0OFx--Q9b2dDsojFsnbQSA==&ch=xGqH3nLW42eOL493mvFdwBlq9c6wRtrMD8R-QBoF8nn63_XXZt-idw==)

Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good.

I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda!

I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

clean_body: My Trip to Iowa! | | | | | | == | == | John McGuire I'm Running for Congress to "Save America!" Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner) | Trump Wins Iowa Caucus! | | Congratulations President Trump, and team on winning the Iowa Caucus back to back! Folks from all over the country flew in to Iowa this weekend including myself to help Trump win so we can Save America! We spent many hours on the phone, helped set up events, and more to ensure folks knew where to vote and to ensure we had a strong voter turnout. I really enjoyed my conversation with President Trump. We love Trump because he is 100 % American, he loves our country and he loves the American people. Under president Trump, everyone was better off and the world was safer. I am proud to be the first elected official in Virginia to endorse Trump 2024! Unfortunately, my Never Trumper opponent Bob Good and his never Trumper Facebook trolls continue to disparage Trump and fellow MAGA Patriots. Our campaign to represent the 5th is gaining momentum. Stay vigilant, we have a long ways to go! == | | | | | | | | | | | | | | == | | | ---|--- | I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Senator John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

subject: Plan to turn Katie’s standout debate moments into ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
There’s *a lot* riding on this debate.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36506%2E3422442%2EeZWwEt)
We’re exactly one week away from the first debate of this race!
There’s *a lot* riding on this debate, Derek. A political operative was quoted in the LA Times saying that while our opponents may have more money, Katie has charisma and the ability to do well in debates—**so her debate performance could give our campaign the momentum we need to surge ahead.**
We’ll leave the debate to Katie, but here’s what you can do:**We need to be ready to turn Katie’s standout debate moments into ads, so we’ve set a pre-debate goal of $50,000.** If we’re able to spend $50,000 on ads amplifying Katie’s debate performance, we can reach hundreds of thousands of voters.
**[Can you make a donation of $5 today to help us prepare?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240115-2?refcode=em20240115-36506&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36506_3422442_eZWwEt&akid=36506%2E3422442%2EeZWwEt)**

Thanks so much!

Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. body:
Sinema is Republicans partner in obstruction | | | Peter – Martin Luther King understood how to use political power to effect change – and he was very clear about the filibuster’s role in obstructing Civil Rights and voting rights:
**_“I think the tragedy is that we have [...] a minority of misguided senators who will use the filibuster to keep the majority of people from even voting.”_** Nearly 60 years after Dr. King’s death, the filibuster continues to stand in the way of passing voting rights legislation, and Southern politicians continue to find new ways to suppress the Black vote – from reducing polling locations in Black neighborhoods to gutting the Voting Rights Act and gerrymandering districts to reduce Black electoral strength. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xy2RlJ-Em0gUd0g2Uu80wnEO8DHYnfXFR101qORFfOHn03J_gSD4g4WI7n2B52ZNBoOd-ywnwDwzGhgLwXs4GkVo1sG3Y-fntbdyxef879iqOdF8l7KQkrR4uu2SEsJwxeHfY_xuezQ1eaR1MYOWl6N36c-SduOQLpS_L51oDOBSeB30-hJEA27Jj8-9l3PVLk3Y61zQMI7bQhL57p-qx7H_s5H66QFqAoGFOlDQErI9sR8Jdc62BrowN2mdgAQVuFCl0JKhLP437n5rqqRenjH5Mx9mwg04oPRp7LJ8smk_hMXaVdO4k0f0nxNtibDP0/430/ABAT40GiT6iAEK8qD_et7Q/h0/HPHk6StLnLl1Dugc0sorcnnh0tP7Qo9x6Bbi4XSmx08) And Kyrsten Sinema has been on the wrong side of this ongoing fight. She sided with Republicans to protect their filibuster instead of passing John Lewis’s legislation that would restore the pieces of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 that Republicans gutted. And then she bragged about it on stage in a room full of billionaires. **_[We first launched this PAC in response to Kyrsten Sinema’s obstruction of voting rights. Now, we’re dedicated to holding her accountable and electing a new Senator who will fight for ALL Arizonans. Friend,
These words of Dr. King’s are in my thoughts today: _"An injustice to one is an injustice to all." _
One of the biggest reasons I am running for office is to fight for equity and equality for all people, especially those who have historically had their basic rights stripped away or denied.
At an early age, I have felt called to the ultimate struggle for justice, equality, and doing my part to end the toxic legacy of racism and divisiveness that still plagues our nation, nearly 60 years after the struggles of Dr. King’s time.
Today more than ever, with a disturbing rise in political violence, we must reflect on the legacy of peacemaker Dr. Rev. Martin Luther King Jr. and strive to do more—much more—to honor his memory.**
**

**It is during these times, times of “challenge and controversy,” that we must dig deep and find the strength to stand for what we know is right and good and true.**
Thank you for staying in the fight, for always leading with justice and equality, and never giving up on the conviction that we can create a better world **_TOGETHER_**.
With Love, Peace, and Compassion,
-_Tamie_ [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTA0ODAzMjE3NzM4MzE1MTYsXCJyXCI6MTEwNDgwMzU1MDE0NzM5ODMxfSIsInMiOiI2ZGU3Y2ZlNTU4NTM5MDZkIn0)

| | **We Need You!**
---
| | In order to win in November, Mike will need to spread his message from Detroit to Marquette, Saginaw to Kalamazoo, and everywhere in between! name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Thank you, Martin Luther King Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
95 years ago, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. was born and, today, we honor his life and the profound impact he had on our nation. To this day, he is a beacon of light and hope, and his message of equality and freedom remains a lifelong call to action.

95 years ago, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. was born and, today, we honor his life and the profound impact he had on our nation. To this day, he is a beacon of light and hope, and his message of equality and freedom remains a lifelong call to action. **Today, we should all pay tribute to Dr. King’s legacy not just by remembering his life, but by revisiting his words and considering the actions they compel us to take.** Dr. King’s legacy isn’t merely history: It’s a reminder of the continuous journey toward freedom, justice, and equality that each of us are part of. May this Martin Luther King Jr. Day serve as a day of reflection, and a renewed commitment to the values he championed. Because as a society, we have a long way to go before our great American promise of liberty, equality, and justice are truly realized. Finally, it is not lost on me that, if I’m elected, I will be the first Black person to represent Oregon in Congress. **I stand on the shoulders of trailblazers like Dr. King, and I’ll be proud to carry their legacies with me in the Halls of Congress – just as I’ve done as the first Black Representative in the Oregon State House.** Every day – but especially today, as we honor Dr. King’s legacy – I am so grateful to be with you in this fight. _Janelle Bynum_
---

| Janelle Bynum is running for in Oregon's 5th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [JanelleBynum.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77141814/449494832/-1494881468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0N2U1OTUtMDBiNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4yKwHzF8na2UFrxB1M3IWE_rEqlJoLPLVwQkZGy6pxg=&emci=ad2fd4c6-7db1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3447e595-00b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14434323).

clean_body: Democrats everywhere should be worried | | | THE WASHINGTON POST: The 2024 Senate map is "GOP Dream" Friend, Senate Democrats are facing the toughest election cycle in years. If we want any chance of defeating the GOP and their far-right megadonors, we need every single Democrat on board. But you still haven't stepped up with a donation! | | BLUE SENATE SUPPORTER RECORD Supporter: = Donation Status: PENDING Suggested Gift: = **11:59 P.M. DEADLINE TONIGHT = | | = Friend, Democrats everywhere should be worried... If we lose control of the Senate, our country will be pushed backward to an era of MAGA extremism. The GOP will work night and day to undo our progress, cut Social Security and Medicare, ban abortion nationwide, stack the courts with far-right radicals, destroy the Affordable Care Act and so much more. We can't let them get away with it! But election experts are warning that our Senate majority could be doomed: There are a massive 23 Democratic seats on the ballot this fall. We'll only be able to compete with the GOP's megadonors and defend our majority if every single incumbent has a huge grassroots war chest to fight back with. But right now, Kirsten Gillibrand is falling dangerously short of her weekly goal! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
